Canvas: Wide 16:9 contact-sheet layout, 1280x720 style, divided into a clean 5-column by 3-row grid. Each panel has a thin white border, a blue circular number badge in the top-left, a white slanted title banner across the top with bold blue uppercase English text, and a dark translucent caption bar along the bottom with Japanese explanatory text.

Setting and visual style: Sunny outdoor football stadium with green field, running track, curved grandstands, vivid blue sky, fluffy clouds, energetic idol-cheer atmosphere. High-quality anime illustration, glossy promotional look, dynamic wide-angle camera, bright rim light, saturated blue-and-white palette, crisp details, motion in hair and skirt. The character wears a blue-and-white cheerleader outfit: cropped sleeveless top with star motif, pleated mini skirt, blue ribbons, thigh garter accents, ankle shoes, and large blue-and-white pom-poms. Long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} twin-tail hair with blue bows, cute expressive idol style.

Layout and exact panel list: Include exactly 15 panels, ordered left to right, top to bottom:
1. HIGH V — both arms raised high in a V shape with pom-poms.
2. LOW V — both arms extended diagonally downward in a low V stance.
3. T MOTION — arms stretched straight sideways at shoulder height.
4. TOUCHDOWN — one arm raised high and the other extended diagonally downward.
5. HIGH TOUCH — one hand reaches straight upward as if touching high, one leg lifted playfully.
6. LOW TOUCH — leaning forward with one arm reaching low toward the ground.
7. HALF TIME — hands placed on hips, ready stance.
8. CLAP — pom-poms brought together in front, clapping rhythmically.
9. PUNCH — one arm thrust powerfully upward with pom-pom.
10. SPIN — spinning in place, skirt and hair flaring outward.
11. KICK — high leg kick with energetic balance.
12. LUNGE — one knee bent deeply in a strong lunge pose.
13. JUMP — jumping upward with pom-pom raised and legs tucked.
14. BOW — polite forward bow with pom-poms gathered in front.
15. FINISH POSE — final celebratory pose with one arm raised and smile.

Text content: Use the English motion titles exactly as listed. Add Japanese captions similar to a cheer instruction guide under each panel, including these meanings: basic high V position, calm low V stance, synchronized shoulder-height team motion, one hand high and one diagonal, touch high to appeal height, low touch with sparkle, hands on waist for preparation, clap pom-poms to make rhythm, punch upward with strength, spin for華やか movement, dynamic high kick, strong lunge, jump to express energy, graceful bow of thanks, and smiling finish pose. Main title is not needed.

Constraints: Keep the grid perfectly readable and evenly spaced. Use exactly 15 numbered panels and no extra panels. Maintain consistent character design, outfit, colors, and stadium background across all panels. Make the typography bold and legible. Avoid logos, watermarks, and unrelated objects.
title: Anime Cheerleader Pose Sheet
description: A 15-panel anime cheer motion reference sheet for generating a dynamic blue-and-white stadium cheerleader action guide.

content:
Goal: Create a vintage botanical photo-chronicle contact sheet titled {argument name="headline text" default="The Slow Garden: A Rosemary Chronicle"}, documenting the life cycle of {argument name="plant name" default="rosemary"} from dry pot to harvest.

Canvas: Square 1:1 poster on warm aged parchment paper, subtle stains and speckles, soft cream background, thin dark-green panel borders, handwritten field-journal typography. Use a large decorative serif/calligraphy headline centered at the top.

Layout: Arrange exactly 12 photographic panels in a clean 4-column by 3-row grid. Each panel has a handwritten green stage label above it, a short uppercase camera-direction caption below it, and an italic poetic quote beneath the caption. Add small downward arrow marks along the far left and far right margins to suggest time passing.

Panel details, count exactly 12:
1. Stage label: "Dormancy". Image: a terracotta pot on a windowsill filled with cracked dry soil, no plant visible. Caption: "WIDE · OVERHEAD · FIXED CAMERA". Quote: "Winter's silence, the seed waits."
2. Stage label: "Dormancy". Image: macro view of a terracotta pot rim and dark soil with a single water droplet running down the clay side. Caption: "MACRO · SLOW MOTION DROP". Quote: "First drop, awakening memory."
3. Stage label: "Germination". Image: low-angle close photo of a pale tiny shoot emerging from dark soil. Caption: "LOW ANGLE · TIME-LAPSE FEEL". Quote: "Root first, shoot later."
4. Stage label: "Germination". Image: close-up of a small cotyledon seedling with two green leaves rising from soil, soft bokeh background. Caption: "CLOSE-UP · COTYLEDON FOCUS". Quote: "Breaking ground, it took seven days."
5. Stage label: "Growth". Image: macro of young rosemary leaves with rim light, dew-like texture on needle edges. Caption: "MACRO · LEAF EDGE RIM LIGHT". Quote: "Every leaf, a map of aroma."
6. Stage label: "Growth". Image: close-up of a human fingertip gently touching a tender rosemary sprig. Caption: "CLOSE-UP · FINGERTIP CONTACT". Quote: "A gentle touch, handful of fragrance."
7. Stage label: "Growth". Image: overhead photo of a woody rosemary branch with green branching needles. Caption: "OVERHEAD · BRANCHING STRUCTURE". Quote: "One year bone, two years flesh."
8. Stage label: "Flourishing". Image: medium shot of a rosemary plant in a terracotta pot with small purple-blue flowers and a bee approaching or hovering near the blooms. Caption: "MEDIUM SHOT · BEE ENTRANCE". Quote: "When flowers open, the whole garden arrives."
9. Stage label: "Flourishing". Image: wide shot of rosemary on a rustic wooden surface in golden sunlight, strong leaf shadows across the boards. Caption: "WIDE · LIGHT & SHADOW CONTRAST". Quote: "Dialogue of light and leaf, repeated daily."
10. Stage label: "Flourishing". Image: close-up of pruning shears cutting a rosemary stem while a hand holds the sprig. Caption: "CLOSE-UP · SCISSORS & STEM". Quote: "Pruning is not an end, it's another beginning."
11. Stage label: "Harvesting". Image: medium shot of a bundled rosemary bunch hanging upside down in a rustic shed or wooden room to dry. Caption: "MEDIUM SHOT · HANGING DRY". Quote: "Drying time, leave it to the wind."
12. Stage label: "Harvesting". Image: wide still-life composition with dried rosemary spilling from a small linen drawstring pouch beside a terracotta pot. Caption: "WIDE · STILL LIFE COMPOSITION". Quote: "Aroma sealed, awaiting the next awakening."

Visual style: Photorealistic macro garden photography mixed with hand-crafted editorial scrapbook design, shallow depth of field, soft natural window light, earthy terracotta browns, rosemary greens, muted purple blossoms, warm sunlight, gentle film grain, slightly imperfect handwritten annotations.

Constraints: Keep the grid aligned and readable, use exactly 12 panels and no extra panels, avoid modern UI elements, avoid watermarks, avoid logos, preserve the vintage botanical journal feeling. Make all visible text legible and in English.
title: Vintage Rosemary Chronicle Grid
description: A structured prompt for generating a square vintage botanical contact sheet that chronicles rosemary growth through 12 labeled photographic stages.

Constraints: Use exactly 6 illustrated panels total, exactly 2 model labels, and exactly 1 centered Japanese caption line. Do not add extra UI, logos, watermarks, or additional text. Keep the composition readable as a side-by-side model comparison sheet.

content:
Goal: Create a dramatic Japanese baseball prospect ranking infographic in the style of a professional MLB prospect list, titled {argument name="main title" default="NPB PROSPECT RANKING TOP 30"}, with a large featured player on the right and a ranked list on the left.

Canvas: Square 1:1 sports graphic, dark navy stadium-at-night background with bright floodlights, blue smoke, subtle sparks, high contrast lighting, glossy broadcast-graphics finish. Use bold condensed athletic typography, metallic white and red accents, thin cyan divider lines, and team-logo style icons.

Header: At the top left, add a small red date ribbon reading 「2026年5月24日時点」. Below it, place the huge title with “NPB PROSPECT RANKING” in distressed white block letters and “TOP 30” underneath, with “30” in bright red. Under the title, add a Japanese subtitle: 「MLB型本卒業基準（野手130打数未満 / 投手50投球回未満）」 and a small explanatory line: 「OVR＝総合評価 / FV＝将来価値 / ETA＝一軍定着見込み / Risk＝リスク」.

Featured player: On the right half, show one dynamic male baseball pitcher in a white-and-blue Fighters-style uniform, blue cap, jersey number 11, mid-throw with one arm forward holding a baseball and the other arm extended back. Face should be intentionally blurred or softened like an anonymized sports mockup. Use dramatic rim light from the stadium lights. At the lower right, add the featured name in large Japanese type {argument name="featured player name" default="柴田獅子"}, with romanization below: {argument name="featured romanization and position" default="SHIBATA REO / RHP"}. Beneath that, create four stat tiles labeled OVR, FV, ETA, Risk with values {argument name="featured stat line" default="68, 55, 2027, 3"}.

Main ranking layout: On the left, create exactly 30 ranked entries. The first 5 entries are large horizontal cards stacked vertically, each with rank number, team-style logo, Japanese player name, position, and four stat columns OVR, FV, ETA, Risk. Rank 4 must be highlighted in red with a glowing border as the featured player.

Top 5 visible entries, exactly:
1. 前田悠伍, 投手, OVR 72, FV 60, ETA 2026, Risk 2, gold SoftBank-style logo.
2. 齋藤響介, 投手, OVR 70, FV 55+, ETA 2026, Risk 2, black-and-gold Buffaloes-style logo.
3. 立石正広, 内野手, OVR 69, FV 55, ETA 2026, Risk 2, yellow-and-black Tigers-style logo.
4. 柴田獅子, 投手, OVR 68, FV 55, ETA 2027, Risk 3, Fighters-style diamond logo, red highlighted card.
5. 有薗直輝, 三塁手, OVR 67, FV 55, ETA 2026, Risk 3, Fighters-style diamond logo.

Lower ranking table: Beneath the top 5, create a compact two-column table containing exactly ranks 6 through 30, with 25 rows total split into left column ranks 6–18 and right column ranks 19–30. Include columns: #, 選手名, 位置, OVR, FV, ETA, Risk. Use small team logo blocks at the start of each row and alternating dark blue row fills. The exact visible ranked names should be:
6 石垣元気; 7 孫易磊; 8 松下歩叶; 9 中村優斗; 10 石塚裕惺; 11 常廣羽也斗; 12 内藤鵬; 13 草加勝; 14 杉山遙希; 15 佐藤龍月; 16 横山聖哉; 17 石見颯真; 18 小田康一郎; 19 平川蓮; 20 坂井陽翔; 21 今朝丸裕喜; 22 東松快征; 23 堀柊那; 24 井坪陽生; 25 イヒネ・イツア; 26 村田怜音; 27 宮崎一樹; 28 西村瑠伊斗; 29 石代エトニー; 30 齊藤優汰. Keep stats small but believable and consistent with the top list.

Footer: Add a thin dark footer bar with a Japanese note: 「注：OVRは100点満点の独自総合評価。FVはMLB系スカウティングで使われる将来価値の目安。ETAは一軍定着見込み時期。Riskはリスク評価。」

Constraints: Use only Japanese text where specified, keep the composition dense but legible, no real league trademarks copied exactly, no watermark, no extra ranks beyond 30, and preserve the exact count of 1 featured player, 5 large ranking cards, 25 compact table rows, and 4 featured stat tiles.
title: NPB Prospect Ranking Top 30 Graphic

content:
Goal: Create an antique parchment anime character analysis chart for {argument name="character name" default="Naruto"}, styled like an ancient ninja manuscript and role anatomy poster.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 poster on aged tan paper with burnt, torn, darkened edges, ink stains, cracks, hand-drawn borders, weathered texture, and symmetrical decorative scrollwork. Use a sepia, black ink, orange flame, and blue chakra palette. The whole page should look like a detailed archival character dossier from a fantasy shinobi world.

Top header: Large bold black brush-calligraphy title centered, reading {argument name="main title" default="【鸣人】"}, with a smaller subtitle plaque underneath reading character anatomy chart in Chinese-style lettering. Add two large decorative spiral emblems near the top left and top right, surrounded by smoky cloud patterns, plus small red seal stamps. Put narrow vertical side plaques near the upper corners with Chinese-style labels.

Main layout: Divide the poster into five tall vertical manuscript columns plus a right-side detail strip, each framed with thin black hand-inked borders and bracketed Chinese-style section headers. The five main columns are: 1) expression comparison, 2) appearance outfit, 3) ability structure, 4) desire core, 5) detail magnification and evolution path.

Column 1, expression comparison: Show exactly 2 stacked character portrait panels. The upper panel is a calm front-facing bust of the anime ninja in a black-and-orange jacket with spiky blond hair and whisker cheek marks; the face area may be softly blurred or simplified. The lower panel is an intense transformed fiery fox-chakra bust, with glowing orange aura, fierce eyes, whisker marks, and flame-like energy rising around the head. Add small bracket labels beside both portraits.

Column 1 lower section, trait icons: Show exactly 6 circular trait icons arranged in a 2 by 3 grid, each in its own small bordered square with a tiny label. The six icons are: clone silhouettes, flame drop, spiral vortex, seated sage silhouette, nine-tailed fox flame, and protective core emblem.

Column 2, appearance outfit: Full-body front view of the character standing upright, occupying most of the column. He has {argument name="hair color" default="spiky blond hair"}, a black forehead headband, black-and-orange zip jacket, orange cropped shinobi pants, dark sandals, black ankle wraps, bandage wrap on one thigh, and a small pouch on one leg. Use clean anime line art but weathered ink texture. Add exactly 8 small annotation labels with leader lines pointing to outfit pieces: headband, hair, collar/zipper, jacket body, sleeve patch, pants, pouch, sandals.

Column 3, ability structure: Draw a glowing anatomical chakra diagram of the same standing body as a transparent golden outline. Show visible internal energy channels, circular chakra nodes, and a bright blue spiral core at the chest. Use exactly 7 labeled callouts pointing to energy features: crown chakra, clone technique, spiral orb, sage path, tailed beast force, sealing core, and nine-tailed power. Surround the body with smoky blue and gold energy lines.

Column 4, desire core: Create a tall dramatic illustration of an orange nine-tailed fox spirit made of fire and swirling chakra, looming from top to center. Below it, show a small dark silhouette of the hero facing the energy storm. Include exactly 5 labeled callouts: fire dream, spiral heart, unwillingness to yield, protective core, and inner beast. The column should feel the most chaotic, with dense flame curls and a large vortex near the lower center.

Right detail strip: Include two stacked subsections. The upper subsection is detail magnification with exactly 4 horizontal close-up boxes: metal forehead protector with spiral symbol, one blue eye close-up, hands holding a blue spiral energy orb, and golden chakra-flow pattern. The lower subsection is evolution path with exactly 5 stacked small portrait thumbnails connected by downward arrows: academy child, lower-rank ninja,疾风-era teen, sage mode, and nine-tail mode. Keep the thumbnails small and manuscript-like, with face areas simplified if necessary.

Bottom border decorations: Add exactly 5 bottom decorative elements: a large blue-black spiral vortex at bottom left, a rolled cylindrical scroll near the lower left-center, a central spiral medallion plaque, a kunai dagger angled beside a sealing paper tag, and a blue wave ornament at bottom right. Add a small centered bottom plaque with Chinese-style text, plus vertical plaques in the lower left and lower right corners.

Visual style: Highly detailed anime illustration mixed with ancient Chinese/Japanese scroll aesthetics, black ink outlines, brush calligraphy, faded red seals, hand-numbered chart feeling, ornate but readable compartments, grunge paper texture, subtle watercolor wash, glowing orange and blue magical energy. Use no modern UI elements, no photorealism, no clean white background, and no extra characters beyond the single character and symbolic fox spirit.
title: Ancient Ninja Character Anatomy Chart
description: Generates a dense parchment-style anime ninja character dossier with outfit, powers, traits, close-ups, and evolution panels.

content:
Automatically generate a museum-encyclopedia-style Chinese deconstruction infographic from the {argument name="theme" default="[theme]"} I provide.

Combine a realistic central visual with structural breakdown, Chinese leader-line callouts, material notes, pattern symbolism, color meaning, and a core-feature summary. From the theme alone, infer the most fitting subject, costume system, object structure, historical era, key components, materials and craftsmanship, color palette, and overall layout. No extra input required from me.

Overall aesthetic: National Museum exhibition board, historical costume encyclopedia, scholarly subject infographic. Not a poster, ancient-style portrait, e-commerce detail page, or anime illustration. Background uses paper textures, off-white, silk-paper white, or light tea-color, with a premium, restrained, collectible feel.

Fixed layout:
- Top: Chinese main title + subtitle + short intro
- Left: structural deconstruction area, Chinese leader-line annotations on key components, with partial close-ups
- Top right: materials / craft / texture area, real texture swatches with descriptions
- Middle right: pattern / color / symbolism area, main color palette, pattern samples, cultural notes
- Bottom: dressing order / assembly flowchart + summary of core features

If the theme suits a human subject, use a realistic full-body standing figure as the centerpiece. If it suits an object or single structure, switch to a central deconstruction diagram, but keep the overall infographic format intact. All text in Simplified Chinese, clear, neat, readable, no garbled glyphs, typos, English, or pinyin. Emphasize realistic structure, material contrast, cultural commentary, and an encyclopedic feel.

Avoid: poster vibe, studio-photo vibe, e-commerce vibe, anime vibe, cosplay vibe, messy annotations, wrong structure, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration.
title: Chinese Museum Deconstruction Infographic
description: Automatically generates a museum-encyclopedia-style deconstruction infographic in Chinese for any given historical or cultural theme.

content:
Goal: Create a dramatic anime-style financial loss illustration of a fantasy elf noblewoman investor panicking at her desk after a stock portfolio crash.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition, high-detail digital anime painting, cinematic lighting, dark office/trading room atmosphere, slightly cluttered foreground desk, no watermark.

Main subject: Center a young adult elf princess or queen with long flowing blonde hair, pointed ears, a gold spiked crown, white gloves, a red royal dress with ornate gold armor-like trim, a white cape, and a blue-purple gemstone pendant. She is seated behind a desk, gripping both sides of her head in despair. Cover the entire face area with a plain opaque beige square censor block, positioned centrally over the face, with no facial features visible.

Background and layout: On the left, place one large dark stock-market monitor showing Japanese loss information in red, including the headline {argument name="portfolio value label" default="持ち株評価額"}, a huge red negative value {argument name="main loss amount" default="-2,456,789円"}, and a smaller line {argument name="daily change text" default="前日比 -18.73%"}. Below it, include a red jagged downward line chart with y-axis numbers around 1,600 to 2,600 and time labels from 09:00 through 13:00, ending in a large downward red arrow.

Foreground desk items: Include exactly 8 visible paper-related elements: 1 printed loss report on the left labeled {argument name="loss report title" default="損益報告書"} with red amount “-2,456,789円”; 1 central portfolio list sheet labeled {argument name="holdings list title" default="保有銘柄一覧"} showing exactly 4 red percentage losses with downward arrows: “-15.20%”, “-21.45%”, “-17.88%”, and “-20.31%”; 1 loose paper at the front-left edge; 1 flying paper in the lower-left foreground; 1 floating document behind the desk on the left; 1 floating document on the right labeled “含み損” with a red downward zigzag arrow; and exactly 2 crumpled paper balls on the desk, one near the center-right and one near the lower-right. Also include one white teacup with gold decoration at the far right edge of the desk.

Emotional details: Add exactly 2 white spiral stress scribbles above the character’s head, one to the left and one to the right. Use scattered paper, downward red arrows, and tense body language to communicate panic, regret, and financial despair.

Visual style: Polished GPT-image-2 style anime illustration, sharp linework, rich highlights on gold ornaments, soft glowing rim light on hair, detailed fabric and armor, dark cool background contrasted with vivid red loss numbers. Keep all visible Japanese text legible and integrated into the scene.
title: Elf Queen Stock Market Loss Panic
description: A detailed anime fantasy investor scene showing an elf queen despairing over a dramatic stock portfolio loss, suitable for finance-themed satire or social posts.

content:
Goal: Create a screenshot-like collage showing a pile of unusable AI-generated fictional world map attempts on a pale gray workspace, as if viewed on an image-generation history board. The subject is not one map, but a messy contact sheet of many map thumbnails for a future fictional nation.

Canvas: Wide 16:10 landscape canvas, light gray background with a faint dotted grid pattern. Leave generous gutters between thumbnails. The entire composition should feel like a zoomed-out browser or design-board view, with some thumbnails cut off by the right edge.

Layout: Arrange exactly 35 visible map thumbnails in an irregular grid. Count them as: 8 small thumbnails across the top row, 10 large landscape thumbnails in the middle two rows, 12 smaller portrait/landscape thumbnails in the lower middle arranged in paired columns, and 5 large purple-themed thumbnails along the bottom row. Include several partially cropped thumbnails on the far right edge to imply the board continues off-screen.

Thumbnail content: Each thumbnail is a different failed variation of a futuristic world map for {argument name="fictional nation name" default="United Federation of Valoria"}. Most maps show altered Earth-like continents but not an accurate real-world map. Use dark navy or black ocean backgrounds, neon blue coastlines, cyan glowing borders, faint green landmasses, satellite-map textures, grid overlays, small HUD-like ticks, and occasional white title text. Some thumbnails should look like color tests: one bright blue-and-yellow terrain map, one simple black-outline map on white, and multiple glowing cyberpunk versions. The bottom row should use a different purple faction label, {argument name="bottom faction name" default="Empathia Union"}, with purple-highlighted landmasses around Eurasia/Australia-like shapes.

Visible labels: Repeat the title text on many thumbnails, usually centered or near the lower third, reading {argument name="main map label" default="United Federation of Valoria"}. Vary the typography and size slightly so some labels are tiny, misaligned, or awkwardly placed. Bottom-row thumbnails should instead read {argument name="purple map label" default="Empathia Union"}. A few labels may be partially illegible due to scale, cropping, or glow.

Visual style: Make it look like a collection of generated image results, not a polished infographic. Use inconsistent map compositions, inconsistent coastline shapes, different zoom levels, different title placements, and slightly mismatched aspect ratios. The dominant palette is black, deep navy, electric cyan, blue, green, and purple, with occasional white thumbnails and one or two bright terrain-map thumbnails.

Constraints: Do not create a single clean world map. Do not make the continents match the real Earth exactly. Do not add people, UI controls, large captions, watermarks, or a polished final design. Preserve the feeling of many discarded attempts scattered on a pale dotted canvas.
title: Fictional World Map Attempts Collage
description: Generates a zoomed-out contact sheet of many failed futuristic fictional world map variations for creative worldbuilding.

content:

Make it feel nostalgic, cute, and slightly messy like a personal travel diary.

Scene changes and additions: Replace the plain convenience-store snack setup with a richer Japanese convenience-store meal scene. Add exactly 7 visible food/drink items on and near the counter: 1 oden cup with large Japanese label, 1 melon bread held in the subject’s hand, 1 bottled milk tea, 1 wrapped onigiri, 1 packaged snack bag, 1 small plate with an extra melon bread, and 1 small receipt/slip. Outside the window, emphasize a rainy Shinjuku night skyline with blurred neon and Tokyo Tower-like red landmark lights.

Polaroid caption: {argument name="polaroid caption" default="Shinjuku Rainy Night"}. Memo card title: {argument name="memo title" default="MEMO"}.

content:
Goal: Create a dreamy vintage scrapbook poster for a Korean cafe drink, centered on a layered iced {argument name="drink name" default="Pistachio Rose Latte"} with a romantic pink-and-pistachio color palette, Pinterest-style cafe diary aesthetic, and handwritten annotations.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, warm window-side natural light, cozy wooden cafe table background, soft bokeh, cream paper textures, torn edges, washi tape, paper clips, pinned instant-photo frames, doodles, stickers, rose petals, pistachio crumbs, and delicate gold sparkle marks.

Main subject: Place one tall clear glass latte in the center on a beige ceramic saucer. The drink has exactly 4 visible layers from bottom to top: pale rose pink rose syrup, white fresh milk, muted pistachio-green sauce with ice cubes and condensation droplets on the glass, and fluffy pale pink rose cream foam. Top the foam with exactly 5 garnish types: a dried rosebud, crushed pistachios, dried rose petals, tiny pink crumbs, and scattered green nut dust. Add white hand-drawn arrows labeling exactly 4 drink layers: “Rose Cream (so fluffy!)”, “Pistachio Sauce”, “Fresh Milk”, and “Rose Syrup”. Add tiny handwritten text near the bottom of the glass: “stir & enjoy!♡”.

Top title collage: At upper left, make a large torn cream paper title card taped with pink patterned washi and green tape. Text on the card: “Creamy & Dreamy♡” above a large hand-lettered title “Pistachio Rose Latte”, with “Pistachio” in olive green and “Rose Latte” in dusty rose red. Beneath it, add a green brush-stroke label containing Korean text “피스타치오 로즈 라떼”. Decorate with a pink bow sticker, a small rose doodle, hearts, and sparkles. Attach a narrow pink note on the right edge with exactly 5 lines: “soft”, “sweet”, “nutty”, “floral”, “♡”, plus a round stamp reading “CAFE DIARY” and handwritten “love this!”.

Left ingredient card: Add one torn notebook-paper card on the left labeled “Ingredients”. It must list exactly 6 ingredients with tiny icons: “Pistachio Sauce”, “Rose Cream”, “Fresh Milk”, “Rose Syrup”, “Ice”, and “Dried Rose & Pistachio”.

Right recipe card: Add one small taped beige paper card on the right labeled “How to make ♡”. It must show exactly 7 numbered steps: “Add ice to the glass”, “Pour rose syrup”, “Add fresh milk”, “Add pistachio sauce”, “Top with rose cream”, “Sprinkle pistachio & dried rose”, and “Stir and enjoy”. Add a tiny pink bow doodle at the bottom.

Photo and memo elements: Include exactly 2 Polaroid-style photos: one at the upper right showing a window, pink roses in a glass vase, and a pink cup of coffee, captioned “Sunday mood ♡”; one at the lower left showing baby’s breath flowers, pink roses, and pistachios, captioned “little things make big days ♡”. Include exactly 3 small sticky-note style pieces: a pink heart tag at mid-right reading “Treat yourself Today! ☺”; a small note near lower-left center reading “it’s giving...” followed by exactly 3 bullet lines “soft girl”, “cafe vibes”, “happy” with a bear face; and a bottom-center illustrated cafe diary card with Korean text, a cute bear, a drawing of the latte, labels “my favorite color combo!”, “Pistachio”, “Rose”, and hashtags “#cafevibes  #pistachiolover  #roselatte”. Include one bottom-right “DAILY MEMO” checklist clipped with a gold binder clip, containing exactly 5 checked items: “good coffee”, “pretty flowers”, “favorite song”, “sweet treat”, “me time”, ending with “= perfect day ♡”.

Surrounding props: Add cookies on a plate at the bottom left, a gold spoon with a pink gem-like handle near the bottom center, scattered dried rose petals and pistachios, a lace doily texture under the glass, and a small bowl or cup of pistachios at the bottom right. Use soft blush, sage green, cream, warm brown, and muted gold throughout.

Visual style: Photorealistic central drink blended with hand-drawn scrapbook graphics, Korean cafe mood board, analog paper collage, watercolor doodles, textured stationery, soft film grain, warm highlights, shallow depth of field, cozy and healing atmosphere.

Constraints: Keep all text legible and hand-lettered, preserve the exact counted cards, lists, labels, Polaroids, and sticky notes, avoid modern UI elements, avoid extra drink glasses, no watermark.
title: Pistachio Rose Latte Scrapbook Poster

content:
Goal: Create a vertical comparison image showing an anime cafe illustration process, with two wide panels stacked on a dark charcoal background. The upper panel is a before/partial generation view: the left half remains a rough block-in sketch while the right half is a polished anime-style cafe scene. The lower panel is the completed polished illustration.

Canvas: Portrait 4:5 image with a thick dark charcoal margin around the artwork. Inside, place exactly 2 horizontal rectangular panels, one above the other, aligned vertically with a thin gap between them.

Layout: Upper panel: split visually down the middle. The left side should look unfinished, like a rough paint-over or masked area: dark black cafe wall, loose brown sketch lines for wall frames, two rough brown chair/table shapes, flat gray floor, and a broad pale sunlight patch. The right side should be fully rendered: a blonde anime girl leaning toward a tall strawberry parfait at a round cafe table. Lower panel: the same cafe setting fully rendered, now including exactly 2 anime girls seated across the table with the dessert centered between them.

Subject details: Main character is {argument name="main character" default="a cheerful blonde anime schoolgirl"}, shown on the right side in both panels. She has long flowing blonde hair, one messy side bun, loose curled strands, a light blue oversized button-up shirt, a yellow cardigan tied around her waist, and a dark plaid skirt. Her hands are clenched excitedly near her chest as she leans toward the dessert. Her face is intentionally obscured by a plain beige square censor block in both panels; do not draw facial features inside the square. Secondary character appears only in the lower panel: {argument name="second character" default="a pink-haired anime schoolgirl with green eyes"}, seated on the left, wearing a navy school blazer with white trim, a white shirt, and a large red bow. She has twin braids, soft pink hair, a small crescent moon hair clip, and a calm shy expression.

Counted visible elements: exactly 2 stacked panels; exactly 2 finished anime girls in the lower panel; exactly 1 finished anime girl in the upper panel; exactly 2 beige square face blocks, one per panel on the blonde girl; exactly 2 tall strawberry parfait glasses, one in each panel; exactly 4 small white plates total, with 1 in the upper panel and 3 in the lower panel; exactly 3 visible pieces of cutlery total, one near the upper plate and two on lower plates; exactly 3 black menu boards on the lower panel wall labeled Coffee, Dessert, and Drink; exactly 1 round chalkboard sign reading “Cafe Coffee” behind the blonde girl.

Cafe environment: Warm sunlit cafe interior with dark charcoal walls, wooden chairs, small round wooden tables, large window light entering from the right, soft diagonal sunbeams across the floor and tabletop, and chalkboard menu boards in the background. The dessert is {argument name="dessert" default="a tall strawberry parfait with whipped cream, strawberries, wafers, kiwi slices, red syrup layers, and vanilla cream"}, placed in a clear glass in the center foreground.

Visual style: Polished modern Japanese anime illustration, clean linework, glossy eyes for the pink-haired girl, soft painterly shading, warm daylight, high detail on hair and dessert, cozy cafe atmosphere. The top-left rough area should deliberately contrast with the finished art: blurry, flat, sketchy, dark, and incomplete.

Text content: Use small readable English chalkboard text where visible: “Coffee”, “Dessert”, “Drink”, and “Cafe Coffee”. Other menu items may be tiny decorative scribbles.

Constraints: Keep the two-panel comparison composition. Do not add extra characters, extra desserts, captions, logos, watermarks, or comic speech bubbles. Preserve the beige facial censor blocks on the blonde character.
title: Anime Cafe Two-Panel Comparison
description: Generates a two-panel anime cafe process comparison with a rough sketch section above and a finished schoolgirl dessert scene below.

Goal: Create a cute Japanese “animal character donut diagnosis” infographic poster for {argument name="diagnosis animal" default="wolf"}, in a pastel kawaii dessert style, as if generated from text only.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, soft pink bakery/café background with pearls, lace, sparkles, tiny hearts, stars, flowers, ribbons, and glossy confectionery decorations. Use a warm cream-and-pink palette with lavender, sky blue, mint, and gold accents. Everything should feel magical, sweet, and highly decorative.

Main headline area: At the top, large rounded bubble-letter Japanese title text reading 「どうぶつキャラドーナツ診断」 in pink with white outline and drop shadow. Under it, smaller text 「あなたには」, then very large golden-orange outlined text 「オオカミ」, followed by 「の気配が漂っています」. Add tiny paw prints, stars, flower stickers, and pastel ribbon ornaments around the title.

Right-side main visual: Place a circular ornate gold-framed portrait on the upper right, decorated with small cream flowers and pink ribbons. Inside the frame is a stylish handsome anime man, shown from chest up, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and tie, with dramatic wavy black hair illuminated by neon magenta and electric blue highlights against a dark starry background. Cover the center of his face with a vertical soft-edged rectangular blur block in muted mauve, as if anonymized.

Bottom-right dessert subject: In front of the portrait, place one large realistic-cute animal donut on a decorative plate. The donut is shaped like a gray wolf/cat face: round purple-gray icing, two pointed ears, glossy black eyes, small pink cheeks, white muzzle, tiny black nose and smiling mouth, white icing whisker lines, and a fluffy tail-like crescent piece on the lower right. Decorate the donut with exactly 3 clusters of blueberry-like dark blue berries and tiny purple sugar flowers, plus pearl sprinkles and white icing drizzles. Add a small round cookie tag on the plate reading “You are Special.”

Left column: Create exactly 5 stacked rounded information cards, each with a translucent glossy border, pastel gradient fill, small icon, and Japanese text. The five cards are:
1. Pink card with donut icon, heading 「理由は」, body text 「鋭さとやさしさが同居する雰囲気、静かだけど芯が強くて少し近寄りがたい存在感が強いからです(｡•ᴗ•｡)」.
2. Purple card with crescent moon icon, heading 「オオカミの特徴」, exactly 4 bullet points: 「判断が早い」, 「仲間思い」, 「ミステリアス」, 「一度決めたらぶれにくい」.
3. Light blue card with sun icon, heading 「相性が良い動物」, exactly 2 illustrated animal icons and 2 bullet items: fox icon with 「キツネ：機転がきいて会話のテンポが合う」, cat icon with 「ネコ：距離感が心地よく、自然体でいられる」.
4. Mint green card with clover icon, heading 「運勢」, body text 「今は魅力が静かに伝わる好調期。信頼が積み上がり、じわじわ注目が集まります(≧▽≦)」.
5. Pink card with donut icon and blueberry icon, heading 「オオカミドーナツについて」, body text 「ビターなコーティングにホワイトチョコのライン、ブルーベリーのきらめきで凛とした甘さを表現。香ばしい生地と上品な仕上げで食べやすく、特別感のある一品です(๑•᎑•๑)」.

Visual style: Hyper-detailed kawaii Japanese social-media diagnostic card, glossy stickers, soft glow, pastel gradients, rounded typography, edible 3D donut realism mixed with anime illustration. Keep the composition dense but readable, with the left cards aligned neatly and the portrait/donut dominating the right side.

Constraints: Use exactly 5 information cards, exactly 4 bullets in the traits card, exactly 2 animals in the compatibility card, and one main animal donut. Preserve the Japanese text exactly as written. No extra logos or watermarks.

content:
Goal: Create a printable paint-by-numbers worksheet featuring a stylized peacock, designed for children or beginners.

Canvas: A4 portrait page at 300 DPI, clean white background, black line art only in the main worksheet area, with a thin rectangular border around the drawing. Leave a bottom instruction and color legend band below the bordered artwork.

Main artwork: Center a simple front-facing peacock with a large semicircular fan tail. Use bold, smooth black outlines and large enclosed regions for coloring. The peacock has a rounded body, two slim legs, small feet on a horizontal ground line, a narrow neck, a pointed beak, round side face patches, a small crest, and two folded wing shapes along the body. Behind it, create a fan tail divided into exactly 7 large radial feather panels, labeled left to right with numbers 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, and 12. Add exactly 7 smaller polygonal feather-eye shapes inside the fan, one per panel, also labeled 6 through 12. Put additional labels on the bird: body and lower wings use 2, right wing uses 3, face uses 4, crest uses 5. Fill the plain background areas inside the border with the number 1 in four places: upper left, upper right, lower left, and lower right.

Numbering and regions: Use exactly 12 paint colors, represented only by black numeric labels inside the enclosed regions. Keep all numbers large, centered, and easy to read. Avoid shading, texture, gradients, or filled color in the drawing area.

Bottom text: Below the drawing border, add a bold heading reading “Instructions”, followed by the sentence “Paint the areas with the matching colors.”

Color legend: At the very bottom, create exactly 12 square color swatches in one horizontal row, each with a white or black number centered on the swatch and a two-line color name underneath. The swatches are: 1 Prussian Blue, 2 Golden Ochre, 3 Teal Green, 4 Coral Red, 5 Lime Green, 6 Violet Purple, 7 Magenta Pink, 8 Sapphire Blue, 9 Sun Yellow, 10 Forest Green, 11 Cyan Blue, 12 Orchid Purple.

Style constraints: Crisp vector-like worksheet, high-contrast black outlines, no grayscale fills in the drawing, no extra decorations, no watermark, keep the layout print-ready and easy to color.

content:
Goal: Create a printable paint-by-numbers worksheet showing a cartoon living room scene with a child-like character standing in the center, designed as clean black-and-white line art with numbered regions and a color legend.

Canvas: A4 portrait page at 300 DPI, white background, thin black outer border, crisp vector-like outlines, no shading except the tiny color swatches in the legend. The main illustration fills the upper roughly 70% of the page, and the instruction/color-key panel fills the bottom roughly 30%.

Main illustration layout: Draw a cozy living room in simple rounded cartoon style. Center: one standing cartoon character with large round eyes, small dot nose, worried wavy mouth, hood or helmet-like hair/head covering, short-sleeve shirt, slim arms, long pants, and bare feet. Left: one sofa with two seat/back cushions, one armrest visible on each side, and one small throw pillow. Above the sofa: one framed wall picture containing a small landscape with hills, sky, and one tree. Right of the character: one side table with a lamp on top and one drawer; behind/right is one tall potted plant with exactly 10 visible leaves. Far right: one camera on a tripod aimed at the character, with a screen/body, lens/buttons, and exactly three tripod legs. Background includes a wall, a large window on the right with vertical panes, a floor with wood plank lines, and a large rectangular rug in the foreground.

Numbered paint areas: Place black numbers inside the line-art regions throughout the scene, using numbers 1 through 14. Use many repeated numbers on matching surfaces. Keep the numbers legible and centered in their shapes. Match the apparent assignments: 1 for beige wall areas, 2 for light gray head/hood areas, 3 for yellow skin/limbs, 4 for black camera/tripod details, 5 for white shirt and camera screen, 6 for blue sofa, 7 for tan pillow, 8 for brown picture frame, 9 for sky blue window/picture sky, 10 for green plant/tree leaves, 11 for cream lamp/rug interior, 12 for teal rug border, 13 for wood-brown floor/table/plank areas, and 14 for beige plant pot.

Bottom instruction panel: Add a horizontal divider line above the legend. Center a bold title reading {argument name="instruction title" default="Instructions"}. Under it, add smaller text reading {argument name="instruction subtitle" default="Paint the areas with the matching colors."}. Below, arrange exactly 14 color legend entries in three neat columns. Each entry has a number, a small filled color square, and an English color label. The 14 entries must be: 1 Beige, 2 Light Gray, 3 Yellow, 4 Black, 5 White, 6 Blue, 7 Tan, 8 Brown, 9 Sky Blue, 10 Green, 11 Cream, 12 Teal, 13 Wood Brown, 14 Beige (Pot).

Style constraints: Make it look like a polished printable worksheet for children, with smooth uniform black outlines, rounded friendly shapes, lots of enclosed regions suitable for coloring, no gradients, no realistic textures, no extra text, no watermark. Subject can be customized as {argument name="central character" default="a worried cartoon child-like figure"}, setting as {argument name="room setting" default="cozy living room"}, and palette as {argument name="color palette" default="14-color paint-by-numbers palette"}.

Goal: Create a detailed Japanese-style illustrated reference sheet infographic titled {argument name="headline text" default="雨の日シチュの用語表"}, explaining useful rainy-day scene vocabulary for AI illustration prompts.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 poster, aged cream watercolor paper with ink stains, tape, paperclips, torn memo scraps, tiny stars, raindrop doodles, umbrella doodles, and purple hydrangea decorations in the corners. Use a handmade scrapbook notebook aesthetic with thin navy divider lines and slightly worn edges.

Overall visual style: Soft anime watercolor and ink wash, melancholic rainy atmosphere, muted navy, gray, lavender, and beige palette. The recurring subject is {argument name="main character" default="a black-haired anime girl in a dark raincoat"}, usually wet from rain, carrying or standing under {argument name="umbrella color" default="a transparent or black umbrella"}. Add reflective wet streets, mist, puddles, raindrops on glass, and blurred city lights. Keep the text dense but neatly organized like a prompt-writing cheat sheet.

Header: Large centered brush-calligraphy Japanese headline using the headline text. Under it, add a smaller Japanese subtitle line explaining that the sheet organizes rain, rainy season, puddles, and road-reflection words for AI illustration prompt support. Place a large decorative character portrait at the upper left with hydrangeas; the face area is covered by a soft square blur, matching the generated look. At the upper right, add small taped memo papers and a decorative umbrella sketch.

Main layout: A grid of exactly 24 numbered vocabulary cards, arranged 4 columns by 6 rows. Each card has a dark blue circular number badge, a bold Japanese term title, two or three short Japanese explanatory text lines, and a small anime rainy-scene thumbnail. Use thin navy borders and off-white card backgrounds. Count and label the 24 cards as follows, with these visible concepts: 1 umbrella, 2 shared umbrella, 3 transparent umbrella, 4 wet hair, 5 wet school uniform, 6 rain lodging or taking shelter from rain, 7 under the eaves, 8 bus stop, 9 rain in front of the station, 10 sudden shower, 11 rain inside a train car, 12 window glass, 13 puddle, 14 road surface reflection, 15 raindrops, 16 misty rain, 17 muddy ground, 18 cloudy sky, 19 gray sky, 20 after the rain, 21 night rain, 22 neon reflections, 23 rainy-season humidity, 24 rainy-day aftermath.

Thumbnail details: Vary every card image while keeping the same rainy anime mood. Include close-up portraits, walking scenes, umbrellas, wet clothes, bus stop, station crowd, train window, puddle reflection, neon city street, hydrangea after rain, and rainy room or alley aftermath. Cards 10 and 11 should include soft gray square blurs over part of the character face area, echoing the original censored-looking artifacts.

Bottom section: Add a wide bordered note panel titled in Japanese as a usage guide, with exactly 5 bullet points in small Japanese text explaining how to use the vocabulary list for AI illustration prompts. Decorate the bottom with washi tape, a fountain pen ink bottle, scattered clips, handwritten memo scraps, small flowers, and tiny rain icons.

Constraints: The final image must feel like an information-dense printable reference sheet, not a single illustration. Use exactly 24 numbered cards and exactly 5 bottom bullet points. Keep the Japanese calligraphy headline prominent, maintain legible grid structure, and avoid adding logos or watermarks.

She has long, loose {argument name="hair color" default="black hair"} framing her face, a smooth forehead, natural dark eyebrows, almond-shaped dark eyes looking directly into the camera, a small straight nose, softly closed lips, and a calm neutral expression. The face fills most of each panel, cropped near the top of the forehead and around the chin, with hair extending to both sides. The two portraits should look very similar but not identical: slightly different eye shape, cheek fullness, nose bridge, mouth shape, and face proportions.

The annotations should include: • Labels for every key component • Exploded-view or cutaway outlines revealing internals • Dimensions, measurements, and scale indicators • Material callouts with quantities • Directional arrows showing function, force, or flow (airflow, sound, current, pressure) • Small schematic or cross-section diagrams where they help. content:
Goal: Create a realistic screenshot-style image of a ChatGPT image generation interface demonstrating multiple image outputs from one request.

Canvas: Landscape 16:9 screenshot crop, white background, resembling a mobile or narrow desktop chat interface. Keep the composition slightly zoomed in so the right edge of the image carousel is visible.

Layout: At the top right, place one rounded light-gray user message bubble containing Japanese text. Beneath it on the left, show the status line “Thought for 2m 7s ›” in light gray. Below that, show one large generated image preview with rounded corners, and a narrow strip of additional generated thumbnails on the right side.

Text content: The user bubble should read: “絵コンテを参考に今回のベた塗アニメMVで使用する背景イラストを被写体なしで10個作成してください。\nテイスト強めで汚らしっぷつぷ感はなくしてください。プロアニメーターとして画質はよくしてほしいです。\n16:9　n=10”. Highlight the “n=10” part as the key detail.

Generated image preview: The main preview is a pastel anime background illustration of an empty stylized street with no characters, inspired by a colorful East Asian shopping district. Use soft cel-shaded anime line art, bright pastel blue, pink, yellow, and mint tones, lanterns hanging from buildings, decorative circular signs, shopfronts on both sides, a centered vanishing point, and a decorative archway in the distance. The image should look like a professional anime MV background, 16:9, clean and polished.

Discrete visible elements to include: exactly 1 user message bubble; exactly 1 status line; exactly 1 large main generated image; exactly 3 narrow vertical thumbnails partially visible on the right, each showing a different pastel anime background; exactly 2 circular overlay buttons on the main preview, one dark “編集” edit button at bottom left and one white downward arrow download button near bottom right; exactly 1 small dark share/upload icon button at the lower-right corner of the main preview.

Annotation: Add thick hand-drawn yellow marker annotations over the screenshot: exactly 1 yellow circle around “n=10”, exactly 1 thick yellow arrow pointing from the circled “n=10” down toward the right-side thumbnail strip, and exactly 1 tall yellow bracket-like outline encircling the vertical thumbnail strip. The yellow marker should look casual and drawn by hand.

Style: Clean UI screenshot aesthetic with subtle antialiasing, light gray interface elements, Japanese text rendered legibly, and bright yellow annotation marks. Use {argument name="main annotation text" default="n=10"} as the highlighted parameter in the chat message. Keep the screenshot realistic, not a poster or infographic.

content: (researched {argument name="dataset type" default="geopolitical or global dataset"} × {argument name="map style" default="elegant folded-paper cartography"}) + (origami sculpture ^ editorial information design ^ soft tactile shading) - (flat boring map + fake country data + corporate dashboard aesthetic) = viral folded-world infographic  INPUT: {argument name="topic" default="Countries with the fastest internet speeds"}   SYSTEM: Research the input topic and create a premium infographic built around a stylized world or regional map made from layered origami paper forms.  RESEARCH REQUIREMENTS: - Research the correct ranking or comparison data for the topic. - Verify country names, numerical values, and year/date. - Use authoritative international or official sources where possible. - Do not invent values, ranks, or map classifications. - Keep metric definitions consistent across all countries.  VISUAL CONCEPT: Turn the data into an elegant folded-paper map or collection of origami country tiles. Use folds, shadows, tabs, and layered paper shapes to encode hierarchy, rank, or magnitude.  STYLE: origami editorial infographic, layered paper map, tactile folds, premium magazine design, quiet luxury information art  COMPOSITION: - strong title at top - world map or region map as the main visual - top countries highlighted with larger folded structures - small callout cards with:   country name   value   rank   year - subtle legend if needed - use visual hierarchy through size, folds, and elevation - minimal but readable labels  MATERIALS: matte paper, embossed card, soft deckled edges, cream and muted color palette, subtle drop shadows  OUTPUT: Research the topic, verify the dataset, then generate a polished origami-style global infographic that feels tactile, elegant, and highly shareable.

content: [Style] High-quality realistic photography. Theme: "Traditional Costume Fashion Collage of Ten Countries". Magazine/social media-grade visuals for people/characters. Natural textures, cinematic tones, modern and elegant commercial photography. Avoid AI synthetic feel. [Composition] 16:9 wide aspect ratio. Fashion collage configuration of 2 rows x 5 columns. Arrangement where all ten figures look like the same person in different outfits. Do not cut off important parts of the face, hands, hairstyle, headpiece, or costume. Background is clean with negative space, slightly emphasizing the central figure. [Subject] A fictional Japanese woman around 20 years old. Maintain the same facial features, eyes, nose, lips, contour, skin tone, and body type. Change only the costume, hairstyle, hair accessories, makeup, and pose for each country. Expressed not as ten different people, but as ten transformations of one woman. [Costumes/Hairstyles/Makeup/Actions/Labels] Japan: Kimono, low bun, kanzashi, transparent white skin makeup, red lips. Lightly holding the sleeve, looking back slightly. Label "日本". China: Hanfu or Qipao style, elegant bun, hair accessories, thin eyeliner, soft rouge. Holding a round fan or adjusting the collar. Label "中国". Korea: Hanbok, low bun with center part, natural glass skin, pale pink lips. Standing with hands lightly overlapping. Label "韓国". India: Sari, side part or low bun, bindi, earrings, warm eye makeup and gold highlights. Lightly holding the edge of the sari. Label "インド". Vietnam: Ao Dai, long straight hair or half-up, natural and clean makeup. Holding a non la or looking slightly to the side. Label "ベトナム". Thailand: Traditional Thai ceremonial dress, high bun, gold hair ornaments, elegant gold-brown makeup. Gracefully pressing palms together (wai). Label "タイ". Mongolia: Deel, long braids or twin braids, traditional hat or forehead ornaments, healthy natural makeup. Lightly holding the sash or shawl. Label "モンゴル". Morocco: Kaftan, wavy long hair or low bun, metal decorations, subtle smoky eyes. Lightly touching the embroidery on the sleeve. Label "モロッコ". Mexico: Traditional embroidered dress, braided hair or low bun, floral hair ornaments, vivid but elegant lips. Lightly holding the skirt to show the embroidery. Label "メキシコ". Scotland: Tartan traditional costume or shawl, natural wavy hair or half-up, soft natural makeup. Lightly holding the tartan cloth. Label "スコットランド". [Scene] High-end photo studio based on light gray and cream white. Create depth with translucent glass, acrylic layers, low display stands, and soft shadows. Place small, readable Japanese labels near each person. No English, logos, watermarks, or meaningless symbols. [Lighting] Soft natural light from the front left. Weak rim light on the right side. Cinematic ambient light. Avoid blown-out highlights and preserve shadow detail. Unified color temperature and color grading. [Details] High-definition representation of fabric weave, embroidery, silk luster, cotton and linen texture, metal accessories, hair, skin texture, makeup, and clothing wrinkles. Label text is clear and readable. [Quality Keywords] High definition, realistic texture, clear subject, stable composition, unified colors, professional post-processing, clean outlines, natural body proportions, magazine cover level. [Avoid] Faces that look like different people, age changes, cultural confusion, excessive makeup, low resolution, distorted hands, too many limbs, facial collapse, incorrect perspective, plastic skin, excessive skin smoothing, garbled characters, English characters, long text, watermarks, logos, brand displays, meaningless symbols, incorrect national flags, rough synthesis, crowded composition.

content:
Goal: Create a landscape hand-drawn notebook-style Chinese infographic explaining how to register multiple ChatGPT accounts by using Cloudflare Email Routing to create catch-all mailbox aliases.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 whiteboard page, clean off-white background, surrounded by a thick black dashed rounded border. Use a casual marker-and-pen sketch style with slightly imperfect lines, doodle arrows, stars, question marks, pins, and small expressive icons.

Title and intro: At the top center, write the bold headline {argument name="headline text" default="注册 ChatGPT 第 N 个账号：用 Cloudflare 造邮箱（手绘笔记）"}. Underline “Cloudflare” in blue. Beneath it on the left, write the pain point line: “痛点：同个邮箱只能注册一个账号，换邮箱麻烦。” Add a small curved arrow doodle and star near the title.

Main layout: Use exactly 7 main content boxes/cards plus decorative doodles. Arrange them left-to-right as a process with bold black arrows connecting sections. The 7 cards are: 1 pain card, 1 solution card, 1 core-principle card, and 4 numbered step cards.

Card 1, pain card: A red outlined sticky-note box on the upper left with a sad red face icon. Text: “想注册新号？没新邮箱！” Make it look like a folded-corner note.

Card 2, solution card: A blue rounded rectangle in the upper middle with a blue cloud icon. Text: “解决方案：Cloudflare Email Routing（邮箱路由）”. Put a blue arrow pointing toward the core principle box.

Card 3, core principle card: A large black-outlined rounded rectangle in the upper right. Header text: “核心原理：Catch-all（通配符 / 捕获所有）”. Include a funnel icon. Show exactly 4 example incoming aliases on the left: “chatgpt@”, “netflix@”, “test1@”, and “任意前缀@”. Draw arrows from all four into a large “@” symbol and “@你的域名.com”, then a thick black arrow to a mailbox icon labeled “真实邮箱（如 Gmail）”. Bottom line with green check icon: “全部自动转发，统一汇总！无需提前创建。”

Step cards along the bottom: Use exactly 4 numbered boxes.

Step 1 card, bottom left: Title “第一步：准备工作”. Include exactly 3 numbered requirements: “1. Cloudflare 账号（免费注册）”, “2. 你的域名（DNS 托管在 CF）”, “3. 真实邮箱（接收转发）”. Add a globe icon, a green check mark, and a yellow key icon. Below it add small text: “域名推荐：性价比高（如 top域名）”.

Step 2 card, bottom center-left: Title “第二步：启用并验证目标邮箱”. Include a small computer icon labeled “CF 控制台”. Text flow: “添加域名 → 解析 → 激活”. Draw an arrow down to a mini DNS nameserver panel with two columns: left “阿里云（修改 NS）”, right “Cloudflare（等待生效，状态：活动）”. Beneath the card, draw a red circled nameserver list with exactly 2 entries: “gene.ns.cloudflare.com” and “peyton.ns.cloudflare.com”. Add a small clock icon and text “约30分钟”.

Step 3 card, bottom center-right: Title “第三步：设置邮件路由”. Show a mini Cloudflare UI mockup with exactly 2 top tabs/boxes: “Email（电子邮件）” and “Email Routing（路由）”. Include a small “Get Started” button pointing to “绑定目标地址（Destination address）”. At the bottom add an envelope icon and text: “验证邮件 → 点击确认”. Under this card place a small blue status note titled “测试转发成功” with two arrow lines showing an alias forwarding to a Gmail address.

Step 4 card, bottom right: Title “第四步：设置路由规则（核心步骤）”. Show a UI panel titled “Catch-all 规则设置”. Include a blue toggle switch labeled “Active（启用）”. Include a two-row table with headers and values: row 1 “Action（操作）” to “Send to（发送至）”; row 2 “Destination（目标）” to “你的真实邮箱”. Add a red star near the corner.

Final result box: At the bottom right below Step 4, add a green rounded rectangle with a smiling face icon. Text: “效果：注册时随意编造前缀（例如 chatgpt@yourdomain.com）邮件全部统一汇总到真实邮箱，实现「邮箱自由」！全程免费！”

Visual style: Handwritten Chinese typography, thick black marker outlines, simple vector doodles, blue/red/green/yellow accent colors, informal classroom note-taking feel. Keep all arrows bold and directional, with minor sketchy imperfections.

Constraints: Keep the entire infographic in Chinese as specified, use no photorealism, no 3D rendering, no watermark, no extra sections beyond the 7 cards and final result box, and make the text legible.
title: Cloudflare Catch-All Email Routing Infographic
description: A hand-drawn Chinese whiteboard infographic explaining Cloudflare Email Routing catch-all setup for creating flexible ChatGPT signup email aliases.

Layout:
- Panel 1, top half: snowy alpine landscape with a modern dark wooden A-frame cabin on a hill, evergreen trees, pastel winter sky, and one small hiker walking toward the cabin along a trail of footprints. Add a large label in the upper-left reading {argument name="top label" default="Banana pro"}.
- Panel 2, bottom half: a very similar snowy alpine cabin scene from a slightly lower and closer perspective, with warmer sunset colors, denser foreground trees, one small hiker on a snowy path, and a large label in the upper-left reading {argument name="bottom label" default="GPT image 2"}.

Counted visible elements:
- Exactly 2 stacked comparison panels.
- Exactly 2 large text labels: “Banana pro” on the top panel and “GPT image 2” on the bottom panel.
- Exactly 2 modern cabins, one per panel.
- Exactly 2 human figures, one per panel, both small and walking away from the viewer.
- Each panel should include many snow-covered evergreen trees, but keep the composition focused on the cabin and path.

Scene details: Both panels depict a winter evening in a snowy conifer forest. The cabin is contemporary, tall, angular, and steep-roofed, with dark vertical wood siding, warm glowing rectangular windows, a concrete or stone lower level, and a roof with dark solar-panel-like sections or skylights. The snow should show soft wind-shaped drifts and a clear trail of footprints leading from the foreground toward the hiker and cabin. The sky should be soft lavender, pink, and pale blue, suggesting dusk.

Typography: Use a large decorative blocky condensed serif or western-style display font, white fill with dark outline and subtle internal striping. Place the text flush near the top-left of each panel, large enough to dominate the corner without covering the cabin.

Visual style: Photorealistic architectural visualization, crisp winter detail, high dynamic range, warm window light contrasting with cold snow, cinematic dusk lighting. The top panel should feel slightly cleaner and more minimal with a pale lavender sky; the bottom panel should feel more dramatic and polished with stronger pink sunset clouds and richer contrast.

Constraints: Do not add logos, watermarks, extra captions, UI frames, or additional people. Keep the two-panel comparison structure obvious and preserve the exact label wording unless customized.
title: Two-Panel Snow Cabin Model Comparison
description: Generates a stacked comparison poster of two AI model outputs showing snowy modern cabins with bold model labels.

content:
Goal: Create a vertical side-by-side comparison poster showing the same photorealistic architectural scene generated by two AI image models.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 composition, approximately 768×1024 px, split horizontally into exactly 2 equal stacked panels with no visible border between them.

Layout: The top panel is labeled {argument name="top label" default="Banana pro"} in the upper-left corner. The bottom panel is labeled {argument name="bottom label" default="GPT image 2"} in the upper-left corner. Use very large white blocky stencil-style display lettering with a thin dark outline and subtle vertical stripe/engraved texture inside the letters. Text should sit over the sky and tree area, aligned left, with generous spacing.

Scene in both panels: A serene photorealistic modern luxury house in a forest clearing beside a calm pond. The house is a low, minimalist rectilinear villa with white and light concrete volumes, flat roofs, broad glass windows, and warm wood-toned interior accents. It has a one-story left wing with a covered terrace and slim posts, a central solid rectangular tower-like volume, and a two-story right wing with large windows. The building sits across the water in the midground, centered horizontally, surrounded by green grass, reeds, and dense woodland.

Top panel details: The house appears smaller and farther away, with more open pale blue sky visible above it. The pond fills the lower third with a clear reflection of the house and trees. Forest trees frame the left and right edges, including leafy branches hanging from the top corners. Lighting is soft daylight, calm and slightly airy.

Bottom panel details: The same house and pond are shown closer and larger, with stronger contrast and richer greenery. Tall tree trunks frame both sides, dense forest spans the background, and the water occupies the lower portion with ripples and reflections. The lighting is bright but natural, with a more polished architectural visualization look.

Visual style: High-end photorealistic architectural rendering, realistic reflections, natural daylight, crisp modern design, lush summer forest, calm water, no people, no vehicles, no extra logos or UI elements.

Constraints: Include exactly 2 stacked panels and exactly 2 visible text labels. Keep the text readable and spelled exactly as provided. Preserve the comparison-poster look while making both panels depict the same {argument name="architecture subject" default="modern white concrete villa by a forest pond"}.
title: AI Model Architecture Comparison Poster
description: Creates a two-panel photorealistic comparison poster of a modern forest villa scene with large model-name labels.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic interior wall signage mockup with measurement annotations for a reception/office entrance, showing recommended dimensions and spacing for a company sign.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, photorealistic architectural visualization, front-facing view with slight natural perspective. Use a warm modern palette: light beige wall panels, pale wood cabinet, black signage, black metal door grille, and wood slat ceiling.

Scene layout: Center the composition on a beige feature wall with a mounted sign. On the right, include a tall black vertical-slat door or gate occupying about one quarter of the image width. At the top right of the wall, add one small white CCTV security camera angled downward. At the top center, add one rectangular wall-mounted light fixture with a single warm downlight. At the bottom center, place one light-wood cabinet with two doors and exactly two round black knobs. Across the lower wall behind the sign, include a horizontal band of narrow vertical rectangular tiles. The ceiling at the very top should show warm brown wooden slats running diagonally.

Main sign content: Use raised matte-black 3D letters on the wall. The largest line reads {argument name="company logo text" default="Ryplix"}. Directly underneath, centered smaller text reads {argument name="company legal text" default="Infotech Pvt. Ltd."}. Below that, centered, display a large number {argument name="unit number" default="1210"}, with one thin horizontal line above it and one thin horizontal line below it. Keep all sign elements black with soft realistic shadows.

Measurement annotations: Add fine black dimension arrows, dashed guide lines, and small technical labels around the sign. Include exactly 10 visible measurement labels in the main wall area: “3.5 - 4 in” from the bottom of the light to the logo, “7 - 7.5 in” beside the logo height, “1.5 in” between the logo and legal text, “2.5 - 3 in” between legal text and the number, “4 - 4.5 in” beside the number height, “4 - 5 in” from the number to the cabinet-top tile area, “34 in” as a long horizontal width guide above the cabinet, plus two side gap labels “5 - 6 in” on the left and “5 - 6 in” on the right.

Left information panels: Add exactly three rounded white cards stacked vertically along the left side of the image. Card 1 title: “SIGNAGE SIZE (RECOMMENDED)”. It contains exactly three item groups separated by thin horizontal rules: “Ryplix” with “Width: 19-20 in” and “Height: 7-7.5 in”; “Infotech Pvt. Ltd.” with “Width: 14 in” and “Height: 1.75 in”; “1210” with “Width: 8.5-9 in” and “Height: 4-4.5 in”; then “Lines (Both)” with “Width: 10-11 in” and “Thickness: 6 mm”. Card 2 title: “SPACING (RECOMMENDED)”. It contains exactly four item groups separated by thin rules: “Light bottom to logo top” with “3.5 - 4 in”; “Logo to Infotech text” with “1.5 in”; “Infotech text to 1210” with “2.5 - 3 in”; “1210 to bottom (cabinet top)” with “4 - 5 in”. Card 3 is a small note card reading: “Note: All dimensions are approximate. Visual spacing may vary slightly on site.”

Visual style: Clean modern office design, natural lighting, realistic materials, subtle shadows, crisp legible typography, professional signage installation guide aesthetic. Use black sans-serif text for all labels and cards. The measurement lines should look like a design-spec overlay, not handwritten.

Constraints: Keep the image free of people and clutter. Do not add extra logos, extra cards, extra measurement labels, or additional decorative objects. Maintain accurate alignment: logo, legal text, unit number, light, and cabinet should all be centered on the same vertical axis.
title: Office Signage Dimension Mockup
description: A photorealistic office entrance signage specification mockup with dimension guides and recommended sizing notes for client approval.

content:
Goal: Create a vintage travel-poster collage advertising {argument name="destination country" default="Indonesia"}, with a scrapbook postcard aesthetic and adventurous tourism mood.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 poster, aged cream paper background with torn edges, distressed ink, speckles, layered paper scraps, postal markings, tape, and weathered print texture. Use warm earthy colors: red, teal, ochre, tan, brown, faded black, and sun-bleached cream.

Main subject: Center foreground shows a young female traveler from the waist up, holding a DSLR camera in one hand and an unfolded paper map in the other. She wears a loose white open shirt over a white crop top, patterned batik-style skirt, backpack straps, small jewelry, and messy tied-up hair. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft rectangular blur, while the rest of her body remains sharp and photo-realistic.

Text content: At the top, use a huge distressed red headline reading “{argument name="headline text" default="INDONESIA"}”. Beneath it, add a blue uppercase tagline: “{argument name="tagline" default="THOUSANDS OF ISLANDS, ENDLESS ADVENTURES"}”. Under that, add a red handwritten script line: “{argument name="script quote" default="Where culture, nature and smiles come together"}”. At the bottom, place a dark teal strip with white uppercase text: “NOT JUST A DESTINATION, IT’S AN EXPERIENCE”.

Layout and collage elements: Include exactly 12 major visible travel elements around the traveler: 1) a Balinese multi-tier temple pagoda on the left, 2) Borobudur-style stone stupas on the right, 3) a misty volcano and clouds in the upper middle background, 4) a busy Indonesian city street with scooters and traffic in the lower middle, 5) a turquoise public bus on the lower right, 6) a palm tree frond in the upper right, 7) a plate of Indonesian satay or grilled food with rice in the lower left, 8) a white frangipani flower near the food, 9) a yellow “WELCOME TO INDONESIA” tag in the upper left, 10) an Indonesian postage stamp in the upper right reading “REPUBLIK INDONESIA” with a volcano illustration, 11) a round Bali postal cancellation stamp near the upper right, and 12) passport-ticket ephemera in the lower left reading Jakarta, CGK, Indonesia, with a Garuda emblem.

Destination signpost: On the right side, add exactly 5 wooden arrow signs stacked vertically, each pointing right, labeled: “BALI”, “YOGYAKARTA”, “LABUAN BAJO”, “RAJA AMPAT”, and “LOMBOK”.

Brand mark: Bottom right contains a round sticker logo reading “wonderful indonesia” with a colorful flowing bird-like emblem.

Style constraints: Combine photorealistic travel photography with illustrated paper collage, vintage tourism poster typography, torn-paper layering, halftone grain, scratches, stamps, and muted cinematic contrast. Keep all text legible, avoid extra destination names beyond the listed ones, and do not add watermarks or modern UI elements.
title: Vintage Indonesia Travel Collage Poster
description: Generates a distressed scrapbook-style tourism poster for Indonesia featuring a traveler, landmarks, stamps, food, and destination signposts.

content:
Goal: Create a vertical hand-drawn graphic recording infographic in Japanese about {argument name="main topic" default="VPS @ Hetznerで動く Hermes Agentの全貌"}, with a friendly automation-kingdom theme and a central mascot robot.

Canvas: Portrait 2:3 poster, warm cream paper background, watercolor marker texture, dark navy handwritten lettering, loose sketch lines, pastel accent colors, small sparkles, arrows, doodles, and imperfect hand-drawn boxes.

Header: At the very top, draw a sunrise/cloud doodle on the left and a small castle on a hill on the right. Large title text reads “VPS @ Hetznerで動く Hermes Agentの全貌”. Under it, add the subtitle “— 佐藤さんの自動化王国” with a small crown icon.

Central subject: In the middle, draw a cute Hermes-themed robot mascot wearing a winged helmet, headphones, white rounded armor, small wing decorations on boots, and a teal cape. The robot smiles through a dark glass face screen and holds a clipboard labeled “TASK”. Around it, place circular time arrows and labels “0:00”, “6:00”, “12:00”, and “18:00”. Beneath the robot, add a nameplate reading “Hermes Agent ⚚” and a dark teal stats plaque reading “265 skills / 50 jobs / 24/7 running on Hetzner VPS”.

Main schedule layout: Use exactly 3 large schedule panels around the mascot. Left panel is orange and titled “朝（早朝・午前）JST”; it contains exactly 4 task rows with icons: 1) newspaper icon, “16:30 — ai-news-morning / 新聞 → Slack #実験”; 2) clipboard icon, “17:00 — meeting-briefing / MTG準備（平日のみ）→ Slack”; 3) rising chart icon, “17:07 — market-intel-morning / 株価グラフ → Slack”; 4) blue bird icon, “18:07 — x-engagement-daily / X バズ分析 → Slack”. Upper right panel is green and titled “日中 JST”; it contains exactly 1 task card with checklist icon: “9–21時 / 2h — Slack-task-detector / Slack→Linear 自動タスク化（平日）”. Right panel is blue and titled “夕方・夜 JST”; it contains exactly 6 task rows with icons: 1) moon and chart, “03:00 — market-intel-evening / 市場夜レポ”; 2) pink brain, “03:00 — metacognition-daily / メタ認知振り返り”; 3) envelope alert, “04:07 — slack-unanswered / 未返信 Slack 督促”; 4) candlestick chart, “06:00 — kaichi-trader-daily / 米株 paper trade / ← 今日NEW!!（平日）”; 5) calendar, “06:07 — calendar-preview / 今日の予定プレビュー”; 6) bar chart, “日曜 05:07 — x-weekly-growth / X 週次成長レポ”.

Background services section: Across the lower third, add a ribbon title “Background Services（常駐24/7）” with a crossed-tools icon and stars. Below it, create exactly 5 vertical service cards, each with a logo-style icon, service list, down arrow, and destination box. Card 1: “Slack:” with multicolor Slack-like dots, services “Conversation Hub / Bridge / MCP Server / Approval Listener”, destination “→Slack DM / 佐藤への日次レポ” with a small face doodle. Card 2: “Discord:” with purple gamepad logo, services “Rate Limit / Reaction Listener”, destination “→Discord / チャンネル”. Card 3: “LINE:” with green LINE icon and small bear/family doodle, services “Log Bot / Webhook Relay / Cloudflare Tunnel”, destination “→LINE / グループログ”. Card 4: “X/Twitter:” with yellow X badge, blue bird holding a pencil, service “Draftflow”, destination “→GitHub / Private repos” with a lock icon. Card 5: “ビジネス:” with red target icon, services “AIFluence / RepoSwipe / AI Office Worker / OwnTracks / ngrok / SSH Portfolio TUI”, destination “→Linear / タスク自動登録” with checklist icon.

Visual style: Japanese sketchnote, analog marker and colored pencil, playful but information-dense, clean enough to read, charming imperfect typography, cream background, navy ink, orange/green/blue/purple/red outlined boxes, small decorative arrows and sparkles. Keep all visible text handwritten and preserve the Japanese/English mixed labels exactly where specified.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 main schedule panels, exactly 11 scheduled task rows total, exactly 5 background service cards, and exactly 5 destination boxes. Do not add extra brands, watermarks, QR codes, photorealism, or typed sans-serif UI styling.
title: Hermes Agent Sketchnote Infographic
