content:
Create a comical scientific explanation illustration. The verification theme is "{argument name="validation theme" default="How many banana peels are needed to make a car slip?"}"

A vertical A4 manga-style infographic that seriously verifies absurd questions with science and calculations. White background, thick black lines, and emphasis colors of red, blue, and yellow. A design reminiscent of retro educational manga, science reference books, or scientific columns. Use a professor character, surprised people, speech bubbles, hand-drawn arrows, red pen annotations, and chalkboard-style formula boxes. The overall atmosphere should be 'using physics to verify a silly question with full effort,' making it fun, energetic, and not too serious.

Structure:

1. 
Depict the theme's situation in an exaggerated and ridiculous way that is understood at a glance. The characters are trying their best, but the appearance is quite reckless. The professor interjects with a comment from the side.

2. Thinking with Real Numbers
Display 3 to 4 boxes of important values related to the theme, such as speed, time, distance, weight, force, temperature, or energy. Include comparison charts or timelines to clearly show the gap between 'human senses' and the 'scale of the phenomenon.'

3. Formula Corner
Draw necessary conditions or comparison formulas largely in chalkboard-style frames. Example: 'Required Ability > Human Limit' 'Reaction Time < Time Phenomenon Occurs' 'Required Force/Speed/Durability ≫ Normal Human.' Formulas don't need to be strictly accurate; keep them intuitive and easy to understand.

4. Is Realization Impossible?
Explain problem points using three small panels. Example: ① Too fast / Too heavy / Too hot ② Precision is too severe ③ Even if successful, the body won't hold out / Surroundings will be in trouble. Include comical failure illustrations, onomatopoeia, and speech bubbles.

5. What If It Was Realized?
Make this part important. Illustrate what superhuman or speculative scientific abilities would be needed to actually succeed. For example, super reflexes, future prediction, abnormal grip strength, ultra-high-speed vision, physical ability to ignore air resistance, or a skeleton that can withstand impact. If necessary, use scientifically impossible numbers like 'reaction speed 0.0001s,' 'grip strength 3000kg,' or 'dynamic vision dozens of times that of a fighter pilot.' Furthermore, depict what happens the moment it is realized. Example: an impact that blows an arm off, sinking into the ground, shockwaves in the surroundings, while the person themselves remains calm. Bring out the 'if successful, they are no longer human' feeling in a fun way.

6. Conclusion
Write the conclusion largely in a red highlighted frame. 'Conclusion: XX is almost impossible for a normal human!' or 'Even if realized, it would be at a superhuman, cyborg, or speculative science level!' Summarize it in a way that states it's impossible for real humans but achievable with speculative scientific abilities.

Design Specifications: Manga paneling + science illustrations + professor's commentary. Use thick headings, red circles, emphasis lines, hand-drawn notes, and speech bubbles frequently. Formulas and numerical values should be large and easy to read, conveying the message intuitively even to children. Finish it like a page from an interesting science reading that is absurd yet strangely convincing.
title: Fictional Science Infographic Generator
description: A highly detailed, structured prompt for creating retro-style comic infographics that verify absurd fictional scenarios with serious scientific calculations and diagrams.

content:
Title: "{argument name="title" default="Human Anxiety"}"
Theme Keywords: Self-growth, business cognition, personal branding, breaking through, value expression

Generate a landscape-oriented Chinese business cognition poster based on this title.

The overall style is a black and red color palette, retro promotional poster, dark industrial wind, coarse paper texture, high-contrast cinematic lighting, strong grain noise, with a sense of oppression and breakthrough coexisting.

On the left side of the screen, place a giant Chinese main title "{argument name="main title" default="Fill in the Title Here"}" with a thick, damaged, print-worn font in red or black-and-red contrast, forming a strong visual focus. Below the title, add a short, impactful Chinese subtitle with a sense of cognitive reversal.

In the middle of the screen, arrange a symbolic figure: could be a creator, worker, freelancer, entrepreneur, or ordinary individual in a state of depression, hesitation, or being stuck. Surround the figure with metaphorical objects related to the theme, such as chains, locks, archive boxes, contracts, portfolios, computers, paper, doors, walls, cracks, light, etc.

On the right side of the screen, show the direction of "breaking through" or "awakening": could be an open door, a beam of strong light, a manifesto-style poster, a growth data panel, order prompts, client inquiries, an upward curve, an opportunity entrance, etc., symbolizing the transition from predicament to expression, transaction, growth, and freedom.

At the bottom of the screen, design a flowchart using red and black wireframes and arrows to show a psychological chain or growth path. For example: Wrong Cognition → Internal Friction Behavior → Opportunity Loss → Breakthrough Method → Positive Result. Red stamp-style slogans can be added in the middle to emphasize core views.

Overall suitable for WeChat official account covers, knowledge article covers, business cognition posters, self-media covers, and personal brand content covers. Strong Chinese typography is required, with strong visual impact, a sense of oppression, awakening, breakthrough, and business. No cute style, no flat illustrations, no 3D rendering, no soft healing style.

content:
Create a highly detailed “3D Historical Breakout Biography Poster”.

Main Character: {argument name="character name" default="[INSERT CHARACTER NAME]"}
Character Identity: [Emperor / General / Strategist / Philosopher / Reformer / Scholar / Military Leader]
Historical Era: {argument name="historical era" default="[INSERT DYNASTY OR HISTORICAL PERIOD]"}
Core Keywords: {argument name="keywords" default="[INSERT KEYWORDS]"}
Main Color Palette: [Black Gold Crimson / Deep Blue Silver / Dark Ink Gold / Iron Black]
Aspect Ratio: 3:4 Vertical Poster

Design an ultra cinematic historical archive-style poster with a full-body 3D historical figure as the absolute center focus. The character must appear realistic, monument-like, powerful, and historically accurate with strong cinematic presence. Clothing, armor, robes, weapons, crown, boots, fabric textures, and accessories must accurately match the historical era.

The figure should not stand still. Create a dramatic “breaking out of the frame” action pose toward the viewer with strong cinematic depth and perspective distortion. One arm or symbolic object must extend forward aggressively. The breakout object can be an imperial sword, spear, command scroll, royal decree, military token, book scroll, jade tablet, ceremonial weapon, or dynasty banner. Keep the forward object fully visible and uncropped.

The central figure stands on a refined memorial-style base with subtle historical engravings. The figure should feel visually heavy and dominant while the surrounding information system feels light, elegant, transparent, and floating.

Around the character, place 6–10 floating historical event fragments designed like lightweight museum archive shards instead of thick information cards. Use transparent acrylic/glass panels, glowing borders, fine gold annotation lines, layered infographic fragments, and floating manuscript textures. These fragments may contain years, event titles, short annotations, historical scenes, military maps, dynasty seals, territory outlines, and ancient document textures.

The floating fragments should appear at different depths and angles. Some closer to the camera, some partially hidden behind armor or weapons, creating strong cinematic layering and realistic spatial depth.

On the left side, include a large East Asian calligraphy-style title composition featuring the character’s name, birth/death years, dynasty name, role labels, historical keywords, and legendary subtitle with seal-style typography.

At the bottom, create a thin elegant horizontal timeline using fine gold lines, small circular markers, minimal year labels, and subtle annotations inspired by museum exhibition guides. Avoid heavy information bars.

Background style should combine ancient parchment textures, faded maps, museum wall aesthetics, ink textures, seal stamps, fragmented historical documents, war stra

content:
Generate a technical infographic of {argument name="object" default="OBJECT"} rendered from a {argument name="viewpoint" default="45-degree isometric 3D viewpoint"}, with the object slightly tilted to expose depth and three-dimensional structure.

Blend a photorealistic render of the object with hand-drawn black ink technical annotations on a clean pure-white background. Include:
- Color-coded callout boxes labeling each key component
- Transparent / cutaway sections that reveal internal parts
- Precise measurements, dimensions, and scale markers
- Material descriptions and quantity counts
- Color-coded directional arrows for function and flow: RED for power/battery, BLUE for data/connectivity, ORANGE for thermal/processor, GREEN for sensors/haptics
- Simple schematics or cross-section diagrams where useful

Place the "{argument name="object" default="OBJECT"}" title inside a hand-sketched technical frame in the top-left corner.
Style: black architectural-pen linework, sketchy yet precise; the object remains fully visible; vibe of a professional engineering teardown or museum exhibit. Clean layout with balanced negative space.
Perspective: 45-degree isometric tilt that dramatically reveals depth, dimension, and internal architecture, like a product engineering manual.
Color usage: roughly 10-15% accent density, black dominant, white background.
Output: 1080x1080, ultra-crisp, optimized for social feeds.
title: Technical Isometric Teardown Infographic
description: Generates professional engineering-style isometric infographics with hand-drawn annotations, color-coded callouts, and technical diagrams of any object.

content: Create a cinematic photorealistic 18th-century science laboratory scene inspired by Newton’s prism experiment. A {argument name="scientist" default="Sir Isaac Newton"} figure sits in deep darkness behind a polished table, wearing a voluminous {argument name="wig color" default="silvery white"} curly powdered wig and period clothing with ruffled cuffs; the face is deliberately obscured by a flat opaque dark-brown square censor block centered over the head. On the left, one hand adjusts a small antique brass optical apparatus with screws and a vertical rod, producing a bright white horizontal beam of light. The beam travels across the table into a transparent triangular glass prism at center-right, where it refracts into a vivid rainbow spectrum extending diagonally to the right, with clearly separated red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and violet bands. Use a black background, strong chiaroscuro, dramatic lens flares, glowing caustics, reflections on the glossy tabletop, delicate glass outlines, and a moody historical-scientific atmosphere. Wide cinematic aspect ratio, high contrast, realistic materials, shallow depth of field, dark teal and gold color grading, no text.
title: Newton Prism Experiment Portrait
description: A cinematic photorealistic scene of an 18th-century scientist demonstrating a prism splitting white light into a rainbow spectrum.

content:
Ultra-realistic architectural competition presentation board, portrait A1 layout, 4K resolution, mixed media visualization

SHEET COMPOSITION:
Full architectural board layout with balanced visual hierarchy. Top-third: large detailed 2D front elevation with fine linework, grid lines, section markers, and dimensional annotations in millimeters. Center-left: side and rear elevations in precise white technical drafting. Center-right: 3D isometric views and exploded axonometric component diagrams. Bottom section: concept development diagrams, design idea sketches, structural annotations, material palette callouts with timber / exposed concrete / glass labels, human scale reference figures, and landscape integration drawings. Modern architectural typography, minimal clean labeling. Negative space used intentionally for breathing room. Blueprint overlay fading at edges.

ARCHITECTURE TREE-INSPIRED MODERN CONCEPTUAL HOUSE:
Organic branching structural columns mimicking tree trunks and limbs, cantilevered volumes projecting asymmetrically, full-height glass curtain walls with slim mullions, exposed board-formed concrete cores, warm-toned timber cladding panels, green terraces cascading at each floor level, rooftop garden with native planting, elevated platform volumes integrated between existing trees, natural cross-ventilation cutaways shown in section, passive solar and sustainable strategy diagrams annotated with arrows, floor plan levels clearly marked, structural grid expressed through glazing.

3D RENDERING QUALITY:
Photorealistic materials wet concrete catching light, timber with visible grain, reflective wet stone paving, glass reflecting stormy sky dramatic warm amber interior glow bleeding through floor-to-ceiling glazing, high contrast shadows, cinematic environmental depth, ultra-sharp drafting lines overlaid on realistic render textures, {argument name="architectural style" default="Zaha Hadid / BIG / Kengo Kuma"} competition board aesthetic.

ATMOSPHERE:
{argument name="weather atmosphere" default="Dark stormy sky, heavy overcast with volumetric fog and mist rolling through trees"}, moody cinematic lighting, soft rain-wet reflective ground surfaces, deep shadow gradients, warm glowing interiors contrasting cold exterior environment, dramatic chiaroscuro, photorealistic environmental depth.

BACKGROUND & BOARD TEXTURE:
Charcoal and deep graphite toned paper texture, subtle blueprint grid lines fading behind drawings, faint construction reference lines, elegant monochromatic palette blacks, greys, off-whites with selective warm amber and timber-tone highlights, no clutter, premium studio presentation quality.

STYLE REFERENCES:
Architectural competition panel, mixed media board, Kengo Kuma material sensitivity, BIG diagram clarity, Zaha Hadid parame
title: Arboreal Architecture Presentation Board
description: A complex architectural competition board prompt for a tree-inspired organic house, featuring elevations, diagrams, and photorealistic 3D rendering elements in a stormy atmosphere.

content: Using the provided reference photo as the source plant, transform it into a clean plant-identification infographic poster. Use Simplified Chinese typography. Main headline: {argument name="headline text" default="绿毛球石竹"}; Latin name subtitle: {argument name="latin name" default="Dianthus barbatus ‘Green Trick’"}; show a confidence badge at the upper right reading high-confidence identification. Add exactly 9 content panels: 1 top-left identification recommendation summary, 2 classification judgment, 3 key identification evidence, 4 similar plant distinction, 5 basic file, 6 growth habits and care, 7 risk warning, 8 how to confirm, and 9 bottom fun-fact strip. Keep the infographic text dense but neatly aligned, with numbered green circle markers for panels 2 through 8, icons matching each topic, and the plant image as the central visual focus. Plant identity to present: {argument name="identified plant" default="Dianthus barbatus ‘Green Trick’, also called Green Trick"}; family/genus line: {argument name="taxonomy line" default="Caryophyllaceae | Dianthus | sweet william / Dianthus barbatus horticultural cultivar"}.

content: Based on the attached image, arrange {argument name="quantity" default="12 versions"} in a {argument name="grid" default="3x4"} grid. Express this as if the image were passed sequentially to 12 different people, each looking only at what the previous person made and mistakenly assuming 'this must be what was requested' or 'this is meant for this purpose,' leading them to redesign it. Start the first frame with an atmosphere very close to the original. As the frames progress, have the shape, color, expression, pose, composition, motifs, and mood of the original image gradually be misunderstood, simplified, converted for different uses, and move away from its original meaning and appearance. Each frame should look like it was remade by a person who only saw the previous frame and judged 'this must have been the request.' Naturally change it according to the content of the original image, whether it's a person, character, pet, food, landscape, building, or profile image. Do not fix the intermediate changes too strictly. It's okay to misunderstand it as an illustration in one frame, a mascot in the next, a commercial product, a sign, a flyer, a stuffed toy, food packaging, tourist goods, a warning sign, a game character, a mysterious toy, a reference icon, or a handmade craft. The direction of change should be naturally associated with the appearance of the original and the previous frame. As the frames progress, make it look like 'you can tell someone was trying to make it properly, but they slightly misunderstood what the request was.' Let the shapes, proportions, eyes, mouths, outlines, color placement, textures, uses, decorations, and compositions shift bit by bit, leading to an unexpected and humorous appearance in the latter half. The key is not just image degradation or noise, but to make it look like it's collapsing because humans misinterpreted the previous result while rebuilding it for a different purpose. In the latter half, do not completely erase the characteristics of the original image, but unnaturally leave one or two elements like color, outline, expression, hairstyle, clothes, accessories, pose, composition, or motif. Meanwhile, other elements can be boldly omitted, transformed, misunderstood, or turned into something else. Make the 12th frame bold enough that only someone who knows the original image can barely sense the original source, while appearing as a completely different mysterious entity, product, character, craft, icon, or mascot to a first-time viewer. End with an unexpected and slightly funny landing that makes people think 'Why did it end up like this?!' Make each frame look different. Keep the background white and simple, organized into a 3x4 grid for easy viewing of the 12 variations. In the later frames, don't make them too neat; instead, let one person's misunderstanding be further misunderstood by the next. In the 12th frame, change it so boldly that while one feature of the original remains strangely, everything else is almost entirely different.
title: Misordered Image Relay Grid
description: A complex creative prompt that transforms an input image through 12 stages of intentional 'misinterpretation' by imaginary sequential creators, resulting in a humorous 3x4 evolution grid.

content:
Premium Vintage Encyclopedia-Style Educational Infographic: {argument name="subject" default="Marie Curie’s Scientific Legacy"}
Create a sophisticated vertical infographic in a historical encyclopedia aesthetic featuring {argument name="person" default="Marie Curie (1867–1934)"}. The design should complement another infographic in a matching visual style while offering a fresh composition and different layout elements.
Main Heading
“{argument name="title" default="Marie Curie"}”
Subtitle: Pioneer of Radioactivity & Nobel Prize Scientist
Visual Centerpiece
Elegant painted-style portrait of Marie Curie standing inside an early 20th-century laboratory with glowing scientific instruments, notebooks, glass beakers, and subtle radioactive light effects in purple-blue tones.
Information Sections
Scientific Discoveries
Discovery of Polonium (1898)
Discovery of Radium
Development of radioactivity research
Advancement of medical radiation science
Personal Background
Born in Warsaw, Poland
Studied at the Sorbonne, Paris
Married physicist Pierre Curie
First woman to win a Nobel Prize
Nobel Achievements
Nobel Prize in Physics (1903)
Nobel Prize in Chemistry (1911)
First person to win two Nobel Prizes in different sciences
Historical Timeline
1891 → Moved to Paris for education
1898 → Discovered Polonium & Radium
1903 → First Nobel Prize
1911 → Second Nobel Prize
1934 → Passed away
Legacy & Influence
Inspired generations of women in STEM
Foundation of modern radiology
Changed the future of atomic science
Sparked discussions on scientific ethics and radiation safety
Design Style
Vintage academic encyclopedia layout
Soft lavender background (#F0E8F5)
Elegant purple accents (#7B5BA8)
Serif typography with historical elegance
Decorative scientific borders and subtle floral ornaments
Muted antique textures and paper grain
Lavender-tinted information cards with thin gold or dark purple outlines
Layout Composition
Large portrait slightly offset to one side
Alternating information panels
Vertical timeline with glowing date markers
Decorative scientific diagrams in background
Balanced symmetrical composition suitable for side-by-side comparison with another infographic
Art Direction
Highly detailed digital illustration, editorial infographic style, premium educational poster, elegant museum-quality design, historically respectful, soft cinematic lighting, refined Victorian scientific atmosphere.

content:
Create a cinematic production plan sheet titled ‐‐KENJI VS TAKASHI‐‐, styled like a professional film pre-production board, clean layout, thin borders, realistic detail.

1. Character Reference:
Kenji: heroic yakuza, Asian male, 30s, tall, athletic, slicked-back black hair, serious face, neck/hand tattoos, white suit, black shirt, black shoes. In combat he removes jacket and shirt, revealing a full back dragon tattoo. Uses a golden energy dragon.
Takashi: villainous yakuza, Asian male, 30s, tall, strong, short platinum hair, intimidating face, neck/chest/hand tattoos, dark red suit, open black shirt, black shoes. Demon tattoo on chest. Uses demonic red-black energy and shadow flames.

2. Environment:
Wet alley outside a nightclub at night, neon red/blue lights, puddles, steam, trash bags, dirty walls, smoke. Include main scene, top-down floor plan, character path, arrows, numbered camera positions.

3. Storyboard, 5 panels:
1. Wide, low angle, crane-down: Kenji and Takashi face off.
2. Medium, side angle, track: Kenji removes jacket and shirt.
3. Close-up, frontal, handheld: Takashi’s demon tattoo glows.
4. Wide, low angle, dolly-in: golden dragon energy rises behind Kenji.
5. Wide, dynamic, push-in: both clash, dragon vs demonic power.

4. Palette:
Black, white, crimson red, neon blue, gold, wet concrete gray.

5. Notes:
Lighting: neon glow, cinematic contrast, wet reflections.
Mood: tense, mythic, violent, stylish.
Style: cinematic realism, premium storyboard sheet
title: Cinematic Film Pre-Production Sheet
description: A comprehensive prompt to generate a professional film production board including character references, storyboards, and color palettes.

content: Create a wide cinematic 9-panel storyboard infographic for a dark fantasy transformation sequence. Style: ultra-realistic photography, cinematic concept art, film-production storyboard aesthetic, hyper-detailed textures, realistic lighting, movie pre-visualization quality. Layout: clean 3x3 grid with evenly spaced frames, each panel clearly numbered with bold cinematic titles and short bullet-point production notes beneath each image. Color grading: cold teal-blue moonlight mixed with warm orange lava glow, dramatic contrast, volumetric fog, realistic shadows, cinematic atmosphere. Aspect ratio: ultra-wide storyboard sheet, professional Hollywood pre-production design. PANEL 1 — “Frozen Ruins” Wide aerial establishing shot of a devastated frozen ruin at night. Shattered icy ground, drifting fog, ancient broken pillars covered in frost, snow blowing through the ruins. Tiny exhausted dark-haired woman visible lying on the ice. Bullet points inside panel: • Wide aerial establishing shot • Blue moonlight reflections • Heavy atmospheric fog • Ancient frozen ruins PANEL 2 — “The Fallen Woman” Medium-wide shot of the exhausted woman lying on cracked ice. Torn black-gray clothing, pale skin, trembling fingers, visible breath in cold air. Emotion: pain, desperation, exhaustion. Bullet points: • Character introduction • Torn dark clothing • Ice texture detail • Emotional vulnerability PANEL 3 — “Pain Awakens” Close-up on her face as she struggles to rise. Frost on skin, strands of dark hair across face, eyes filled with fear. Small glowing orange cracks begin appearing beneath her skin. Bullet points: • Close-up emotional shot • Molten glow beneath skin • Fear and desperation • Cinematic push-in camera PANEL 4 — “Lava Veins” Extreme close-up of glowing lava-like cracks spreading across her arm and neck. Skin illuminated from within by molten orange energy. Ice beneath her starts cracking violently. Bullet points: • Transformation begins • Orange magma veins • Cracking frozen ground • High-detail skin deformation PANEL 5 — “Bone Shift” Dynamic side-angle shot of her spine bending unnaturally while fingers elongate. Bones visibly shifting under skin with realistic body horror deformation. Fog and snow swirl around violently. Bullet points: • Spine deformation • Aggressive morphing • Dynamic camera angle • Violent environmental reaction PANEL 6 — “Flesh to Fur” Mid-transformation sequence. Human body partially dissolving into black fur and panther anatomy. Limbs reshaping fluidly. Embers erupt into the cold air. Bullet points: • Flesh reforming • Fur generation effects • Embers and debris • Seamless morph VFX PANEL 7 — “The Beast Emerges” Full reveal of the massive black panther standing on shattered ice. Glowing lava cracks across body, fiery orange eyes, steam rising from fur. Dramatic moonlight silhouette. Bullet points: • Full creature reveal • Lava crack patterns • Cinematic silhouette • Dark fantasy realism PANEL 8 — “Roar of Fury” Intense close-up action shot of the panther roaring directly toward camera. Motion blur, handheld shake energy, flying debris, glowing embers, ultra-detailed fur simulation. Bullet points: • Aggressive roar shot • Handheld camera shake • Flying debris particles • High-intensity action PANEL 9 — “Storm Transition” Final cinematic frame. The roaring panther sharply turns its head toward the sky as dark storm clouds begin forming overhead. Blue lightning faintly visible in distance. Dramatic ending composition. Bullet points: • Storm clouds forming • Transition setup shot • Blue lightning atmosphere • Cinematic ending frame Overall design requirements: • Professional film storyboard infographic • Clean 3x3 grid composition • Bold numbered panels • Large cinematic titles • Minimal modern typography • Consistent visual continuity between frames • Hyper-realistic dark fantasy style • Realistic photography textures • Volumetric lighting and fog • Warm orange vs cool teal cinematic palette • Production-quality concept art • 8K ultra-detail • Smooth visual storytelling progression • Looks like a Hollywood movie pre-visualization board
title: Dark Fantasy Storyboard Infographic
description: A comprehensive prompt for a 9-panel cinematic storyboard depicting a dark fantasy character transformation.

content: Create a cinematic 16-panel storyboard infographic showing the adventure of a young female wildlife photographer traveling into a deep forest to photograph a majestic lion. Use a realistic movie-storyboard style with warm natural colors, dramatic sunlight, jungle atmosphere, cinematic camera angles, and professional wildlife documentary aesthetics. The same realistic young woman should appear consistently in every panel wearing outdoor explorer clothing, hiking boots, backpack, and carrying a professional DSLR camera with a telephoto lens. Arrange the storyboard in a clean 4x4 grid with numbered scenes, bold titles, small bullet points, and visual motion arrows. Scenes should include: preparing camera gear, entering the jungle, walking through trees, spotting animal tracks, hearing movement in bushes, carefully hiding behind rocks, seeing the lion from a distance, adjusting camera settings, slowly approaching, capturing close-up lion shots, filming the lion walking, taking cinematic wildlife photos, reviewing footage on the camera screen, sunset in the jungle, returning safely from the forest, and finally showing the captured lion video proudly on a laptop or camera display. Include realistic forest lighting, dust particles, leaves moving, cinematic shadows, wildlife atmosphere, dramatic expressions, camera close-ups, and emotional storytelling. Ultra-realistic photography style, nature documentary mood, high-detail jungle environment, realistic human appearance, premium cinematic composition, 4K quality, no anime, no cartoon, no CGI look.
title: Wildlife Photographer Adventure Storyboard
description: A professional 16-panel storyboard infographic detailing the journey of a wildlife photographer capturing a lion in a deep forest.

content: Create a terrifying cinematic microscopic visualization of {argument name="virus name" default="Hantavirus"} inside a human airway or blood vessel, as if seen through an electron microscope blended with dark fantasy medical concept art. Show exactly 9 visible spherical virus particles: 2 large sharply focused foreground virions, one on the lower left tissue ridge and one on the lower right tissue ridge; 1 medium virion floating near the upper center; 1 medium virion near the upper right edge; 1 blurred virion at the upper middle background; 1 small blurred virion at mid left; 1 small blurred virion near center right; 1 medium blurred virion in the central background; and 1 tiny distant virion in the left background. Each virion has a rough mottled membrane, a glowing teal-green spiral core, and many short orange-red club-shaped surface spikes. The environment is a wet organic tunnel made of red swollen tissue cells, translucent membranes, vein-like strands, mucus, and glossy fluid, with golden infectious particles drifting through the air. Use dramatic macro depth of field, strong backlighting from the upper left, amber volumetric glow, high contrast red and gold color grading, extreme biological detail, unsettling horror atmosphere, photorealistic 3D render quality, shallow focus, bokeh, no text, no labels, no humans.
title: Scary Hantavirus Microscopic Scene
description: A cinematic horror-style microscopic medical visualization of Hantavirus particles moving through organic tissue.

content: Create a dramatic macro 3D scientific visualization of {argument name="virus name" default="Hantavirus"} as a frightening spherical viral particle floating in a dark microscopic environment. The central subject is one large virion in sharp focus, with a rough fibrous gray-brown outer shell covered in many translucent red-orange trumpet-shaped spike proteins arranged around the entire circumference. Show a cutaway-like glowing inner core visible through the front surface, filled with warm golden bioluminescent particles and a thick coiled turquoise RNA strand curled in a spiral knot. Surround the main virion with 4 out-of-focus background viral particles: one large blurred particle in the upper left, one large blurred particle in the upper right, one partial blurred particle at the lower left edge, and one partial blurred particle at the right edge. Use cinematic depth of field, volumetric haze, floating dust-like microscopic particles, teal-green and amber color grading, high contrast rim lighting, hyper-detailed textures, semi-realistic biomedical illustration style, scary ominous mood, ultra high resolution, no text, no labels, no watermark.

content: Create a cheerful children's crayon drawing on white paper in a 16:9 frame, like a hand-drawn educational video keyframe about jazz rhythm. At the top, write a large colorful Chinese crayon headline in two lines: {argument name="headline text" default="爵士乐为什么要打2、4拍?"}, with each character in a different bright color such as purple, blue, red, green, yellow, and cyan, slightly uneven like a child wrote it. In the center-left, draw one smiling cartoon child with a round head, spiky black hair, huge circular eyes, a wide open magenta mouth, stick arms raised happily, a blue scribbled shirt, thin brown stick legs, and purple shoes. On the center-right, draw one black grand piano in rough crayon lines with its lid open, yellow scribbled strings inside, four visible legs, a keyboard showing 7 white keys and 5 black keys, and 3 small yellow pedals beneath it. The child reaches toward or plays the piano, creating a cute beginner music lesson feeling. Add a bold subtitle near the bottom over the drawing reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="我们确认一下打节拍的意义"}, styled as thick white Chinese characters with a dark blue outline and yellow emphasis on the first two characters. Use messy wax-crayon texture, simple childlike proportions, imperfect perspective, bright primary colors, and lots of visible scribble strokes; keep the background plain white with no extra objects.
title: Childlike Jazz Beat Crayon Lesson
description: Generates a cute crayon-style educational frame explaining jazz beats with a smiling child, grand piano, and Chinese lesson text.

content: Create a cheerful childlike wax-crayon illustration on white textured paper in a naive hand-drawn style, using pastel scribbly strokes and soft uneven outlines. Show three storybook children across the upper middle: on the left, a child in a purple wide-brim hat and purple cloak holding a tiny teacup, with the face replaced by a plain beige square; in the center, a boy in a green cap and green jacket with yellow suspenders, touching his mouth thoughtfully; on the right, a smiling child in profile wearing a pink feathered beret and a blue striped shirt with pink-and-black suspenders. Surround them with playful doodles: 2 smiling clouds, 1 smiling sun, 2 smiling yellow stars, 1 plain yellow star, 1 small blue star, 1 purple asterisk star, 2 large flowers, 3 small flowers, 1 teddy bear with a purple bow, 1 lollipop, 1 wrapped candy, 1 tulip, 1 pink ribbon bow, green grass, leafy vines, small dots and curls, and many pink hearts. In the center-lower area place a large scalloped pink crayon frame decorated with green vine flourishes and a bow at the top; inside it write the hand-lettered French quote {argument name="quote" default="Notre tâche la plus importante, pour le moment, est de bâtir des châteaux en Espagne."} in dark gray, with the attribution below in purple and pink: {argument name="attribution" default="Lewis Mumford, The Story of Utopias (1922)"}. Keep the mood whimsical, optimistic, handmade, and nursery-wall friendly, with imperfect crayon texture, rounded cute faces, rosy cheeks, and no photorealism.

content: Create a wide 9-panel cinematic storyboard infographic Use a realistic photography style with warm cinematic colors. Arrange the storyboard in a clean 3x3 grid layout with numbered panels, bold titles, short bullet points, and smooth visual storytelling similar to a professional film-production storyboard. Panel 1 — Eyes in the Storm Ultra-realistic extreme close-up of a female cyclist’s face during a heavy rainstorm at night. Focus on her eyes, soaked eyelashes, wet skin texture, and streams of rainwater running across her face. She wears a baby pink cycling helmet and baby pink face mask. Subtle red reflections from a rear bike light flicker dynamically across her eyes and skin, mixing with cold blue night tones. High contrast cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, hyper-realistic skin texture, macro 85mm lens, intense determined expression. Panel 2 — Aggressive Night Ride Ultra-realistic cinematic medium close-up frontal shot of the female cyclist riding aggressively through heavy rain at night. She pedals hard with strong effort, body leaning forward. Baby pink waterproof cycling jacket glowing subtly under wet reflections. Front bike light cutting through rain and fog, slight flicker creating dynamic illumination. Wet asphalt reflecting red and white lights. Smooth cinematic tracking shot with stable movement and slight natural motion. Panel 3 — Rain Impact Macro Ultra-realistic macro cinematic shot of large heavy raindrops hitting wet asphalt at night. Huge crown-shaped splashes, ripples spreading through puddles, detailed water physics in slow motion. Cool blue cinematic tones with subtle reflections from bike lights. Extremely shallow depth of field, rough wet asphalt texture, dramatic nighttime atmosphere. Locked-off stable macro shot. Panel 4 — Three Cyclists in the Storm Ultra-realistic cinematic shot of three female road cyclists riding fast together at night in a heavy rainstorm. All riders wear baby pink cycling apparel contrasting against the dark blue environment. Strong pedaling, water spraying from wheels, heavy rain illuminated by bike lights. One bike light flickers irregularly, creating unstable lighting changes across the riders and wet road. Smooth stabilized tracking camera from behind and slightly to the side. Cinematic motion blur enhances speed. Panel 5 — Drivetrain Under Pressure Ultra-realistic macro cinematic close-up of a bicycle drivetrain during intense riding in heavy rain at night. Rear cassette, chain, derailleur, and crankset moving aggressively under load. Baby pink cycling shoe partially visible during pedaling. Water droplets, oil, and dirt splashing across the metal surfaces. Flickering light pulses intermittently across spinning components, revealing sharp mechanical detail before fading into darkness. Hyper-realistic wet textures and reflections. Panel 6 — Top-Down Drone Formation Ultra-realistic top-down drone shot of three female cyclists riding in perfect single-file formation on a wet mountain road at night. Baby pink jackets visible against dark reflective asphalt. Perfect vertical 90-degree angle, locked framing, smooth stabilized drone movement with no rotation or perspective shift. Wet road reflections, light rain visible under bike lights, atmospheric fog surrounding the road edges. Panel 7 — Side Tracking Speed Shot Ultra-realistic cinematic side tracking shot of the female cyclists riding at high speed through rain and fog at night. Camera moves parallel to them with stable FPV-style cinematic motion. Baby pink apparel catches occasional highlights from flickering bike lights. Water sprays from tires, rain streaks cutting across frame, strong motion blur in the background emphasizing speed and endurance. Panel 8 — Front Light Through Darkness Ultra-realistic cinematic frontal shot of the lead female cyclist riding directly toward the camera through heavy rain and fog. Her front bike light flickers softly while cutting through darkness. Baby pink jacket soaked with rainwater, droplets flying from the wheels. Focused expression, intense breathing, aggressive forward posture. Wet asphalt shimmering with white and red reflections. Smooth stabilized camera movement with subtle cinematic float. Panel 9 — Final Hero Close-Up Ultra-realistic cinematic hero close-up of the female cyclist slowing slightly after the intense ride. Tight framing on her face and upper body. Baby pink helmet, soaked jacket, wet skin, rainwater dripping from chin and glasses. Red rear light flickering softly behind her, creating subtle red highlights on water droplets and facial contours. Calm but exhausted expression, visible breathing, cinematic low-key lighting, cold blue atmosphere, hyper-realistic detail, premium sports commercial ending shot.
title: Night Rain Storyboard Infographic
description: A prompt for a 9-panel cinematic storyboard grid featuring realistic photography of cyclists in a night-time rainstorm.

content: You are now a {argument name="persona" default="professional researcher of traditional Chinese palmistry"}, well-versed in classics like 'Mayi Xiangfa.' Based on the palm image I upload, analyze the palm print features and generate a traditional Chinese numerology-style palmistry analysis infographic. Focus on: main palm lines (life, wisdom, heart, fate, wealth), hand shape, character talents, and life dimensions (career, wealth, health). Infographic style: Traditional Chinese aesthetic using {argument name="visual style" default="ink wash and gold accents"}. Use the uploaded photo as the main visual, label major lines, and decorate with traditional symbols like the Eight Trigrams or auspicious clouds. The layout should be clear and professional.
title: Traditional Palmistry Analysis Infographic
description: A prompt that turns GPT into a palmistry expert to analyze uploaded hand photos and generate a traditional Chinese-style analysis infographic.

Split the itinerary into exactly 3 visible schedule panels labeled DAY 1 京都, DAY 2 奈良・大阪, and DAY 3 大阪, keeping the times and activities from the reference legible in each panel. Add propaganda-style supporting imagery not present in the reference: crowds of uniformed students/workers, raised fists, red flags, industrial smokestacks, dramatic city silhouettes, castle illustrations, and a red fist emblem in a star at the lower right. content: Using the provided reference timetable sheet, transform it into a bold contemporary graphic travel poster / magazine-spread design while preserving the overall school-trip schedule structure and key itinerary information. Replace the plain document layout with a dynamic diagonal composition, oversized brush-calligraphy Japanese headline {argument name="headline text" default="旅のしおり"}, and smaller title text for a {argument name="trip duration" default="2泊3日"} trip toward {argument name="destination area" default="関西方面"}. Organize the schedule into exactly 3 large vertical day sections: Day 01 Kyoto, Day 02 Nara / Osaka, and Day 03 Osaka, keeping the times and main activities from the reference but typesetting them as clean poster text with a thin timeline line. Add high-contrast neon accent graphics in hot pink, cyan, yellow, blue, green, and purple, with angular triangles, paint splashes, speed lines, halftone textures, arrows, scribbles, and collage-like overlays. Add photographic/illustrated travel imagery not present in the reference: temples and shrine architecture for Kyoto, a deer for Nara, Osaka Castle, a busy Osaka street scene, and Tsutenkaku/tower imagery, integrated as tilted monochrome or duotone cutout panels. Include small English slogan text such as "SCHOOL TRIP 2024", "MOVE. SEE. FEEL. JOURNEY.", "NO PLAN NO LIFE JUST GO.", and day-theme labels like HISTORY, PAST & PRESENT, and FREEDOM. Keep a mostly off-white paper background, black typography, energetic editorial street-design styling, and make the final result look like a polished youth travel booklet cover/schedule poster rather than a formal handout.

content: Turn the scene into a playful crayon-style drawing, like something made by a 10 year old child. Use shaky, uneven lines, imperfect forms, and clear crayon textures on a plain white paper background. Use bright {argument name="colors" default="pastel and vivid colors"}, allowing them to slightly spill outside the outlines to enhance the handmade look. Include small, cheerful doodles such as {argument name="doodles" default="smiling clouds, stars, candies, and tiny castles"} to build a whimsical, imaginative world. Keep it minimal yet expressive — warm, nostalgic, a little messy, and full of innocent charm.
title: Childhood Memory Crayon Art
description: A nostalgic prompt that transforms scenes into playful, messy crayon drawings mimicking the imaginative art style of a child.

content: Create a 16:9 widescreen PowerPoint cover slide in an elegant Chinese traditional craft presentation style, with an ivory rice-paper background, dark teal and gold ornamental border, and decorative Chinese corner brackets. The main headline on the left is large dark blue Chinese calligraphy text reading {argument name="headline text" default="掐丝珐琅"}, with a smaller gold subtitle underneath reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="火与金线中的东方华彩"}. Below it, place a centered rounded label plaque with teal text reading {argument name="section label" default="传统工艺主题分享"}, and a small explanatory line near the lower left reading {argument name="footer note" default="认识一种以金属胎、细丝与珐琅釉色共同构成的华美工艺"}. In the top-right corner, add a small ornate dark teal page indicator reading {argument name="page indicator" default="01 / 10"}. On the right half, feature a highly detailed blue-and-gold cloisonné enamel vase on a dark wooden stand, decorated with lotus flowers, green lotus leaves, curling gold wire patterns, turquoise accents, and ornate gold handles. The tabletop foreground contains exactly 7 discrete craft objects: 1 coil of gold wire, 1 flat cloisonné floral medallion, 1 gold key-shaped ornament, 1 fine metalworking brush or stylus, and 4 small bowls of enamel powder in blue, green, turquoise, and white/gold. Create a clean, minimal skincare diagnostic report poster using my uploaded photo as the exact face reference, preserving my real facial features, proportions, and natural skin tone. The subject is centered in a professional portrait style, wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="smart blazer and clear glasses"}, neutral expression, soft confident look. Background is a warm beige minimal aesthetic with subtle botanical line art decorations in corners.

Forehead: Smooth, subtle sebum
Under Eye: Slight puffiness, healthy tone
Cheeks: Even texture, glowing
Nose/T-zone: Minimal shine, visible pores
Jawline/Beard: Clean skin, defined line
At the top, include elegant serif title text: “{argument name="title" default="DIAGNOSTIC REPORT"}”.
Below the portrait, add a rounded soft card labeled “METRICS” with clean modern typography showing:
Overall Skin Type: {argument name="skin type" default="3.0 Combination"}
Texture: 9.0 High
Tone Consistency: 6.0 Excellent
Pore Visibility: 3.0 Minimal
Hydration: 8.0 Balanced
Radiance and Glow: 6.0 Radiant
At the bottom, create two rounded panels:
Left panel title: “RECOMMENDED AM ROUTINE”
Gentle Cleanser
Hydrating Toner
Vitamin C Serum
Moisturizer
SPF 50+
Right panel title: “RECOMMENDED PM ROUTINE”
Double Cleanse
Exfoliating Toner
Repair Serum
Ceramide Cream
Eye Cream
Style: ultra-clean dermatology infographic, soft neutral tones, premium skincare brand aesthetic, minimal shadows, soft diffused lighting, high resolution, sharp text clarity, perfectly aligned layout, balanced spacing, modern UI card design, realistic skin texture, no distortion.
Ensure layout, typography placement, spacing, and composition exactly match the reference image, only replacing the face with my uploaded photo.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the source photo, create a clean, realistic “after organization” desktop layout plan infographic. Keep the same desk, shelves, monitor/laptop setup, PC tower position, and overall room viewpoint, but tidy the workspace: route cables neatly, clear the desktop, place items into defined storage zones, add matching storage boxes/baskets, a pegboard/accessory area, pen cup, book storage box, transparent display case, and dedicated bottle/tissue/small-tool areas. Use a green-and-white instructional poster style with a large top headline: {argument name="headline text" default="工作台整理布局方案图（可直接照做）"}. Overlay 12 green circular numbered markers on the organized photo and include a right-side panel titled {argument name="right panel title" default="物品定位清单"} listing exactly 12 labeled zones: ① monitor / secondary screen, ② main PC tower, ③ cable management, ④ laptop work area, ⑤ mouse pad / mouse area, ⑥ water cup / bottle area, ⑦ tissue / tool area, ⑧ left under-desk storage box, ⑨ right under-desk storage box, ⑩ book storage box, ⑪ figure display area, ⑫ common small-items area / pegboard. Add a bottom section titled {argument name="steps title" default="整理步骤（从上到下）"} with exactly 6 step cards, each containing a small before/after-style thumbnail and short Chinese labels: ① clear desktop, ② install accessories, ③ position large items, ④ partition storage, ⑤ cable management, ⑥ final inspection. Add a bottom-left tips box titled {argument name="tips title" default="收纳小贴士"} with exactly 4 checkbox tips about putting frequently used items within one-hand reach, grouping similar items, checking cables weekly, and keeping only currently used items on the desk. Add a bottom-center/right recommendations row titled {argument name="tools title" default="推荐收纳工具"} with exactly 5 product icons: desktop organizer tray, pegboard + hooks, cable ties / cable clips, storage box with handle, transparent display box. Make the design neat, practical, bright, and directly actionable, like a home-office organization guide derived from the original photo.
title: Desk Organization Layout Infographic

content: {"type":"surreal photorealistic classroom scene with detailed chalkboard math lesson","style":"high-resolution realistic photo, slightly absurd internet meme tone, natural indoor classroom lighting, sharp chalk writing, 4:3 composition","main_subject":{"description":"a humanoid Shiba Inu dog teacher standing at the front of a classroom, wearing a white button-down dress shirt tucked into dark gray slacks with a black belt, one hand in pocket, holding a thin metal pointer in the other hand and pointing toward equations on the chalkboard","head":"orange-and-white Shiba Inu head with upright ears; the central face area is covered by a flat opaque square censor block in tan beige, creating a comically overdone moderation effect","customizable_subject":"{argument name=\"teacher animal\" default=\"Shiba Inu dog\"}","clothing":"{argument name=\"teacher outfit\" default=\"white dress shirt, dark gray slacks, black belt\"}","pose":"confident lecturer pose, facing the students while pointing to the board"},"setting":{"location":"Japanese classroom lecture room","foreground":"backs of 5 seated students visible at the bottom edge, mostly dark hair, one student in a gray hoodie on the right, all looking toward the teacher","furniture":"small wooden teacher podium centered near the bottom with an open gray laptop on top","background":"large dark green chalkboard spanning the wall, metal chalk tray along the bottom, chalk eraser on the far right"},"chalkboard":{"overall_text_style":"white chalk handwriting in Japanese with mathematical notation, clean but hand-drawn, dense lecture notes","main_title":{"position":"upper left","text":"{argument name=\"chalkboard title\" default=\"定数係数の常微分方程式\"}"},"topic_intro":{"position":"upper left below title","text":"次のような常微分方程式を考える。"},"central_equation":{"position":"upper left to center","text":"a_n y^(n) + a_{n-1} y^(n-1) + … + a_1 y' + a_0 y = 0"},"note":{"position":"below central equation","text":"ここで、a_n, a_{n-1}, …, a_0 は定数、a_n ≠ 0 とする。"},"sections_count":4,"sections":[{"label":"(1) 特性方程式","position":"left middle","content":"a_n r^n + a_{n-1} r^{n-1} + … + a_1 r + a_0 = 0"},{"label":"(2) 解の形","position":"left lower","content":"three bullet cases: distinct real roots r1, r2, …, rn; repeated root r of multiplicity m; complex conjugate roots α ± βi"},{"label":"example panel","position":"right side separated by a vertical chalk line","title":"【例】","content":"y'' − 3y' + 2y = 0; characteristic equation r^2 − 3r + 2 = 0; (r − 1)(r − 2) = 0; r = 1, 2; therefore y = C1 e^x + C2 e^{2x}"},{"label":"solution formulas","position":"left lower continuation","content":"y = C1 e^{r1 x} + C2 e^{r2 x} + … + Cn e^{rn x}; y = (C1 + C2 x + … + Cm x^{m−1}) e^{rx}; y = e^{αx}(C1 cos βx + C2 sin βx)"}]},"composition":{"camera":"student-eye-level view from the back of the classroom, medium-wide shot","framing":"teacher slightly right of center, pointer angled diagonally left toward the characteristic equation, chalkboard fills most of the image","mood":"serious academic lecture made absurd by the dog-headed teacher and censor square","quality":"photorealistic, coherent perspective, realistic fabric, fur, chalk dust texture, classroom depth of field"},"customizable_text":"{argument name=\"lesson topic\" default=\"constant-coefficient ordinary differential equations\"}"}

content:
Hairstyle Analysis:
Based on the uploaded face photo, I want you to create a hairstyle diagnosis image with a {argument name="style" default="luxurious"} feel! Keep the original facial features, face shape, and atmosphere as they are, and make it look like different hairstyles were tried in side-by-side or sequential comparisons. Make it easy to tell at a glance which ones are "Best Match," "Average," and "Not Recommended," conveying how each hairstyle makes the face look smaller, improves the vibe, or makes the person look more sophisticated. I want to compare long hair, short hair, with/without bangs, curly hair, straight hair, layers, updos, etc. The design should be stylish, like a professional stylist's document. Keep the text minimal and high quality for social media!
Makeup Analysis Guide:
Based on the uploaded face photo, create a luxurious makeup analysis guide image! Use the original facial features as a base, with a natural finish where it's clearly the same person, without over-applying or over-processing. Also, diagnose and summarize the face type (Fresh, Soft Elegant, Elegant, Feminine, Cute, Active Cute, Cool, Cool Casual, Adult Face, Child Face, Curved, Linear). Use a sophisticated design like a magazine beauty feature, with {argument name="language" default="Japanese"} notation throughout. Keep text to a minimum, focusing on the images for clarity. Please aim for a professional level of completion that makes people want to share it on SNS!
title: Professional Hairstyle and Makeup Analysis Guide
description: A comprehensive prompt for generating a professional stylist-style analysis guide for hairstyles and makeup based on a reference photo.

content:
Using the uploaded logo, create a highly detailed manga-style infographic poster: 

Title: "What This Brand Feels Like"
Goal: Transform the brand into a "living individual" and visually demonstrate how it acts, speaks, and interacts with the world.
Fusion: Brand Strategy + Character Design + Manga Storytelling

Core Rule: All content must derive from the logo itself (colors, style, tone, personality). No generic personality descriptions.

Structure: {argument name="layout" default="Vertical 4:5 poster"}, information-dense multi-panel layout, {argument name="style" default="manga + infographic hybrid style"}.

Main Character: Create a core character representing the brand's personification. Clothing, posture, and expression must reflect the brand identity.
Panels: 6–8 manga panels showing behaviors in scenarios like customer interaction, handling competition, or social media presence.
Traits: Modular sections showing tone style, energy level, and communication methods using icons.
Do/Don't: Visual guide on brand-consistent vs inconsistent behaviors.
Final Feel: Should look like a personified brand strategy board worth collecting, not flat or generic.
title: Manga Style Brand Identity Infographic
description: A highly detailed prompt that transforms a brand logo into a personified manga-style character, displayed in a multi-panel layout showing various scenarios and traits.

content:
Classical Beauty Dunhuang Dance "Flying to Heaven" Action Breakdown Poster
Generate a high-quality 16-grid action breakdown poster for "{argument name="theme" default="Dunhuang Dance 'Flying to Heaven'"}." Core requirements:
- Layout: 4x4 square grid with 16 cells, each corresponding to a continuous dance step numbered 1-16, following the original choreography logic of the Dunhuang dance.
- Aesthetic: Not a generic instructional chart, but a cinematic storyboard poster with a Dunhuang mural atmosphere, elegant classical style, and visual impact.
- Character: Features a {argument name="character_image" default="classical and elegant beauty"} (gentle features, slender build, graceful aura), remaining consistent across all cells without character swaps.
- Style: Dunhuang dance style, capturing the spirit of "Flying Apsaras" with flowing ribbons, graceful postures, and the original choreography's core movements like lifts, waist twists, and sleeve throws.
- Costume: {argument name="costume_style" default="Classical Dunhuang Flying Apsaras attire"} in nude and camel tones with gold and stone-blue patterns (clouds, floral scrolls), using lightweight airy fabrics (gauze/chiffon) with traditional headpieces and ribbons.
- Background: Mural-style background in earthy yellows and ochres, incorporating textures, auspicious clouds, and silhouettes with soft warm lighting to highlight the dancer.
- Content per cell: Large step number, Chinese action title (dance terminology), concise Chinese key points, and trajectory arrows for ribbon and body movement.
- Overall effect: Refined, consistent, and sophisticated, combining a tutorial feel with classical poster art and historical mural aesthetics.
title: Dunhuang Dance Sequence Poster
description: A high-quality 16-grid poster prompt for the classical 'Flying to Heaven' Dunhuang dance, featuring a traditional mural aesthetic and professional choreography breakdown.

content:
Shot with a high-definition underwater camera, this prompt captures real underwater natural scenery in a {argument name="environment description" default="clear shallow stream next to a tropical primeval forest"}.

Vertical composition, 3:4 aspect ratio, medium-to-long shot. The lens is slightly below the water surface, showing the shimmering bottom of the water surface above with realistic water wave refraction and natural reflections.

Sunlight shines diagonally into the water from the top right, forming soft beams and underwater spots. Dark reflections and shadows of large tree branches occupy part of the composition in the upper right.

In the middle is clear and quiet stream water with slight suspended particles and {argument name="number of fish" default="5-8"} native freshwater small fish swimming naturally, mainly gray-silver and light brown, varying in size and distance, not forming an organized school. On the stream bed, deep green, yellow-green, and brownish-green water plants grow naturally, swaying gently with the current, distributed naturally unlike an artificial aquarium.

The bottom consists of gray-brown fine sand, gravel, pebbles, and several naturally shaped stones with slight algae marks and signs of water erosion. Multiple springs at the bottom show fine sand billowing slowly from small holes, creating light sand clouds and local water disturbances, not white smoke, steam, or large bubbles.

Natural landscape live-action photography, high-end natural documentary feel, close to National Geographic ecological photography. Features transparent water, natural lighting, restrained colors, realistic underwater optical effects, slight graininess, natural depth of field, and high-definition details.

No people, no buildings, no artificial traces, no text, no borders, no LOGO. Avoid CG feel, aquarium look, seabed coral, exaggerated fish schools, oversaturated greens, dreamy lighting effects, or plastic water plants.
title: Underwater Forest Stream Photography
description: A prompt for generating realistic underwater nature photography in a tropical forest stream with fish and sunlight effects.

content:
Please generate a high-quality, high-definition poster-style storyboard for "{argument name="subject" default="Street Freestyle Football"} · {argument name="action" default="16-Step Action Breakdown"}." The layout should be a square 4x4 grid, with each cell showing a consecutive action step of the same street football performer in the same setting. The entire image should look like a combination of a high-end sports poster and a technical breakdown instructional board, possessing both visual impact and a clear sense of movement explanation.

[Overall Setting]
Theme: Street freestyle football performance (not a match or drill), where one performer completes a continuous set of tricks.
Atmosphere: Street vibe, urban, cinematic, athletic, cool, and rhythmic.
Background: Set in a {argument name="background" default="nighttime urban small street pitch"} or city square football space, with graffiti walls, wire fences, distant building lights, street lamps, and slightly reflective ground. The environment must be consistent and have a trendy street aesthetic.

[Character Requirements]
Protagonist: A young, handsome male freestyle football expert with a light, coordinated, and athletic build, short black hair, confident aura, and fluid, controlled movements.
The same person must appear in all 16 cells; do not change the person per cell.
Outfit: Cool-looking football kit, but no words like "Champion" or specific country names. The clothing should feel like a professional team jersey.

[Layout Requirements]
The full image is a 4x4 grid of 16 cells. Each cell must contain:
1. Large step number (1-16)
2. Chinese action title
3. 2-4 brief Chinese action points
4. Clear full-body action shot of the person
5. Football trajectory arrows / footwork paths
6. The ball must be clearly visible and logically positioned.

Overall font style: Sporty poster aesthetic, clear and powerful. The image should be sharp, clean, and the person and ball must be complete, not cut off at the feet.

[Action Sequence]
Please design 16 continuous actions in order, each distinctly different, forming a complete freestyle routine: [Detailed steps 1-16 including Starting Pose, Sole Pull, Stepover, Flick-up, Knee Control, Around the World, Shoulder Stall, Rainbow Flick, and Final Bow].

[Visual Style]
- High-end sports poster style
- Cinematic night lighting and shadows
- Strong sense of motion with a trendy street aesthetic
- Clear arrows and trajectory lines to help understand the path of the ball
- Color palette dominated by red, black, and gold for a premium feel
- Eye-catching typography suitable for social media
title: Freestyle Football 16-Step Action Poster
description: A complex 4x4 grid prompt designed to generate a professional sports poster showing a 16-step sequence of freestyle football tricks with cinematic lighting.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 and REFERENCE_1 as messy handwritten study-note sources, convert the content into a clean vertical Japanese educational infographic for quick sharing with teachers. Preserve the core topic about designing reading lessons for narrative texts, but organize it visually instead of reproducing the notebook pages. Create a polished white-background layout with navy section headers, rounded cards, simple flat icons, arrows, checkmarks, and color-coded boxes. Add the main title {argument name="headline text" default="読む力を育てる授業デザイン"} and subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="〜描写を根拠に、ズレを起点として、解釈を深める授業〜"}. Structure the infographic into exactly 7 numbered sections plus a final summary band: 1) lesson basic structure with four steps labeled 事実（描写）→ 解釈 → 意味づけ → 自分の言葉, 2) three stages of learning depth labeled 低：表面的理解, 中：解釈の形成, 高：意味の再構築, 3) question design with good-question conditions, question flow, and concrete example prompts, 4) points for improving dialogue quality with two comparison cards labeled NG and 目指す対話 plus keyword chips 比較, 関連づけ, 再解釈, 5) the teacher’s most important role centered on making “ズレ” visible with cards for concrete actions and NG actions, 6) assessment and observation with two cards labeled 見るポイント and 方法, and 7) meta viewpoints for lesson improvement shown as five connected cards: 前の教材との接続, 言葉への感度を上げる, 初発のズレを活かす, 「納得の共有」をつくる, 学びを振り返る. End with a prominent summary statement {argument name="summary statement" default="描写を根拠に、ズレを起点として、解釈を深める授業"} and three check items: 根拠をもとに読みとる, 対話で考えを広げる, 自分の言葉で意味づける. Make the result look like a professionally designed Japanese teaching handout, not a photo of notes.
title: Japanese Reading Lesson Infographic
description: Transforms handwritten Japanese teaching notes into a structured infographic for sharing lesson-design concepts with educators.

content: Using the provided reference image as the source, recreate the GlowUp skincare mobile app architecture board as a clean, high-resolution UI presentation. Arrange exactly 10 mobile screens in a neat 2-row grid of 5 screens each, under the centered heading “{argument name="board title" default="GlowUp✧ AI Architecture Reference"}” and subtitle “{argument name="board subtitle" default="AI Structural Recreation of the Skincare Ecosystem"}”. Include these 10 screens: 1) welcome / get started screen, 2) onboarding skin concern selection screen, 3) GlowGetter dashboard with skin score and routine cards, 4) AM routine checklist, 5) Hydra Radiance Serum product detail, 6) skin analysis radar chart, 7) track progress line chart, 8) GlowUp AI chat screen, 9) reminders list, and 10) profile / badges screen. Keep the same visual identity from the reference: pastel peach background, coral CTA buttons, white cards, delicate typography, skincare-focused labels, tiny status bars, and airy spacing. Make the output look like a polished product-design showcase rather than a screenshot of the original board.

content: Place the primary chassis or structural platform perfectly centered as the core spine, and position the main body shell separately (left or top), aligned parallel as a reference form while preserving accurate proportions, stance, and geometry of the real vehicle.￼ Design a multi-layered exploded system with components separated across depth (Z-axis) as well as planar spacing, using clear hierarchy: micro hardware (bolts, screws, washers) tightly grouped, functional assemblies moderately spaced, and major systems widely separated.￼ Organize parts into realistic subsystems depending on the {argument name="vehicle type" default="vehicle"} type, including front assembly (suspension, steering, brakes), rear assembly (suspension, drivetrain, differential), chassis/structure (frame, monocoque, subframes), powertrain (engine or motor with slight internal exposure, transmission, intake, exhaust, cooling), electronics (battery, ECU, wiring harness with clean routing), and wheel systems (4 wheels symmetrically placed with tire, rim, and hub separation).￼ Ensure engineering realism by preserving mechanical relationships, aligning shafts and rotational axes, maintaining symmetry across left/right systems, and grouping micro components logically near their assembly points in precise micro-grid arrangements. Avoid random placement. Use a refined, high-end aesthetic: soft {argument name="background gradient" default="neutral gradient"} background (white to light grey or warm beige), studio-grade product lighting with soft top illumination, subtle directional shadows, and controlled reflections. Apply realistic materials such as brushed metal, carbon fiber, rubber, and glass with slight wear—avoid toy-like finishes. Maintain strong horizontal symmetry with controlled depth asymmetry for visual complexity, and ensure balanced negative space to avoid overcrowding. Render in ultra-realistic quality with razor-sharp edges, macro-level detail, subtle ambient occlusion, and ray-traced shadows. Output in 2K or 4K resolution, 4:5 aspect ratio.￼ ￼ No text, no labels, no arrows, no branding overlays, no stylization, no perspective distortion. Style keywords: F1 engineering exploded diagram, luxury automotive technical poster, industrial design breakdown, Apple-style product visualization, ultra-precision mechanical layout, museum-grade presentation.￼
title: Luxury Automotive Exploded Diagram
description: An ultra-precise technical prompt for generating an exploded mechanical diagram of a luxury vehicle with high-end studio lighting and realistic materials.

content: Create a high-resolution square abstract sci-fi visualization of {argument name="concept" default="artificial general intelligence emerging from multimodal image generation"}: a dark navy-black digital void filled with faint radial circuit traces and tiny blue data particles, converging toward the center. In the middle, render a translucent, organic, brain-like cloud or neural membrane made of pale electric-blue volumetric mist, with soft glassy folds and semi-transparent edges. At its core, place a brilliant {argument name="core light color" default="golden-yellow"} starburst of sparkling particles, suggesting intelligence igniting inside a neural network. Four broad, ghostly streams of data extend outward from the center toward the top, bottom, left, and right, like flowing arms made of wireframe dots, glowing blue filaments, and faint circuitry. Add curved neon-blue signal lines spiraling and weaving through the streams, with depth-of-field blur and subtle motion streaks radiating into the background. Use a cinematic futuristic style, volumetric lighting, high contrast, ethereal glow, deep shadows, intricate particle detail, no text, no people, no logos, centered symmetrical composition, dramatic sense of emergence and technological transcendence.

Keep the same concept of a Claude Code usage gauge with 2 usage panels: SESSION 5H and WEEKLY 7D. Convert the plain progress bars into segmented pixel bars with 24 rectangular blocks each, preserve the approximate usage values but update the visible numbers to {argument name="session percentage" default="18%"} and {argument name="weekly percentage" default="51%"}. Add thin glowing green borders around each panel, pixel/bitmap typography, small target/crosshair icons beside the panel titles, and clock icons beside the reset lines. Replace the simple title with a decorative header reading {argument name="headline text" default="CLAUDE CODE USAGE"}, flanked by terminal-like slashes and line ornaments. At the bottom, add a retro status row with a flag/terminal outline icon, green connection dot, {argument name="connection label" default="CONNECTED"}, MODE=FAST, {argument name="time" default="12:52"}, and CHG 75% with a small battery/charging icon. Use a black background, bright CRT green lines, crisp pixel art styling, and make the result look like a refined embedded-device dashboard rather than a flat chart.

Make a 3:4 format infographic about {argument name="topic" default="camera lenses and apertures in cinema"}.

I want an area with classifications of lenses: {argument name="focal lengths" default="14–24, 35–50mm, 85–135"} (3 categories).

And at the very bottom, examples of the 4 most used configurations.

content:
Create an ultra-high fidelity exploded technical diagram of a {argument name="car model" default="2026 Audi A6"}, presented as a premium engineering poster. Audi A6 (2026)Maintain a true orthographic top/front hybrid view with zero perspective distortion.CORE COMPOSITION RULE
Place the primary chassis or structural platform perfectly centered as the core spine. Position the main body shell separately (left or top), aligned parallel as a reference form while preserving accurate proportions, stance, and real-world geometry of the 2026 Audi A6.EXPLODED ENGINEERING SYSTEM (MULTI-LAYER DEPTH STRUCTURE)
Design a multi-layered exploded system with components separated across depth (Z-axis) and planar spacing:Micro hardware (bolts, screws, washers): tightly grouped in precision clusters
Functional assemblies: moderately spaced with clear mechanical relationships
Major systems: widely separated for structural clarity and engineering hierarchy
SUBSYSTEM BREAKDOWN (MODERN AUDI ARCHITECTURE)
Organize parts into realistic automotive engineering subsystems:Front Assemblyadaptive suspension system (Audi drive select calibrated damping)
precision steering rack with electronic assist
advanced braking system (ventilated discs + regenerative integration if hybrid)
sensor suite (front radar, LiDAR-ready modules, camera array)
Rear Assemblyrear multi-link suspension system
drivetrain assembly (quattro AWD torque distribution unit)
rear differential system (or integrated e-axle for hybrid/EV variant)
stability and traction control modules
Chassis / Structurelightweight MLB Evo / next-gen Audi modular platform architecture
reinforced aluminum and high-strength steel hybrid frame
vibration isolation subframes
crash-optimized energy absorption zones
Powertrainturbocharged inline-4 / V6 hybrid-compatible engine architecture
transmission system (dual-clutch S tronic representation)
intake, exhaust, and thermal management routing
optional mild-hybrid or plug-in hybrid battery integration
partial internal exposure showing combustion or electric assist layering
Electronics SystemECU and domain control architecture (centralized compute unit)
wiring harness with ultra-clean routed geometry
driver assistance systems (ADAS module cluster)
infotainment + digital cockpit processing unit
sensor fusion computing core
Wheel System4 wheels symmetrically placed
rim, tire, brake disc, hub assembly separated in exploded layers
precise axle alignment and rotational geometry
Audi signature aerodynamic rim design
ENGINEERING REALISM RULE
Maintain strict mechanical connectivity between all systems
Align shafts, axles, and torque paths accurately
Preserve left/right symmetry with controlled functional asymmetry only
Group micro-components in structured clusters near their assemblies
Avoid decorative or random placement — everything must reflect real automotive engineering logic
VISUAL STYLE & MATERIAL LANGUAGE
Use modern Audi design precision:brushed aluminum + matte graphite structural materials
carbon-reinfo

content: A 16-panel instructional storyboard grid featuring a {argument name="subject" default="calm, athletic young woman"} performing a sequence of {argument name="activity" default="yoga poses"} in the same spot. Clean minimal studio background with soft natural lighting, consistent full-body framing across all panels. The woman wears a {argument name="outfit" default="fitted neutral-toned yoga outfit (leggings + sports top)"}, barefoot, hair tied back. Each panel shows a different pose in a smooth progression: Mountain Pose (Tadasana), Upward Stretch (Arms Overhead), Forward Fold (Uttanasana), Half Lift, Plank Pose, Chaturanga (Low Plank), Upward Facing Dog, Downward Dog, Low Lunge (Right Leg Forward), Warrior I, Warrior II, Reverse Warrior, Triangle Pose, Tree Pose (Balance), Seated Fold, Final Meditation Pose (Eyes Closed, Calm Expression). Style: modern instructional design, evenly spaced grid layout, each frame labeled with step number and pose name, subtle arrows indicating movement flow, soft shadows, neutral background, high detail, realistic proportions, elegant and calming aesthetic.

content: Create a clean vertical promotional poster in a bright minimalist 3D isometric style on a warm off-white background. At the top, place a large bold rounded sans-serif headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="Seedance 2.0 No More Waiting"}, split across two lines, with a smooth gradient from blue and violet on the left through magenta to orange on the right. Below the headline, show a stylized miniature scene of a long queue of exactly 96 tiny diverse people waiting in line, forming a wide U-shaped curve that starts near the lower center foreground, bends to the right, and continues diagonally far into the left background. The people should wear casual clothing in muted oranges, blues, tans, browns, whites, and grays, with toy-like proportions and shallow depth of field so distant figures become softly blurred. Along the queue are exactly 14 simple white cubic booth-like buildings with flat roofs, small rectangular windows, and open doors, receding in perspective from the lower right foreground to the upper left background; the closest booth on the right has a small group entering. Place exactly 1 purple-uniformed staff member near the middle-right doorway, gesturing toward the entrance as if directing the crowd. Use soft studio lighting, gentle shadows, a premium tech-advertising look, lots of white space, and a subtle tilt-shift miniature effect. At the bottom center, place the {argument name="brand name" default="HailuoAI"} logo: a colorful circular spiral icon in pink, orange, purple, and blue followed by black modern wordmark text.
title: Seedance 2.0 Waiting Line Poster
description: A vertical tech announcement poster showing a colorful Seedance 2.0 headline above a miniature crowd queue and HailuoAI branding.
