content:
Please create a high-completion, high-information-density visual map of an 'Isometric Micro-World Archive' suitable for serialized publishing based on the [Theme].

This is not a regular room illustration or a simple architectural drawing, but a thematic space overview combining 'isometric perspective + architectural cross-section structure + multi-layer functional space + high-density thematic props + miniature model feel + game scene concept art feel.' The image should look like an opened miniature world, a business simulation game scene, a dollhouse model, or a world-building concept map, allowing viewers to understand the overall structure at a glance while repeatedly observing the small details within.

[Basic Settings]
Theme: [Theme, e.g., Insect Research Institute / Future Survival Base / Magic Potion Workshop / AI Automation Company / Plant Factory / Children's Learning Center / Space Supply Station]
Space Name / Brand Name: [Brand name or space name, can be empty]
Worldview Direction: [Reality / Sci-Fi / Fairy Tale / Magic / Post-Apocalyptic / Museum / Laboratory / Business Simulation / Campus / Natural Ecology]
Building Type: [Cottage / Base / Factory / Lab / Shop / Museum / Underground Space / Spaceship / Multi-layer Studio]
Core Function: [What this space is mainly used for, e.g., research, production, display, life, training, trading, learning, maintenance, planting]
Main Color: [Main color, e.g., light blue, mint green, cream yellow, pink, orange-green, purple-blue, white-blue tech color]
Auxiliary Color: [Auxiliary color, can be empty]
Accent Color: [Accent color, can be empty]
Aspect Ratio: [1:1 / 3:4 / 4:5 / 9:16]
Information Density: [Medium-high / High / Ultra-high]
Overall Vibe: [Healing, cute, precise, childlike, popular science, futuristic, retro, refreshing, sense of exploration]

If some fields are not filled, please automatically derive them reasonably based on the [Theme]; do not leave the screen blank. All content must be generated uniformly around the theme, avoiding irrelevant elements.

[Visual Structure]
Adopt a clear isometric perspective / axonometric view, where the main subject is an opened multi-layer thematic building or functional base. Viewers can simultaneously see the front, side, top, and internal space of the building. The entire building is located at the center of the screen, occupying most of the area, with the background environment moderately faded to highlight the subject.

The interior of the building needs to be divided into multiple functional areas, each with a clear purpose, rather than randomly piled decorations. It can include:
1. Main work area / Core operation area
2. Display area / Collection area / Specimen area
3. Research area / Lab area / Control area
4. Storage area / Shelving area / Supply area
5. Living area / Rest area / Small residential area
6. Energy area / Machine area / Piping area
7. Planting area / Cultivation area / Ecological area
8. Entrance area / Transport area / Maintenance area
9. Spatial connection structures like stairs, platforms, corridors, railings, ladders, etc.

Clear spatial relationships must be formed between various areas through stairs, corridors, platforms, pipes, bridges, or cables, making the image look like a real, functioning miniature system.

[Props and Details]
Generate a large number of relevant props based on the [Theme] and distribute them in different functional areas. Props need to be specific, identifiable, and thematically related, not just vague decorations. Each small object should be as clear and readable as a game asset, with a feel of being clickable, interactive, and collectable.

Types of props can include:
- Thematic equipment: machines, instruments, tools, consoles, containers, screens, workbenches
- Lifestyle objects: tables/chairs, bookshelves, beds, cups, boxes, cabinets, lamps
- Display objects: specimens, models, posters, signboards, glass cabinets, display racks
- Connection structures: pipes, wires, ladders, stairs, conveyor belts, slide rails, platforms
- Ecological elements: plants, water tanks, incubators, soil, branches, rocks, specimens
- Character elements: small number of characters, animals, robots, or thematic creatures to provide a sense of scale and story

The number of props should be rich but orderly. All props should serve the space's function and the thematic worldview.

[Style Requirements]
The overall style is clear, cute, precise hand-drawn cartoon isometric illustration. Lines are clean, edges are slightly rounded, colors are bright and soft, with an overall relaxed, healing, and exploratory feel. The image should have the feel of a business simulation game, a children's science picture book, a miniature model, or a concept art page.

Avoid over-realism, strong dark lighting/shadows, heavy oil painting feel, and complex noise. The focus is on being clear, exquisite, layered, and highly readable.

[Color and Lighting]
Use high brightness, low-to-medium saturation soft color schemes. The main color is unified, auxiliary colors are used to distinguish different spaces, and accent colors are used to highlight key equipment and small props. Line art colors should not use dead black; instead, use soft outlines like dark gray, blue-gray, or brown-gray.

Keep lighting and shadows lightweight; strong realistic projections are not needed. Build layers through color blocks, structures, lines, and local highlights. The background should use light colors and low-contrast processing to make the main building stand out more.

[Composition and Reading Path]
The main subject is centered or slightly upper-centered, with the building in a multi-layer cross-section structure. The visual reading path should start from the overall building outline, enter the functional areas of each floor, and finally observe the detailed props. The gaze can be guided by elements such as stairs, platforms, corridors, pipelines, and tracks.

The overall image should be full but not crowded, rich but not messy. Every room, platform, and corner should have content, yet still maintain clear spatial boundaries.

[Background Environment]
The background can include a weakened external environment according to the theme, such as a forest, city, street, underground rock layer, experimental park, seabed, space, campus, factory exterior, etc. The background should not compete with the subject; light colors, low opacity, and low contrast are recommended to achieve a 'subject clear, background receding' effect.

[Final Effect]
The final image should look like a complete thematic space concept map, with both the structural feel of an architectural cross-section and the detail of a game scene asset map, combined with the cute exploration feel of a miniature dollhouse. It should be suitable for serialized visual creation, IP worldview display, game scene settings, brand space concept maps, science content covers, or Little Red Book/Pinterest style visual posts.

Ensure the image has:
1. Clear isometric perspective
2. Clear architectural cross-section structure
3. Complete multi-layer functional areas
4. Rich props and thematic unity
5. Soft and bright colors
6. Clean and clear line art
7. Weakened background, prominent subject
8. High information density but not messy
9. A sense of an explorable, operable, and observable miniature world.
title: Isometric Micro-World Cross-Section Archive
description: A professional and highly detailed instruction prompt for generating isometric, cross-section views of miniature thematic worlds with high information density.

content: A simple centered full-body illustration of a cute chibi {argument name="animal type" default="rabbit"} character on a plain {argument name="background color" default="light gray"} background, drawn in a flat cartoon style with thick clean black outlines and minimal shading. The character has a white body, a large rounded head, 2 tall upright ears with bright cyan inner ear shapes, 2 large oval eyes with cyan irises, black pupils, and small highlights, tiny curved eyebrows, a small red-pink nose area, and a slight smiling mouth. The pose is front-facing with both arms stretched straight out horizontally to the sides, legs apart in a simple standing pose, and a short fluffy tail visible on the right side of the body as a curved semicircle made of short black dash marks. Overlay a clear OpenPose-style skeleton marker system on top of the character: 2 purple eye keypoints, 1 red nose keypoint, 1 blue neck keypoint, 2 shoulder keypoints, 2 elbow keypoints, 2 wrist keypoints, 1 yellow spine or pelvis center point, 2 hip keypoints, 2 knee keypoints, and 2 ankle keypoints, for a total of 17 colored points connected by thin colored lines across the face, shoulders, torso, arms, and legs. Use vivid point colors including purple, magenta, red, blue, cyan, green, yellow, orange, and teal so the pose overlay is clearly visible. Keep the composition vertically centered, symmetrical, clean, and diagram-like, with the cute mascot character and pose-estimation overlay as the sole subject.
title: Chibi Rabbit OpenPose Diagram
description: A clean cartoon prompt for generating a front-facing chibi animal character with a visible OpenPose-style keypoint skeleton, useful for pose-estimation demos, dataset examples, or AI vision illustrations.

content: A high-end infographic-style visual featuring an oversized {argument name="product" default="Puma sneaker"} placed beside a {argument name="subject description" default="young woman"}. The shoe is scaled to be nearly the same size as her entire seated body, emphasizing dramatic proportion. The woman sits casually leaning against the shoe, one arm resting on it, creating a natural interaction. Her face must closely match the provided reference image — accurate facial structure, skin tone, hairstyle, and expression — clean, polished, and visually appealing. Composition is modern and minimal, with a soft gradient or clean studio background. Include subtle infographic elements such as thin annotation lines, labels, or callouts highlighting features of the shoe (material, cushioning, sole design), but keep them elegant and not cluttered. Lighting is soft studio lighting with gentle shadows, giving a premium commercial look. The sneaker texture should be ultra-detailed (fabric, stitching, logo clarity). The model is styled in minimal, contemporary clothing that complements the shoe color palette. Color grading is crisp and slightly vibrant, with a professional advertising aesthetic. Balanced composition, sharp focus, depth of field subtly applied. Style: premium product infographic, fashion editorial meets product showcase, clean UI-inspired annotations. Resolution: ultra high resolution, 4K, highly detailed, realistic. 85mm lens, f/2.8 for soft depth. photorealistic, commercial ad quality. no distortion, accurate proportions. clean typography annotations

content: A dramatic photojournalistic street-level scene in lower Manhattan showing the World Trade Center during the September 11 attacks, viewed from several blocks away on a bright clear blue morning. The composition centers on the Twin Towers, with the left tower engulfed near the upper floors by a massive orange-and-black fireball, thick dark gray smoke billowing horizontally across the sky, and debris falling downward. The right tower stands adjacent with its antenna visible, partially obscured by smoke. In the foreground, exactly 6 visible bystanders stand in the street and on the sidewalk with their backs to the camera, watching in shock; the closest is a man in a light blue dress shirt at lower left. Surrounding the avenue are mid-rise city buildings, including a beige building with black construction scaffolding on the left, older brick and stone facades at street level, a tall curved streetlamp near center, traffic signs, and a dense urban canyon leading the eye toward the towers. Realistic documentary photography, high detail, natural daylight, long-lens compression, urgent historical-news atmosphere, sharp focus, no text, no watermark.
title: 9/11 Twin Towers Street Photo

content: A dark tech-comparison poster on a black background with a subtle gray square grid, showing two vertically oriented infographic images side by side for an AI image generation comparison. At the top, place two large bold yellow headings: “GPT image 2” above the left panel and “Nano Banana” above the right panel. The left panel is an elegant antique-style Hanfu reference poster on warm aged paper, with a large Chinese calligraphy title at the top reading “汉服·解构图鉴”, smaller subtitle text beneath, and a full-body woman in pale traditional Hanfu standing in the center, her face intentionally blurred. Surround her with many small labeled diagram blocks, fabric swatches, embroidery closeups, accessory notes, silhouette studies, and fine Chinese annotations in a scholarly museum-poster layout. Use beige, cream, light gray-blue, and faded ink tones, giving the panel a refined archival aesthetic. The right panel is a cleaner modern infographic poster on light beige paper with a bold Chinese title across the top reading “中国传统汉服：大明朝服解构图谱”. In the center, show a bright red Ming-style robe drawn as a technical exploded garment diagram with multiple callout arrows and labeled parts. Around it, include material samples, decorative pattern examples, a horizontal row of 6 circular color swatches, construction details, and a bottom strip with 4 small human figure diagrams showing wearing sequence or silhouette comparison. Make the right poster feel more graphic-design driven, with sharper contrast and more vivid red accents. At the bottom of the overall image, add a large rounded black text box with a thin white outline spanning most of the width. Attach a yellow rounded label tab on its upper-left corner containing the Chinese word “提示词” in bold black text. Inside the black box, place a dense paragraph of white Chinese text describing the test prompt for generating a Hanfu-themed decomposition chart, resembling a screenshot quote block. The whole composition should look like a social media comparison graphic, centered, cleanly aligned, high resolution, with strong contrast between the dark background and the two poster panels.
title: AI Hanfu Poster Comparison
description: A side-by-side social media comparison graphic contrasting two AI-generated Chinese Hanfu infographic posters with headings and a prompt text box, ideal for benchmarking image model results.

content: A vertical social-media comparison poster on a black background with a subtle gray grid, designed like a clean tech review graphic. At the top are two large side-by-side headings: on the left, bright yellow text reading “GPT image 2”; on the right, white text reading “Nano Banana”. Below the headings are 2 tall poster mockups placed side by side with narrow spacing, each in an off-white paper style. The left mockup shows a traditional Chinese ink-wash fantasy poster inspired by Journey to the West, with large vertical Chinese calligraphy “西游记” near the upper left, muted sepia and gray watercolor mountains, cliffs, mist, temple architecture, and 4 tiny human figures visible in the composition: 2 heroic figures near the upper middle on a rocky ledge, plus 2 travelers lower in the scene; a swirling luminous mist vortex appears near the lower area. The right mockup shows a more graphic surreal poster built inside the side-profile silhouette of a human head facing left, filled with a Chinese fantasy landscape including pagodas, water, paths, figures, and the vertical title “西游记” inside the silhouette; the silhouette is painted in dark navy and black watercolor with cream paper around it. Each of the 2 posters has a large centered vertical rectangular blur censor block over the middle area, with soft edges and gray-beige color. Along the bottom is a rounded black caption panel with a thin white outline. Attached to its upper left corner is a bright yellow pill-shaped label containing the Chinese text “提示词” in bold black. Inside the bottom panel is a block of bold white Chinese text in multiple lines. The text should read: “西游记主题收藏版史诗海报，人物侧脸剪影中生长出完整世界观与经典场景。整体偏电影海报和梦幻水彩插画风，安静、宏大、神圣、怀旧，带纸张颗粒、轻雾感、飞白刷痕与高级留白。” The overall style is a polished Chinese tech comparison thumbnail, high contrast, editorial layout, centered composition, 4:5 portrait aspect ratio.
title: AI Poster Comparison Thumbnail
description: A polished social-media comparison graphic showing two side-by-side Journey to the West poster outputs with Chinese labels, useful for AI image model comparison posts or review thumbnails.

content: A comparison graphic on a black background with a faint gray square grid, designed like a social media test result poster. At the top are 2 large side-by-side titles in bold sans serif text: “GPT image 2” above the left image and “Nano Banana” above the right image. Below them are 2 vertically oriented illustrated posters placed next to each other with a small gap. Both posters depict the same concept: a hand-drawn foodie walking map of Guangzhou in Chinese, but rendered in 2 different visual styles. The left poster is more detailed, textured, dense, and richly illustrated, while the right poster is cleaner, flatter, and simpler. The left poster has a warm cream paper background and an intricate vintage hand-painted travel-map style with fine linework, watercolor texture, decorative flowers and lychee fruits, miniature buildings, roads, river areas, and many food illustrations. The large Chinese title at the top of the left poster reads “广州 吃货暴走地图”. The map includes roughly 12 featured food spots distributed across the city, each shown as a small food illustration with Chinese labels and short handwritten-style annotations. Visible foods include skewers, roast poultry, noodle dishes, clay pot dishes, rice rolls, dumplings, soups, and dessert bowls, with landmarks such as the Canton Tower and riverfront scenery integrated into the map. The right poster also has the Chinese title “广州 吃货暴走地图” and shows the same general idea but in a cleaner infographic-like map style with simplified roads, icons, floral and lychee border decorations, food callouts, a river, the Canton Tower, and approximately 12 labeled food illustrations around the map. At the bottom of the overall comparison graphic is 1 rounded black text panel with a white outline. Attached to its upper left edge is 1 bright yellow rounded tab label reading “提示词” in bold black Chinese characters. Inside the black panel is a block of white Chinese text describing the image-generation prompt; it appears as a multi-line paragraph. The composition is centered, high contrast, and presented as a polished AI image comparison post for Chinese social media, with crisp typography, poster-like symmetry, and a clean test-benchmark aesthetic.
title: AI Guangzhou Food Map Comparison
description: A social-media-style comparison poster showing two side-by-side AI-generated Guangzhou foodie map illustrations with a Chinese prompt box, useful for benchmarking image model outputs.

content: Create a polished Xiaohongshu-style Chinese travel infographic poster in a soft watercolor map aesthetic, square format, showing a five-day high-speed-rail travel route through China. Large brush-calligraphy headline at the top left: {argument name="headline text" default="五一出行计划"}. Directly below it, a green ribbon subtitle with white Chinese text: {argument name="route text" default="广州→湖南→武汉→北京"}. Add a smaller line of Chinese text under the subtitle: “一路向北·发现中国之美”. The background is a pale illustrated map of central and northern China in beige and light sage green, with faint mountain textures, soft rivers, and subtle floral decoration in the corners. A vertical curved railway line runs from the bottom center upward to the top center, connecting 4 cities with orange-red location pins and bold red Chinese city names. The 4 cities are, from bottom to top: 广州, 湖南, 武汉, 北京. Along the route, place small white high-speed train icons on the track and 3 green travel-time labels: “广州→湖南 高铁约2.5小时”, “湖南→武汉 高铁约1.5小时”, and “武汉→北京 高铁约4.5小时”. Near each city, include a scenic collage or illustrated landmark cluster: Guangzhou with a modern skyline and Canton Tower; Hunan with green mountains and cultural scenery; Wuhan with Yellow Crane Tower and historic architecture; Beijing with the Forbidden City / imperial palace architecture. Add small scenic tag labels near the city illustrations reading “花城广州·美食之都”, “山水湖南·人文荟萃”, “江城武汉·英雄之城”, and “中国首都·历史与现代交融”. Under the main title, show exactly 4 minimalist icon badges with short Chinese labels, evenly spaced in one row: a camera icon labeled “精选景点”, a train icon labeled “高铁直达”, a suitcase icon labeled “轻松出行”, and a star icon labeled “美食推荐”. Around the map, place 4 rounded rectangular itinerary cards with green headers, cream backgrounds, and photo thumbnails. Each card must contain day-by-day plans, a starred section for recommended attractions, and a starred section for recommended food. The 4 cards are: 1) top right card titled “北京｜2天”, with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 2) right middle card titled “武汉｜1.5天”, with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 3) left middle card titled “湖南｜2天”, with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 4) bottom left card titled “广州｜1天”, with exactly 1 day row, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo. Fill the itinerary text with compact Chinese travel-plan copy in a practical social-media infographic style. At the lower right, add a rounded notes panel containing exactly 2 sections with green titles: “行程亮点” and “出行小贴士”. Under “行程亮点”, list exactly 4 bullet points with small icon markers. Under “出行小贴士”, list exactly 4 bullet points with small icon markers. Decorate the notes area with a small luggage illustration and a handwritten-style diagonal Chinese phrase in green, such as “出发吧！去感受春天的风景”. At the bottom center, place a small rounded summary bar titled “行程总览”, including exactly 4 summary items with icons: total duration “总时长：约6.5天”, total distance “总里程：约2100公里”, recommended transportation “推荐交通：高铁”, and best travel period “最佳出行时间：4.29 - 5.5”. In the bottom left foreground, place a large sleek white high-speed train angled diagonally upward, partially overlapping the border as a hero element. Add a calligraphic closing slogan near the train in Chinese: “最美的风景在路上 最好的时光在五一”. Use an elegant olive-green, sage, beige, and warm red palette, combining traditional Chinese travel-poster charm with modern infographic clarity, crisp typography, soft shadows, rounded cards, realistic photo inserts, and clean editorial layout.
title: China May Day Rail Travel Infographic
description: A square Chinese social-media travel poster showing a five-day high-speed-rail itinerary from Guangzhou to Beijing, useful for Xiaohongshu-style trip planning graphics.

content:
Based on the {argument name="subject" default="subject"}, create a high-quality visual of a "Landscape Archive Model" suitable for serial publication.

This is not a regular map, landscape illustration, or urban rendering, but a high-end archival visual combining "2D map drawings + 3D regional models + professional explanation systems + museum exhibition feel." The image should resemble a realistically crafted geographical research model, urban planning sandbox, architectural proposal model, or world-building exhibit, possessing a professional, restrained, precise, and tactile premium quality.

[Basic Settings]
Subject: {argument name="subject details" default="subject, e.g., Crater Lake / Guangzhou / Chongqing Mountain City / Island City / Ancient Ruins / Post-apocalyptic Ruins / Fantasy Continent / Game Capital"}
Subject Type: [Natural Landscape / Urban Space / Mixed Landscape]
Core Subject: {argument name="core subject" default="core subject, e.g., crater, canyon, mountain range, lake, CBD, old town, landmark group, island city, ruin group, main city area"}
Content Focus: [Terrain Elevation / Urban Landmarks / Road Network / Hydrology / Relationship between Nature and City / Setting Collection Display]
Style Direction: [Geographic Surveying Style, Paper-cut Model Style, Architectural Proposal Style, Museum Archive Style, Urban Planning Style, Game Setting Collection Style]
Primary Color: [Off-white, Light Gray, Parchment White, Sand, Snow White]
Secondary Color: [Earthy Brown, Rock Gray, Cold Gray, Light Blue, Moss Green]
Accent Color: [Black thin lines, Red routes, Blue hydrological lines, Yellow numbering marks]
Aspect Ratio: [16:9 Landscape / 3:4 Portrait / 4:5 Portrait / 1:1 Square]

[Visual Structure]
The main subject is a rectangular map model board placed on a clean tabletop or white cloth surface. The base plate has realistic thickness with a visible section structure, like a refined map slice or model base. The map surface is covered with a clear but restrained layer of information, including contour lines, road networks, hydrological lines, zoning boundaries, geographical textures, a sense of coordinates, slight annotations, and drawing borders.

In the center or off-center area of the map, a 3D main model "grows" out of the 2D map, serving as the visual core of the entire image.

If the [Subject Type] is Natural Landscape:
The subject may consist of mountains, canyons, craters, lakes, basins, islands, glaciers, faults, and coastlines, emphasizing terrain elevation, layered contour structures, rock wall textures, and natural terrain fluctuations.

If the [Subject Type] is Urban Space:
The subject may consist of core urban areas, CBDs, old city blocks, landmark clusters, waterfronts, road network nodes, bridges, water systems, and parks, emphasizing building volumes, urban recognizability, spatial hierarchy, and planning structures.

If the [Subject Type] is Mixed Landscape:
It should integrate both natural terrain and man-made environments, such as mountain cities, island cities, ancient ruins, post-apocalyptic ruins, fantasy capitals, or sci-fi bases, allowing natural geography and urban structure to jointly form the core visual.

[Detail Requirements]
- Retain the feel of map drawings and professional information on the model surface.
- Terrain areas should have contour lines, slope layers, and relationships of depression and elevation.
- Building areas should have a sense of volume, block relationships, and clear hierarchy.
- Water bodies use low-saturation light blue.
- Green spaces, forests, parks, and mountains use moss green or low-saturation green.
- Road networks, paths, traffic axes, or exploration lines can be represented by fine lines but should not overwhelm the main subject.
- Landmark buildings or key structures should have clear recognizability.
- For fantasy, sci-fi, or game settings, maintain the archive model and drawing display feel rather than a pure scene illustration.

[Explanation System]
The edges of the map board need a complete and restrained explanation module, including:
- Outer and inner frames
- Scale bar
- Legend area
- Title area
- Archive number
- Index markers
- Annotation labels
- Simple symbolic explanations
Text doesn't need to be fully readable, but the overall structure must present a realistic, clear, precise, and orderly archival layout.

[Composition and Camera]
Use an oblique isometric or sandbox-style composition. The camera observes the entire model board from about 30 to 45 degrees above, allowing the audience to see the map plane, 3D subject height, edge thickness, and explanation areas. The visual focus is on the central main model, with the reading path being: first the core subject, then the surrounding terrain/road/water/block information, and finally the legend, scale, and explanation area.

[Material and Lighting]
The overall look needs realistic model photography texture:
- Paper texture
- Map printing texture
- Paper-cut or sandbox model feel
- Architectural model or terrain slice texture
- Soft natural light
- Delicate realistic shadows
- Clean background
- Low saturation, high-end, and restrained
Avoid cartoonishness, cheap game UI feel, excessive clutter, or excessive showboating. Highlight the unified visual of "map base board + 3D subject + professional explanation system."

The final effect should resemble a landscape archive model image that can be used for geographical education, urban research, architectural proposals, cultural tourism visual themes, world-building setting collections, or high-end series covers.
title: Landscape Archive Model Map
description: A detailed prompt for creating professional museum-style landscape models that combine 2D cartography with 3D terrain slices and annotations.

content: Create a highly detailed scientific anatomical poster of a {argument name="subject" default="neuron"} on a clean warm off-white paper background, presented as a museum-quality hybrid of 3D pencil drawing and ultra-realistic biological illustration. The composition centers on one large neuron in three-quarter view, with an oversized spherical purple nucleus inside a textured cell body, many branching dendrites spreading outward like winter tree branches, and a long axon extending diagonally down to the right. The axon is partially cut away to reveal its internal structure and is wrapped in segmented blue-gray myelin sheaths with visible gaps at the nodes of Ranvier. At the far end, the axon branches into exactly 15 thin terminal fibers, each ending in a rounded synaptic bulb with pale peach and pink tips. The main central figure should look sculptural, organic, and slightly glossy, with intricate membrane textures, subtle beige, ivory, silver, brown, and violet coloration, and extremely fine linework for the distal branches. Surround the centerpiece with 6 labeled educational inset sections arranged like a textbook infographic: top left a title block reading {argument name="title text" default="NEURON (NERVE CELL)"} with a short explanatory paragraph and a numbered structure list containing exactly 10 items; upper right a smaller monochrome full-neuron sketch labeled {argument name="style note" default="3D PENCIL DRAWING"}; lower left a cell body soma detail diagram with labels pointing to internal organelles; bottom left a myelin sheath cross-section cylinder diagram; lower center a square grayscale microscopic view panel with 4 labels; right center an electrical signal section with a small action potential graph showing membrane potential versus time; lower right a synapse close-up drawing with receptor and neurotransmitter labeling. Include fine serif typography, delicate leader lines, small circled numbers on the main neuron, and the feel of an elegant old scientific plate mixed with modern biomedical visualization. Keep the layout airy and balanced, with the central neuron dominating most of the canvas, landscape orientation, extremely high resolution, crisp educational poster design, and a refined neutral aesthetic.
title: Scientific Neuron Anatomy Poster
description: This prompt generates a detailed educational neuron infographic poster with a central 3D biological rendering and multiple labeled anatomical inset diagrams for textbook, editorial, or classroom use.

content: A side-by-side social media comparison graphic on a dark black background, showing a camera-angle transformation test for a busy restaurant interior. At the very top, large white sans-serif text reads: {argument name="headline text" default="Show me the POV from someone standing behind the bar looking out over this crowded restaurant. Change NOTHING in the scene other than the pov"}. Below that, centered on the page, are 2 vertically stacked rectangular photos with rounded corners. To the left of the top image, large white text reads "Source"; to the left of the bottom image, large white text reads "Output". The top image shows the original restaurant scene from the customer side facing the back bar: a warm, upscale, crowded restaurant at night with a massive illuminated wall of liquor bottles on shelves, wood ceiling beams, hanging globe pendant lights, bartenders and servers working, and many seated guests in the foreground and midground. The lower image shows the same restaurant with the same lighting, décor, crowd density, bottle wall, pendant lights, and overall atmosphere, but from a new viewpoint: the camera is now standing behind the bar looking outward across the crowded dining room. In the foreground of the lower image, include the bar counter surface with glassware, bottles, metal bar tools, and a glowing POS touchscreen at front left, reinforcing the behind-the-bar POV. Keep both photos photorealistic, warm amber lighting, lively evening ambiance, and maintain the sense that the lower image is the same scene with only the camera angle changed. Add subtle social-post styling with generous margins and clean layout, suitable for a tweet screenshot or AI image comparison post.
title: Restaurant POV Change Comparison
description: A social-style comparison graphic showing a crowded restaurant scene before and after a dramatic camera angle shift, useful for demonstrating AI viewpoint consistency.

content: A two-panel comparison graphic on a black background demonstrating a dramatic camera-angle change in an anime-style crowded street scene. Place a large white sentence centered across the top: "{argument name="headline text" default="Move the camera POV to be at ground level in the crowd."}". On the left side, add two large white labels aligned with the panels: "Source" beside the upper panel and "Output" beside the lower panel. Create exactly 2 stacked rectangular image panels centered on the canvas. In the top panel, show a high-angle overhead view of a densely packed historical street crowd in a hand-painted anime film style, with dozens of people pressed together around horse-drawn carts and wagon wheels; include bundled luggage, hats, muted earth-tone clothing, blue and tan garments, and a busy composition where figures overlap in every direction. In the bottom panel, recreate the same type of scene but shift the camera to a low, ground-level point of view inside the crowd, looking between bodies and beside a large wagon wheel on the right edge. The foreground should feel immersive and cramped, with several bent or crouched figures close to the camera, a person in a muted purple robe on the left foreground, a kneeling or hunched figure in tan near the center bottom, and a woman in a light blue dress or coat toward the right-middle turning through the crowd while holding a small child. Keep the environment as a chaotic old-world market or transit street with horses, carts, people in brimmed hats and simple period clothing, dusty ground, and warm subdued colors. Use soft cinematic anime lighting, painterly shading, and the visual feel of a classic Studio Ghibli crowd sequence. The overall image should read as a before-and-after camera experiment, with the upper panel as the original overhead composition and the lower panel as the transformed low-angle perspective.
title: Anime Crowd Camera POV Comparison
description: This prompt generates a two-panel black-background comparison graphic showing an anime crowd scene before and after changing the camera to a ground-level perspective, useful for demonstrating viewpoint transformation in image models.

content: Create a modern government program landing page UI mockup for Indonesia in a clean, professional web design style, desktop widescreen aspect ratio. The page uses a white background with bold red accents, soft rounded corners, subtle gray dividers, and a polished frontend-dribbble presentation look. At the very top, build a horizontal navigation bar with 6 visible elements: the Indonesian Garuda emblem and the text "PEMERINTAH REPUBLIK INDONESIA" on the left, then 4 centered menu items labeled "Program", "Dampak", "Menu", and "Pemantauan", and on the far right a large red rounded button labeled "Program MBG" with a small people icon. Below it, design a hero section split into two columns. On the left, show a small program label line with a red bowl icon, the text "MBG", a vertical divider, and "Makan Bergizi Gratis". Under that, place a large bold headline reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Makan Bergizi, Anak Indonesia Kuat"}" in dark navy, spanning 3 lines. Add a short paragraph in Indonesian below: "Program MBG mendukung gizi harian siswa SD dan SMP melalui menu seimbang, pemantauan sekolah, dan laporan dampak yang transparan." Then place 2 call-to-action buttons side by side: a solid red button labeled "Lihat Dampak" with a right arrow, and an outlined white button with red border labeled "Panduan Sekolah" with a right arrow. On the right side of the hero, place a rounded large photo-style image framed by a sweeping white curved divider and red corner background. The image shows an Indonesian elementary classroom with 5 visible schoolchildren in white uniforms with red ties, seated at desks, warm daylight from windows, shallow depth of field, documentary-photo realism. In the foreground, on a wooden desk, show a stainless steel compartment tray meal with exactly 5 food items: white rice, mixed vegetables, a piece of fried chicken, a banana, and watermelon cubes. Beside the tray, place 1 milk carton labeled "SUSU SEGAR". Under the hero, add a full-width red statistics band with 4 equally spaced metric cards separated by thin vertical dividers. Each card has a white circular icon and bold white text. content:
Please create a high-completion, high-information-density "Pixel World Asset Atlas" suitable for serialized release based on [Game Theme: {argument name="game theme" default="Demon Slayer/Tanjiro"}].

This is not a regular pixel illustration or a single game scene, but a "2D pixel game asset overview map" for game development, art setting, level design, and visual proposals. The visual should look like a complete game material board, systematically organizing core characters, enemies, items, terrain, scenes, mechanisms, Bosses, and decorative elements required for a [Game Type: {argument name="game type" default="Side-scrolling action"}] into a single clear, professional, and reusable game asset atlas.

[Basic Settings]
Theme Worldview: [Game Theme]
Game Type: [Game Type]
Era Background: [Era Background]
Protagonist Identity: [Protagonist Identity]
Enemy Types: [Enemy Types]
Main Scenes: [Main Scene Environment]
Overall Style: [Style Direction, e.g., {argument name="style" default="16-bit retro arcade pixel style"}]
Main Color: [Main Color]
Secondary Color: [Secondary Color]
Accent Color: [Accent Color]
Aspect Ratio: [Aspect Ratio, Landscape 4:3]
If not filled, automatically match according to the optimal plan for the game theme.

[Overall Visual Requirements]
The visual uses a large landscape canvas with a light or low-interference background, looking like a game development asset sheet or an instruction-style resource catalog. All elements should be 2D pixel art sprites with uniform pixel density, clear black/dark outlines, limited color scales, and retro game textures. Do not generate realistic photography, 3D rendering, painterly illustration, or movie poster styles. Focus on being "systematically complete, clearly categorized, resource-rich, and high in developability."

[Layout Structure]
The map uses a modular grid layout with fine lines dividing different resource areas. Each area needs a numbered title and short category labels, with a reading path from left to right, top to bottom. The layout should have the orderliness of an instruction manual or game dev document. Information density must be high but not chaotic; elements within each module should be equidistantly arranged.

[Modules to Include]
1. Player Character Module: Show complete action frames including standing, walking/running, jumping, etc. frames arranged horizontally like a sprite sheet.
2. Enemy Unit Module: Design multiple enemies including common, ranged, heavy, and elite units.
3. Weapons & Items Module: Show melee, ranged, projectiles, effects, and pickups.
4. Basic Terrain Tile Module: Show ground, walls, platforms, corners, and different material blocks.
5. Natural/External Scene Resource Module: Show trees, grass, rocks, and obstacles.
6. Building/Base/Camp Resource Module: Show doors, windows, walls, ladders, and camp facilities.
7. Special Terrain Module: Show bridges, water bodies, cliffs, and cave openings.
8. Indoor/Underground/Facility Resource Module: Show pipes, consoles, metal doors, and equipment.
9. Boss / Encounter Resource Module: Show large Bosses, special vehicles, and giant mechanisms.
10. General Decoration & Interaction Elements Module: Show ladders, ropes, signs, switches, and mechanisms.

[Visual Detail Requirements]
All resources must maintain consistent pixel size logic and worldview consistency. Clear scale relationships. Action frames must show continuity; terrain tiles must be tileable; items and mechanisms must have functional recognizability; Boss elements should feel oppressive.
title: Pixel Game Asset Atlas Template
description: A comprehensive professional template for generating high-density 16-bit pixel art asset sheets for game development, including characters, animations, and environments.

content: A bright futuristic classroom or science museum learning lab filled with school-age children interacting with large mixed-reality holograms, cinematic ultra-detailed photorealism. The scene is a wide-angle interior during warm late-afternoon sunlight, with floor-to-ceiling glass windows, modern tables, bookshelves, digital displays, and a clean high-tech educational atmosphere. About 9 children and 1 adult teacher are spread across the room, actively exploring science exhibits with gestures and touch interactions. In the center, a glowing semi-transparent holographic human heart floats at chest height while 3 children gather around it, reaching toward it in curiosity. Suspended overhead is a large holographic solar system mobile with exactly 9 planets orbiting a bright sun, with luminous orbit trails and a magical scientific visualization style. On the left side, one child interacts with a tall vertical holographic DNA double helix. On the front-left table, there is a circular tabletop hologram of a miniature mountain-and-river ecosystem containing exactly 4 visible animals: an elephant, a deer, a llama or alpaca, and a bear. On the back-left table, there is a circular holographic architectural city model featuring a grand classical domed building and surrounding structures. On the right-front table, there is a large ball-and-stick molecular model made of glowing spheres and rods. In the mid-right and upper-right space, include additional floating science holograms: exactly 2 geometric polyhedra, exactly 2 molecule diagrams, exactly 2 spherical energy or data globes, and 1 hourglass-like abstract hologram. The children should be ethnically diverse, dressed casually, engaged, amazed, collaborative, and looking at different holographic subjects. Use soft volumetric sunlight, realistic reflections on glass and tabletops, subtle blue and gold glow from the holograms, shallow atmospheric haze, and a premium inspirational STEM-education advertisement aesthetic.
title: Futuristic STEM Classroom with Holograms
description: This prompt generates a cinematic photorealistic classroom scene of children exploring immersive holographic science exhibits, ideal for STEM education campaigns, concept art, or innovation marketing.

content: A stark black-and-white editorial anti-tech poster on an off-white background, designed like a modern brutalist magazine cover about digital addiction. The composition is vertical and highly typographic, with one central surreal image and multiple blocks of small text. At the top center, huge bold condensed sans-serif text reads DOOM on one line and SCROLLING below it, with the word SCROLLING stretched across the page and partially motion-blurred or smeared horizontally. In the upper left corner, a tiny text block reads “SCROLL. SWIPE. NOTHING CHANGES.” with a short horizontal line above it. In the upper right corner, small text reads “24 / 7 / 365” above “THE FEED NEVER ENDS” with a horizontal divider line below. On the left side under the title, add a definition paragraph in small editorial text: “the act of spending an excessive amount of time scrolling through negative or distressing content online, often leading to feelings of anxiety, helplessness, and fatigue.” Beneath that, include 2 short horizontal divider lines, then a large statistic reading “67%” followed by smaller text: “OF PEOPLE AGED 18–24 SAY THEY SCROLL MORE THAN THEY INTEND TO. — PEW RESEARCH, 2023”. Below that, another statement reads “MORE SCROLLING. LESS LIVING.” with a divider line beneath. The center of the poster features a glossy black smartphone standing vertically at the bottom center, seen front-on, with the bottom speaker holes and charging port visible. Emerging from the phone screen is a long impossible staircase receding upward into a narrow tunnel made of repeated translucent vertical panels, creating a claustrophobic corridor. Within the tunnel, a giant grayscale human eye appears in the upper half, partially obscured by haze, vertical slicing, and ghosted repetitions, as if trapped inside the feed. The central image should feel eerie, dreamlike, oppressive, and cinematic, with soft fog, high contrast, photocopy grain, subtle motion smear, and layered transparency. Along the right side of the central image, add a narrow vertical numbered index with exactly 24 visible entries: 001, 002, 003, 004, 005, 007, 008, 009, 010, 011, 012, 013, 014, 015, 017, 018, 019, 020, 021, 022, 024, 025, 026, and an ellipsis, plus a thin downward arrow underneath. In the right column, add a text block titled “DESIGNED TO KEEP YOU HOOKED.” followed by 4 short lines: “Infinite feeds. Unpredicted rewards. Endless comparison. It’s not a glitch— it’s the business model.” Below that place a simple eye/globe icon, then a black rectangular box containing the message: “AWARENESS IS THE FIRST STEP: PUT THE PHONE DOWN. LOOK UP. RECLAIM YOUR TIME.” On the lower left, place a massive cropped black word fragment reading END near the bottom edge, with another stacked statement beside it: “THE MORE YOU SCROLL, THE LESS YOU LIVE.” Add tiny vertical microtext near the left margin for editorial flavor. Across the bottom footer, place 4 icon/text groups: a globe icon, an eye icon, a small warning text block reading “WARNING: EXCESSIVE SCREEN TIME CAN IMPACT YOUR MENTAL HEALTH, SLEEP, AND PRODUCTIVITY.”, an expand-corners icon, a barcode, and a final statement on the far right reading “STAY PRESENT. LIVE IN REAL LIFE.” Use minimalist Swiss-grid alignment, generous negative space, sharp black typography, subtle distressed print texture, and a high-fashion poster aesthetic.
title: Doomscrolling Editorial Poster
description: A monochrome brutalist poster about social media addiction, ideal for awareness campaigns, magazine-style graphics, or conceptual editorial art.

content:
A bold editorial poster in a brutalist Swiss-modern infographic style on a light warm-gray background, portrait orientation, with a split composition: oversized typography dominating the left half and a blurred monochrome human face dominating the right half. The main headline is stacked in huge condensed sans-serif uppercase text reading {argument name="headline text" default="SHORT-FORM ATTENTION TAX"}, with “SHORT-FORM” in black and “ATTENTION TAX” in vivid red-orange. Along the far left margin place a small vertical year mark reading “-2024”. At the top left add tiny uppercase text “YOUR ATTENTION. THEIR ECONOMY.” and at the top right add tiny uppercase text “TIME IS LIMITED. ATTENTION ISN’T.” with small plus-sign registration marks near the corners. Beneath the headline on the left, add the subheading “A hidden cost extracted every time you scroll.”

Create 3 numbered information blocks stacked down the lower left side, each marked by a vertical red-orange bar and large black numerals: section 01 titled “WHAT IS IT?”, section 02 titled “WHY DOES IT EXIST?”, and section 03 titled “HOW IT AFFECTS BEHAVIOR”. Under section 01, include body text explaining that the Short-Form Attention Tax is the invisible price paid for consuming endless short-form content and that it is measured in seconds, minutes, and mental energy extracted by platforms designed to keep you scrolling. Under section 02, include body text explaining that platforms compete for attention because attention, data, and profit are linked, and that short-form content is optimized to be instantly rewarding, infinitely scrollable, and hard to stop. Under section 03, include exactly 6 bullet points in red-orange dash style: “Shortens attention span”, “Reduces deep focus”, “Increases impulsive behavior”, “Disrupts memory & learning”, “Drives comparison & anxiety”, and “Creates compulsive usage loops”, followed by a short concluding sentence about reshaping how you think, feel, and act.

In the center-left and lower-middle areas, add supporting editorial typography in mixed sizes: “Attention is the most valuable currency of the 21st century.” with the word “currency” in red-orange; a small stat block saying “THE AVERAGE PERSON SPENDS 90+ MINUTES DAILY ON SHORT-FORM VIDEO APPS.” with “90+ MINUTES” in red-orange; a giant stacked numeric statement reading “16 DAYS” in black with the surrounding text “THAT’S OVER” above and “A YEAR.” below; and a small closing line “TAX AVOIDANCE STARTS WITH AWARENESS.”

On the right half, show a close-up portrait of a human face in black and white, partially cropped, looking forward, with a serious neutral expression. Apply heavy horizontal motion blur, digital smear, scanline-like streaks, and glitch bars crossing the face, especially across the forehead, nose, and mouth. Overlay exactly 5 vertical social-media style interface icons near the center-right of the face: a white circle/profile dot, a red-orange heart, a white speech bubble, a white bookmark ribbon, and a white share arrow. Add a large translucent red-orange circle covering the lower-right part of the face. Include subtle HUD-like graphic elements: a faint circular reticle with a small red-orange triangular wedge near the upper right, a thin vertical measurement scale near the far right edge, a few white square markers, small black and white horizontal bars, and scattered tiny plus signs for layout texture.

At the bottom, place a barcode on the left with tiny coordinate-like text above it, then 3 footer callouts spaced across the width: “PROTECT YOUR ATTENTION. PROTECT YOUR LIFE.”, “BE MINDFUL. BE INTENTIONAL. BE FREE.”, and “RECLAIM FOCUS. RECLAIM TIME. RECLAIM YOU.” Use a restrained palette of black, off-white, and red-orange only. The overall look should feel like a high-end social critique poster, mixing typographic activism, data editorial design, and dystopian tech-noise portraiture, with crisp layout, strong negative space, and print-poster realism.
title: Short-Form Attention Tax Poster
description: A high-contrast editorial infographic poster about the hidden cognitive cost of short-form media, suitable for awareness campaigns, social commentary, or magazine-style design.

Around {argument name="number of attendees" default="22"} business professionals of mixed genders and ethnicities sit in a large U-shaped arrangement of light wood conference tables, each person dressed in formal business attire and many working on open laptops. At the front of the room, a huge wall-mounted digital dashboard dominates the composition, showing a futuristic financial analytics interface in dark blue and cyan with exactly 12 visible data panels: 1 large top-left panel with the headline text {argument name="dashboard headline" default="SELECTING THE TRACKING TOOL"} and line and bar charts, 1 small top-center panel with abstract circular data textures, 1 top-center-right panel with a large numeric metric reading 92.231 and chart bars, 1 top-right panel with line graphs and gear-like interface icons, 1 mid-left strip of circular gauges and technical controls, 1 center-left tall panel with vertical data bars and circular overlays, 1 center panel with three round instrument-style readouts, 1 center-right panel with compact technical diagrams and tiny UI elements, 1 mid-right horizontal panel with circular dials and a central numeric indicator, 1 lower-center panel with glowing ring charts and waveform-style graphics, 1 lower-right wide panel with dense tabular dashboard data, and 1 small bottom-center auxiliary panel. The room is viewed from a centered rear perspective, emphasizing symmetry and the semicircle of seated attendees facing the screen, with one standing presenter silhouetted near the display. Warm sunlight enters from the left, creating soft lens flare and long shadows across the wooden floor, while the overall image style is a polished high-end editorial illustration leaning toward photorealistic corporate concept art, in a cool blue and warm amber color palette, ultra-detailed, clean, futuristic, professional, and ambitious.

content: Create a square 1:1 macro photography image of an open antique history book on a clean white background, styled like an edible history pop-up book. The book is thick, vintage, leather-bound, and lying open flat at 180 degrees. Its pages are aged parchment with yellowed paper, worn edges, and visible paper texture. On the left page, show an abundant, slightly messy cocoa harvest spread partially covering the printed text: exactly 5 whole or split cacao pods in deep red-orange and brown tones, 1 wooden bowl filled with cacao nibs, a large scatter of loose cacao beans, broken cacao shells, small piles of nibs, and several glossy green leaves tucked among the ingredients. Everything should feel organic, overflowing, and tactile. On the right page, create a large 3D pop-up sculpture of assorted Swiss chocolate built entirely from chocolate and confectionery materials: exactly 8 visible chocolate bars or bar segments in mixed dark, milk, and white chocolate, arranged in a bouquet-like upright structure with 5 large leaf-shaped cacao or chocolate leaves behind them, curled pale chocolate shavings at the base, scattered cacao crumbs, and a wrapped paper base with a vintage label reading “CHOCOLAT SUISSE” and smaller text “Maison de Qualité”. Beside it, place a tiny 1:35 scale Victorian-era chocolatier gentleman in an apron, actively presenting and adjusting the chocolate display with both hands. Print on the right page in bold black serif text: “Vevey, 1875”. Below that, include a short faded cursive lore paragraph about cacao and Swiss chocolate culture. The paragraph should read: “From the cacao pod’s humble shell emerges a confection of elegance. In Swiss chocolate houses, cacao is refined into a treasured delicacy, shared in salons and homes alike, prized for comfort, celebration, and the craft of sweet invention.” Lighting is soft, warm museum lighting focused at the center of the open book. Mood is educational, whimsical, and richly textural. Emphasize photorealism, shallow depth of field, miniature world aesthetic, premium editorial styling, and extremely high material texture fidelity.
title: Edible History Pop-Up Chocolate Book
description: A photoreal macro editorial image of an antique open book transformed into a whimsical cocoa-and-Swiss-chocolate pop-up scene, ideal for food storytelling, historical campaigns, and premium generative art comparisons.

BEYOND LIMITS.” and a smaller white line below saying “A LEGEND IN MOTION.” The composition centers on a large, close-up hero portrait of the athlete in a modern black racing suit, shown from the chest up, facing slightly to the side with intense expression, detailed skin texture, braided hair, dramatic rim lighting, and visible sponsor-style logos across the suit. Build a collage around the central portrait using exactly 8 supporting elements: on the upper left, a childhood go-kart scene labeled “1995” with the caption “THE DREAM BEGINS”; below it, a single-seater junior formula car scene labeled “2003” with the caption “F1 IS CALLING”; below that, a victory celebration scene labeled “2008” with the caption “A STAR IS BORN” and a second line “FIRST WIN CANADIAN GP”; lower left, a racing portrait labeled “2013” with the caption “WORLD CHAMPION” and a second line “A NEW ERA”; center torso text block labeled “2014 – 2020” with the title “DOMINANCE” and three stat lines “7 WORLD TITLES”, “6 CONSTRUCTORS’ TITLES”, and “82 RACE WINS”; bottom center, a front-facing black Formula 1 car with number 44 emerging from shadows; upper right, a triumphant full-body figure raising a trophy overhead amid confetti; mid-right, a vertical achievements column titled “ACHIEVEMENTS” with exactly 5 laurel-wreathed stats reading “7× F1 WORLD CHAMPION”, “103 RACE WINS”, “104 POLE POSITIONS”, “197 PODIUM FINISHES”, and “7 BRITISH GP WINS”, followed by a final text callout “SIR” and the line “KNIGHTED FOR SERVICES TO MOTORSPORT”; lower right, a modern portrait of the athlete with hand over chest beside the caption “2021 & BEYOND” and the stacked text “STILL PUSHING. STILL INSPIRING. STILL WINNING.” Add 2 additional cars at the bottom edge: a red Formula 1 car on the lower left streaking diagonally with motion blur, and a smaller black Formula 1 car on the lower right. Place a centered quote near the bottom in white italic caps: {argument name="quote" default="I DON’T RACE TO BE SECOND. I RACE TO BE ONE OF A KIND."}, followed by a gold handwritten signature-style script reading {argument name="signature name" default="Lewis Hamilton"}. Finish with a footer slogan in spaced-out white capitals: “TALENT. DISCIPLINE. PASSION. PURPOSE.” and a final line beneath it: “LEWIS HAMILTON – MORE THAN A DRIVER. A MOVEMENT.” Use layered depth, sharp typography, premium magazine-poster layout, subtle British flag accents, realistic cars, photoreal faces, and an inspirational champion-documentary aesthetic.

content:
A clean premium food advertisement poster on a light gray-white studio background, featuring {argument name="fruit name" default="tomatoes"} as the hero subject. In the center, show exactly 7 tomato pieces arranged on a shallow round wooden plate: 5 whole ripe red tomatoes stacked in a natural pyramid, 1 halved tomato standing upright at the front center with glossy flesh and visible seeds, and 1 wedge slice placed at the lower right foreground. The tomatoes are fresh, vivid red, covered with realistic water droplets, with green stems attached to most whole fruits. Add a few green leaves and two small yellow tomato blossoms near the lower right edge for freshness accents. Use soft commercial lighting, gentle shadows, sharp focus, and highly realistic texture, in a polished supermarket-poster style.

Design the layout as a Chinese nutrition and freshness infographic poster. In the upper left, place a large two-line Chinese headline with strong typographic hierarchy: the first line in black reads {argument name="headline line 1" default="自然成熟"}, the second line in large warm red reads {argument name="headline line 2" default="营养美味"}. Below it, add a smaller gray Chinese slogan: {argument name="slogan text" default="每一口都是大自然的馈赠"}. Under the slogan, place exactly 3 simple red line icons in a horizontal row with short Chinese labels and gray sublabels beneath each: 1) a sun icon with text "充足日照" and subtext "自然成熟", 2) a sprout or leaf icon with text "科学种植" and subtext "健康美味", 3) a heart outline icon with text "新鲜采摘" and subtext "产地直供".

On the right side, create a thin curved red guide line framing the tomatoes, with exactly 4 circular nutrient callouts stacked vertically from top to bottom. Each callout is a red or red-orange gradient circle with a white symbol or letter inside, connected to the curve. Use these Chinese labels and explanatory text: 1) top callout with "C" and title "富含维生素C", description "有助于增强免疫力 促进胶原蛋白合成"; 2) second callout with a molecular icon and title "番茄红素", description "强效抗氧化剂 有助于抵御自由基"; 3) third callout with a leaf icon and title "膳食纤维", description "促进肠道蠕动 帮助消化"; 4) bottom callout with "K" and title "钾元素", description "有助于维持 心脏健康".

On the left lower side of the tomatoes, add exactly 2 red text feature callouts with fine red leader lines: the upper one titled "美味多汁" with smaller gray text "果肉饱满，汁水丰富 酸甜可口，回味无穷"; the lower one titled "新鲜采摘" with smaller gray text "人工精选，严格挑选 确保每一颗都新鲜优质".

Across the bottom, place a rounded rectangular nutrition table bar in white with light gray dividers. On the left end, add a solid red rounded label block containing the Chinese title {argument name="table title" default="营养成分表（每100g含量）"}. To its right, show exactly 6 nutrient columns with gray headings and darker values beneath: "能量" "20kcal"; "蛋白质" "0.9g"; "脂肪" "0.2g"; "碳水化合物" "4.2g"; "维生素C" "14mg"; "钾" "179mg". Center a tiny gray footnote below the table: "* 数据来源于《中国食物成分表》". Overall style: elegant Chinese fresh-produce marketing poster, balanced whitespace, red-accented infographic design, realistic product photography blended with clean vector UI elements.
title: Chinese Tomato Nutrition Poster
description: A polished Chinese produce advertisement showing fresh tomatoes with nutritional callouts and a bottom nutrition table, ideal for grocery, packaging, or food marketing visuals.

content: Create a clean, symmetrical Chinese feng shui infographic poster in a traditional almanac style on a warm light beige background. The main title at the top is large dark red Chinese calligraphy text reading {argument name="headline text" default="2026年九宫飞星图"}, with a smaller subtitle beneath in black reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="（丙午年）"}. Add a decorative compass rose in the upper left corner labeled with the four cardinal directions in Chinese: 南 at top, 北 at bottom, 东 at left, 西 at right. Center the composition around a 3x3 grid of 9 bordered square panels with thin ornamental Chinese-style corners, evenly spaced and perfectly aligned. Each square contains a large colored number, a Chinese star name, one line beginning with 吉星 or 凶星, and an illustrative symbolic object. Top row has 3 panels: top-left labeled 东南 with a purple-framed panel for number 9 and text 九紫右弼星, plus 吉星: 喜庆、姻缘、贵人, illustrated with purple balloons, a gift box, and a small firework burst; top-center labeled 正南 with an orange-framed panel for number 5 and text 五黄廉贞星, plus 凶星: 灾祸、意外、疾病, illustrated with a gold gourd and ancient Chinese coins tied with a red tassel; top-right labeled 西南 with a gold-framed panel for number 7 and text 七赤破军星, plus 凶星: 破财、口舌、盗贼, illustrated with a brass bell and a silver sword. Middle row has 3 panels: middle-left aligned with 正东 in large vertical side text, a green-framed panel for number 8 and text 八白左辅星, plus 吉星: 财运、置业、积蓄, illustrated with a bonsai-like money tree and gold ingots; middle-center labeled 中宫 in a blue capsule tag overlapping the top edge of the center square, a blue-framed panel for number 1 and text 一白贪狼星, plus 吉星: 人缘、感情、智慧, illustrated with a crystal ball on a wooden stand; middle-right aligned with 正西 in large vertical side text, a green-framed panel for number 3 and text 三碧禄存星, plus 凶星: 是非、口舌、争执, illustrated with bamboo and a small stacked rock fountain. Bottom row has 3 panels: bottom-left labeled 东北 with a green-framed panel for number 4 and text 四绿文曲星, plus 吉星: 学业、文昌、考试, illustrated with an open book, brush pen, and ink stone with bamboo leaves behind; bottom-center labeled 正北 with a gold-framed panel for number 6 and text 六白武曲星, plus 吉星: 权力、贵人、偏财, illustrated with a golden guardian lion statue on a pedestal holding a ball; bottom-right labeled 西北 with a gray-framed panel for number 2 and text 二黑巨门星, plus 凶星: 病痛、伤害、阻滞, illustrated with a stone pagoda and a small incense burner. Use exactly 6 outer direction labels around the grid: 东南, 正南, 西南 above the top row, and 东北, 正北, 西北 below the bottom row, each inside rounded capsules matching the panel colors. Add exactly 2 large vertical side direction labels outside the grid: 正东 on the left side and 正西 on the right side. At the bottom center, add a pill-shaped legend with 2 segments: a red segment reading 吉星: 1、4、6、8、9 and a dark gray segment reading 凶星: 2、3、5、7. Include faint pale cloud motifs behind some objects for traditional atmosphere. Style is crisp vector-infographic with soft watercolor-like object rendering, high readability, balanced spacing, and an elegant Chinese metaphysical chart aesthetic.

description: This prompt generates a polished Chinese feng shui annual flying star infographic poster for reference, educational content, or social media sharing.

content: A clean editorial-style illustration on a light gray-white background showing exactly 11 young people gathered around a huge sheet of paper on the floor, collaboratively drawing a detailed Japan travel scene. The composition is viewed from slightly above, centered on the artwork, with the people forming a loose ring around it. Use a simple hand-drawn cartoon style with thin black outlines, soft muted colors, minimal shading, and a friendly modern magazine aesthetic. The central drawing on the paper includes 8 distinct scenic elements: snow-capped Mount Fuji in the middle background, a red sun to the upper right of the mountain, a few white clouds, pink cherry blossoms on a dark branch at upper left, a red multi-tier pagoda on the right, a tall city skyline with a tower near the center-right, a blue lake with a small boat, and a sleek white bullet train curving across the lower right. Add trees and bushes throughout, plus a small arched bridge near the lower middle. The 11 people are casually dressed in varied outfits and are all holding markers or crayons while leaning, kneeling, or lying around the paper. Include 6 people across the top edge, 3 along the left side, and 2 along the lower-right side. Their clothing should vary: hoodies, jackets, a knit beanie, a plaid shirt, a patterned sweater, a blue T-shirt, a black T-shirt, and one person in a red cardigan over dark clothes. One person on the right should wear glasses and a red cardigan, another at the bottom right should have curly dark hair, round glasses, a black T-shirt, and be lying on his stomach while drawing. Scatter a few loose crayons in blue and dark colors near the bottom edge of the paper. Keep the mood collaborative, creative, and playful, with the large illustrated poster as the clear focal point.
title: Team Drawing Japan Illustration
description: This prompt generates a soft cartoon editorial scene of 11 people collaboratively sketching a detailed Japan-themed landscape poster, suitable for articles about teamwork, AI creativity, design, or collaborative creation.

content: Create a highly detailed vintage-inspired illustrated travel poster and infographic for {argument name="country name" default="Switzerland"}, shown as a sculpted 3D relief map centered on a clean light gray background. At the top, place a huge bold black sans-serif title reading {argument name="headline text" default="SWITZERLAND"}, with smaller uppercase text below reading TRAVEL GUIDE, flanked by thin horizontal divider lines and a tiny red shield emblem with a white cross. The centerpiece is a raised topographic map of Switzerland rendered like a miniature diorama, with rocky borders, green valleys, snowy alpine peaks, blue lakes, winding white roads, and a few rail lines. Mark exactly 12 destinations on the map with black dot markers and bold black capsule labels with white uppercase text: BASEL, ZÜRICH, ST. GALLEN, LUCERNE, BERN, INTERLAKEN, CHUR, ST. MORITZ, LUGANO, ZERMATT, GENEVA, and LAUSANNE. Integrate miniature landmark buildings and scenery directly onto the map, including churches, old town towers, waterfront structures, castles, and mountain villages, plus two small red trains moving through the landscape. Add surrounding travel ephemera arranged around the map: 1 worn brown vintage suitcase with travel stickers and a red Swiss-cross badge in the upper left, 1 antique brass compass rose on the left, 1 postage stamp in the upper right reading TRAVEL TO SWITZERLAND with mountain art and postal cancellation marks, 1 realistic Swiss flag on a pole in the top right corner, 1 tilted polaroid photo in the lower left with snowy mountains and the caption {argument name="photo caption" default="Swiss Alps"}, and 4 faceted heart-shaped crystal charms total, with 2 clear/silver hearts and 2 red hearts placed around the composition. On the right side, add a vertical sightseeing list with icon illustrations and thin separators, containing exactly 12 city entries with headings and short attraction lines: ZÜRICH — Bahnhofstrasse; Old Town (Altstadt); Lake Zurich. LUCERNE — Chapel Bridge; Lion Monument; Lake Lucerne. INTERLAKEN — Jungfraujoch; Harder Kulm; Lake Brienz & Thun. ZERMATT — Matterhorn; Gornergrat Railway; Skiing & Hiking. GENEVA — Jet d'Eau; United Nations; Lake Geneva. LAUSANNE — Olympic Museum; Lausanne Cathedral; Lake Geneva. BERN — Federal Palace; Zytglogge Clock Tower; Bear Park. ST. MORITZ — St. Moritz Lake; Skiing; Luxury Shopping. LUGANO — Lake Lugano; Monte Brè; Swiss-Italian Culture. ST. GALLEN — Abbey Library; St. Gallen Cathedral; Textile Museum. CHUR — Old Town; Bishop's Palace; Rhine Valley. BASEL — Kunstmuseum; Basel Minster; Rhine River. content: A cute horizontal educational infographic in a hand-drawn scrapbook style on a pastel desk-and-paper collage background, explaining Chinese word segmentation with byte-level BPE. The scene is divided into 3 clearly separated instructional sections arranged from left to right across a wide banner. On the far left stands a chibi Shiba Inu mascot, {argument name="character name" default="柴小七"}, with warm tan and cream fur, round face, small triangular ears, rosy cheeks, and a curious expression, holding a cup and standing beside a small desk with drawers, pencils, and a chair. Above the dog is a bold rounded white title box with black Chinese text: {argument name="headline text" default="中文分词：Byte-level BPE（BBPE）流程科普"}. In the first teaching section near the upper middle, show 4 small translucent blue token-shaped tiles lined up on a wooden shelf, each labeled “Token”, with a curved arrow and small handwritten Chinese note “词频语料统计” pointing toward the next step. In the second section, place a large magnifying glass highlighting 3 small frequency tiles labeled exactly “E7”, “94”, and “B5”, with the section label in a yellow note reading “2. 频率统计与合并”; beneath and inside the magnified area include a large black Chinese character “电”, and nearby a handwritten note “频繁字节对”. In the third section at lower middle-left, add a wooden sign and a larger merged translucent blue token tile labeled “Token”, with a small yellow note reading “3. 跨字合并”, large black Chinese text “我们→”, and a caption strip below that says “高频词组合并为 Token”. On the far right, show the final explanatory result with 3 small byte boxes labeled “E7”, “94”, and “B5” above a large black Chinese character “电”, then a note card reading “1. 字节级编码（UTF-8）”, and below that the large black Chinese word “我们”. Connect the sections with curved arrows in pink, blue, and green to show process flow. Include 1 animated blue token mascot with tiny arms and legs near the center-bottom, smiling and waving. Use soft cream, pink, beige, and light blue colors, thick clean outlines, sticker-like cutout shapes, taped paper corners, notebook textures, pencils around the edges, and a friendly hand-account illustration style suitable for a science explainer graphic.
title: Scrapbook Byte-level BPE Explainer
description: This prompt generates a wide hand-drawn educational infographic with cute mascot characters to explain byte-level BPE tokenization in a friendly Chinese science-pop style.

content: A cute hand-drawn scrapbook-style horizontal educational infographic in Chinese on a warm beige paper background with rounded borders, pastel doodles, tape stickers, tiny stars, and a classroom-notebook aesthetic. The top center has a large headline in playful handwritten Chinese: "什么是分词？" with the second half in coral pink and the rest in dark brown. On the upper left, a chibi Shiba Inu teacher character stands facing forward, wearing a pale yellow shirt and blue necktie, holding a pointer stick upward, with a speech bubble that says "今天来学习分词(Tokenization)!". On the upper right, a cute blue square token mascot labeled "TOKEN" sits smiling, with blush cheeks, tiny legs and arms, and a magnifying glass; next to it is a speech bubble saying "我是 Token！被切得越合理，模型越聪明！". Near the right edge, add a small hanging notepad card reading "知识点 收藏夹" with a heart icon. Beneath the headline, place a rounded dashed text box containing the definition: "分词是将人类可读的文本切分成 Token 的过程。" with the word "Token" highlighted in blue. Below that, add a line of explanatory text: "下面以 “程序员Left” 和 “人工智能” 为例，看看不同的分词方式：" with "程序员Left" highlighted in light blue and "人工智能" highlighted in pink. The lower half contains exactly 4 rounded pastel panels arranged left to right, each with a numbered badge and title. Panel 1 is mint green and titled "1 词级分词". It includes the subtitle "按完整语义划分文本" and exactly 3 token bubbles: "程序员", "Left", "人工智能". At the bottom of this panel, show the Shiba Inu teacher giving a thumbs up with a speech bubble saying "语义完整，容易理解！". Panel 2 is pale yellow and titled "2 字符级分词". It includes the subtitle "逐字切分文本" and exactly 9 circular token bubbles arranged in rows: "程", "序", "员", "L", "e", "f", "t", "人", "工", "智", "能"—visually presented as individual characters from the example text, in a compact grid. At the bottom, show the blue token mascot holding a pencil, with a speech bubble saying "粒度最细，但序列会很长~". Panel 3 is pale pink and titled "3 子词分词". It includes the subtitle "按词根以及前后缀划分" and exactly 5 token bubbles: "程序", "员", "Left", "人工", "智能". At the bottom, show the Shiba Inu teacher thinking with one paw at its mouth and a question mark above the head, with a speech bubble saying "折中方案，效果 often 很好！". Panel 4 is pale blue and titled "4 字节级分词". It includes the subtitle "将字词转为字节编码，根据转换后的内容进行组合和划分" and displays exactly 14 small circular code bubbles: "E7", "A8", "8B", "...", "66", "74", "E4", "BA", "BA", "E8", "83", "BD", "..." arranged in multiple rows like encoded bytes. At the bottom, show the blue token mascot again, smiling, with a speech bubble saying "适合处理任意文本！" and a tiny light bulb doodle nearby. Across the very bottom, place a rounded banner note that reads: "不同分词方式各有优势，实际应用中会根据任务和数据选择合适的方案哦！". Use soft pastel green, yellow, pink, and blue for the four panels, dark brown handwritten text, subtle shadows, rounded shapes, and adorable kawaii expressions throughout. Keep the composition balanced, clean, and friendly, like a polished social-media science explainer poster.
title: Cute Chinese Tokenization Infographic
description: This prompt generates a pastel hand-drawn horizontal Chinese educational infographic explaining four tokenization methods with a Shiba Inu teacher and a blue token mascot, ideal for social media science posts.

content: A clean corporate editorial infographic illustration for a Japanese business article about manufacturing industry challenges, set inside a realistic modern factory with metalworking machines and a cool gray-blue color palette. The composition is split into two thematic halves over a blurred industrial workshop background. At the top center, place a large bold Japanese headline in dark navy text: {argument name="headline text" default="製造業が直面する根深い課題: 「人手不足」と「技術伝承」"}. In the left foreground, show 1 factory worker in a light gray uniform and cap standing with arms crossed, looking concerned; nearby add a circular white icon showing exactly 6 human silhouettes, with 3 filled dark figures and 3 dotted outline figures to symbolize labor shortage. In the right foreground, show exactly 2 factory workers beside a large lathe machine: 1 veteran worker in a navy work jacket and navy cap pointing and demonstrating machine operation, and 1 younger worker in a light gray uniform and cap observing closely. Near them, add a white thought bubble icon containing a navy head silhouette with 2 gear symbols and exactly 3 small Japanese word bubbles reading "経験", "勘", and "コツ". In the center background, include exactly 2 additional workers in light gray uniforms operating machinery, slightly out of focus, for a total of 5 workers visible in the factory scene. Overlay two rounded white information panels with dark navy title tabs. The left panel title is "人手不足" and contains exactly 3 bullet points with blue circular check icons: "若手人材の確保が困難", "現場の負担増大", and "将来の生産性低下への懸念". The right panel title is "技術伝承" and contains exactly 3 bullet points with blue circular check icons: "熟練技術が属人化", "暗黙知が言語化・標準化されていない", and "ベテランの退職による技術の断絶リスク". At the bottom center, place a dark navy rounded rectangular callout box with white Japanese text: {argument name="callout text" default="製造業の持続的な成長のために、これらの課題解決が急務"}. Add exactly 2 large white arrows pointing inward toward this bottom callout, one from the left and one from the right. Style the whole image like a polished consulting-firm presentation visual or business magazine insert: photorealistic workers and machinery, subtle depth of field, high clarity, balanced layout, soft lighting, crisp typography, and a professional Japanese manufacturing-industry infographic aesthetic.
