content: A vintage hand-drawn Chinese infographic on textured off-white paper with torn deckled edges, printed in a limited two-ink palette of deep purple and bright cyan accents, with halftone shading and poster-like comic line art. The composition compares intuitive manual cooking versus tool-assisted cooking and externalized cognition. On the left, a large adult cook in an apron is dramatically stir-frying in a wok with flames, flying ingredients, smoke swirls, and energetic motion lines; the cook’s face is obscured by a rectangular blur block. Above the head is a glowing brain-like thought bubble containing 3 small icons: a seasoning bottle, a flame, and a timer/clock, with rays radiating outward. At the lower left, a broken chain hangs beside large bold Chinese text reading “全凭手感”. Below the cook, a smaller confused person mixing in a bowl looks worried, surrounded by exactly 4 question marks. In the center, multiple thick arrows point from the cook’s intuition toward a structured cooking workflow. At upper center is large Chinese text “照着做”. Beneath it, a hand holds a smartphone recipe screen showing visible Chinese text including “5克盐” and “中火3分钟”, with a finger tapping the screen. Around the phone are measured cooking tools and ingredients: 2 measuring spoons, 1 measuring cup, 1 digital scale, and 6 small bowls arranged neatly, plus a pot on a stove with steam rising and a finished plated dish nearby. Near the plated dish is Chinese text “七八分” and a 5-star rating row with exactly 4 filled stars and 1 empty star. On the right, show a concept map of externalized cognition around a simple smiling stick-figure cook standing behind a table of food. The node network is connected with cyan lines and includes exactly 6 tool/info nodes: a smart oven at the top, 2 seasoning packets labeled “调料包” and “榨酱包”, 1 clipboard labeled “精准配方”, 1 blender, 1 rice cooker, and 1 recipe note sheet. Centered in this network is large Chinese text “认知外化”. The table in front of the figure holds exactly 5 dishes/bowls/plates of prepared food. Along the bottom is a simplified cognition equation: a large brain icon, then an arrow to a smaller brain icon, then a cluster of external tools/documents including a phone screen, a microwave-like appliance, and 3 paper/manual items, then an equals sign, then a muscular human silhouette with gears inside the torso and an upward arrow near the shoulder. Beneath or beside this equation is bold Chinese text “脑 + 外部工具 = 更强能力”, with the first “脑” also shown separately under the left brain icon. Use expressive sketched arrows, doodle lightning bolts, comic emphasis marks, and a balanced left-to-right flow that visually communicates the transition from pure instinct to repeatable systems and augmented ability.
title: Chinese Cooking Cognition Infographic
description: A retro comic-style Chinese infographic illustrating the shift from intuition-based cooking to recipe-driven, tool-augmented cooking, suitable for articles or social posts about AI, workflows, and externalized cognition.

content:
Create a premium Japanese figure advertisement poster on a clean off-white background with subtle pale gray brushstroke textures and tiny scattered gold flecks. The layout should look like a luxury hobby product introduction page for an original anime/mecha statue. The main centerpiece is a highly detailed 1/7 scale-style figure of {argument name="character name" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}, a slim teenage anime girl in a dramatic crouching attack pose, turned three-quarters to the viewer, with one knee bent under her body and the other mechanical leg planted forward. She raises a katana overhead with both hands as if about to strike. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur block. She has long brown hair with loose strands flying outward, a white headband with a small mechanical side ornament, and a navy Japanese sailor school uniform with a cropped long-sleeve top, red neckerchief, short pleated skirt, and exposed midriff. Her arms and legs are mostly robotic: metallic silver-gray mechanical arms with articulated fingers and visible joints, bulky armored mech thighs and calves with realistic pistons, seams, weathering, and small orange caution markings. The sword is a polished katana with a white-and-black wrapped handle and a metallic guard. Render the statue as a realistic painted collectible figure with studio lighting, glossy and matte material contrast, precise shadows, and showroom-grade product photography.

Design the page like a commercial figure brochure with exactly 5 numbered detail callout sections. On the left side, stack 4 rectangular close-up panels vertically, each with a number and Japanese label plus short descriptive body text in Japanese: panel 1 shows a close-up of the face and hair, labeled "01 表情"; panel 2 shows the upper torso and uniform, labeled "02 上半身"; panel 3 shows the raised mechanical arms and sword grip, labeled "03 メカアーム&ソード"; panel 4 shows the mechanical legs, labeled "04 メカレッグ". At the bottom right, add a wider rectangular panel labeled "05 武装・ディテール" showing exactly 2 katana close-up views arranged horizontally, one above the other. Keep all panel images bordered lightly and integrated into the poster layout.

At the upper left, place a large expressive brush-calligraphy title reading {argument name="main title" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}, with an ink-brush circle motif behind the first word. At the upper right, add a gold minimalist logo and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="TENNEN"}, with small Japanese tagline text beneath it. Along the right side, place a vertical Japanese promotional slogan in elegant dark text. In the lower left area, include small product specification text in Japanese with exactly these lines of product info styling: scale, product name, sculptor credit, paint credit, brand, and a release date line. Use {argument name="release date" default="2025年12月"} in the schedule area. Along the bottom, add a dark horizontal footer bar with the gold brand logo on the left, the brand name repeated, a short Japanese brand statement in small text across the center, and tiny legal/disclaimer text at the far right. Overall style: high-end Japanese figure marketing sheet, refined editorial composition, realistic collectible statue photography, elegant white-and-gold packaging aesthetic, anime girl fused with hard-surface mecha design, polished and premium.
title: Samurai Mecha Girl Figure Poster
description: A luxury Japanese-style product poster for an original anime mecha-girl figure, ideal for mock collectible figure ads and hobby brand presentation layouts.

content:
Create a premium Japanese plastic model kit product-poster layout on a clean white studio background with subtle gray gradients and a glossy floor reflection. The main subject is a highly detailed anime mecha schoolgirl figure posed dynamically in the center-left, in a wide combat stance, holding a katana horizontally across the frame with one robotic hand gripping the hilt and the other making a peace sign near her face. The character has a blurred face area, short dark navy-blue hair in a tousled bob with small side strands, and gold horn-like mechanical hair ornaments. Her outfit is a fusion of a Japanese high school sailor uniform and hard-surface sci-fi armor: white armored torso with mechanical panel lines, a red sailor neckerchief, a pleated navy skirt, bulky white armored thighs and shins, red and blue accent parts, gold circular joint details, a dark blue waist ribbon or back cloth, and red mechanical backpack-like attachments at the hips and lower back. The katana has a dark blade and a blue-and-gold wrapped handle. Render the figure like a professionally photographed collectible model or action plastic kit, with sharp material definition, realistic molded plastic surfaces, slight satin sheen, and commercial product-shot lighting.

Design the page as a figure advertisement/spec sheet with exactly 1 large hero image and 5 smaller detail panels stacked vertically on the right. The 5 right-side panels must show: 1) close-up of the head and hair ornaments, 2) upper-body torso detail with sailor scarf and chest armor, 3) weapon and articulated hand close-up with the sword near the face, 4) waist attachment and skirt/hip armor detail, 5) leg detail close-up showing joints and armor construction. Include thin blue divider accents around the right-side panel area.

At the top left, place a large Japanese title in bold serif-like characters reading "女子甲生", with the middle character in dark red and the others in dark navy. Beneath it, add a smaller Japanese subtitle line: "— メカ × 少女 × 青春 —". On the upper right, place a sleek logo and brand name reading "{argument name="brand name" default="TENNEN"}" with small Japanese text beneath it. Add a vertical Japanese slogan block on the left side of the hero figure reading "鋼に咲く、乙女の意志。" with the middle phrase in red. Add Japanese captions beneath each of the 5 right-side detail panels: "表情造形", "上半身ディテール", "武装・可動手", "腰部アタッチメント", "脚部ディテール". In the lower left, include a boxed scale label reading "{argument name="scale label" default="1/12 SCALE"}" and nearby English product text reading "FULL ACTION PLASTIC MODEL KIT". content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the cast reference, transform the simple lineup into an ornate Japanese light-novel character relationship chart poster. Keep the same 10 named characters and reuse their existing portrait art as the base visuals, but redesign the layout into a polished infographic on a soft cream and pale-blue fantasy background with decorative borders, sparkles, roses, and a small European-style hotel building vignette in the upper left. Add a large Japanese title at the top, 「支配人はかりそめの顔」, with the subtitle 「キャラクター紹介＆相関図」, and place a dark badge in the upper right that says 「ネタバレ配慮版」. Put the heroine 一条 紬希 in the center as the main focus in a framed character card labeled 「主人公」, and place 秦野 啓司 in a large framed card on the right as the key counterpart. Arrange the remaining 8 characters around them in individual profile cards: 加賀坂 その葉, 川原 澪, 樫村, 紬希の母, ハルカ, 杏子, 美果, 桜子. Connect the characters with multiple colored arrows and relationship labels to visualize the network; include exactly 14 visible relationship labels: 「親友」, 「理解者」, 「本音を見抜く」, 「憧れ」, 「相談」, 「画策」, 「仲直り中」, 「直感的理解」, 「メンター」, 「実務支援」, 「保護者的存在」, 「後輩　ムードメーカー」, 「後輩　グループを支える」, 「後輩　明るさ・希望」. Also add the 8 central horizontal relationship callouts between 一条 紬希 and 秦野 啓司: 「偽溶み→公認」, 「ライバル」, 「秘密を共有」, 「対等な相棒」, 「気になる存在」, plus a pink central badge reading 「反発から信頼へ」, and 3 lower callouts: 「信頼」, 「協力を後押し」, 「二人の空気に気づく」. Include a gold-ribbon group label above the three lower girls that says 「ASTRALの仲間たち」. Add a bottom section with exactly 10 smaller summary cards, one for each character again, lined up across the width. On the far right, add 2 boxed sidebar sections titled 「作品のキーワード」 and 「関係の見どころ」; the first should contain 4 bullet items with icons, and the second should contain 4 bullet items with icons. Fill every card with dense Japanese profile text and role tags in a clean editorial style, as if for a promotional relationship guide included with a novel. Make the overall design elegant, readable, romantic-mystery themed, and magazine-quality.

content: A highly detailed, colorful illustrated hidden-object poster set in Madrid’s Puerta del Sol on a bright sunny day, rendered like a lively hand-drawn travel puzzle with crisp ink outlines, textured watercolor-gouache shading, and a slightly whimsical caricature style. The composition is packed edge to edge with a huge crowd in the plaza, viewed from a slightly elevated eye level, with the Real Casa de Correos clock building dominating the right background, the Tío Pepe rooftop sign in the left background, the red diamond Sol metro sign on the left, the bear and strawberry tree statue near the center, historic facades, blue sky, and soft clouds. At the top left, include a torn notebook-paper sign pinned over the scene with large Spanish text: {argument name="headline text" default="¿Dónde está \"El Hombre del Puro\"?"} and a second line {argument name="subheadline text" default="Encuéntralo en Madrid"}. Next to it, add a pinned small portrait photo of the target man: a middle-aged man in a dark fedora and dark coat holding a cigar near his mouth, styled like a reference snapshot. Fill the square with exactly 1 metro entrance sign, 1 lottery kiosk labeled “Loterías y Apuestas del Estado,” 1 domed souvenir kiosk with postcard display and a sign reading “¡HOLA! DESDE MADRID,” 1 churros stand with a chalkboard reading “CHURROS CON CHOCOLATE,” 1 hat display stall on the lower right, 1 guitarist, 2 flamenco dancers in red dresses, 1 street cleaner in a bright orange-and-green uniform with text on the back reading “MADRID LIMPIO ENTRE TODOS,” 1 bicyclist, 2 dogs, 1 child holding a red teddy-bear balloon, many pigeons scattered across the foreground, children playing with soap bubbles, tourists with backpacks and maps, families, street onlookers, and performers. The crowd should feel dense and bustling, with dozens of distinct figures in varied summer clothing and natural poses, creating a challenging search scene. Emphasize Spanish local color, playful observational details, warm oranges and sunlit stone grays, and the feeling of a classic “Where’s Waldo?” style city-search illustration centered on finding {argument name="target character" default="El Hombre del Puro"} somewhere among the crowd in {argument name="city" default="Madrid"}.
title: Hidden-Object Madrid Plaza Puzzle
description: This prompt generates a busy illustrated search-and-find poster of Puerta del Sol in Madrid, ideal for hidden-object games, social posts, or travel-themed puzzle art.

content: Create a highly detailed, colorful isometric festival poster illustration of a bustling Latin American technology fair in an open urban plaza, packed with dozens of people networking, coding, presenting, eating, recording media, and attending talks. The overall style should feel like a premium editorial cityscape poster: vibrant, dense, optimistic, playful, and full of readable signage, with crisp linework, painterly textures, warm sunlight, and a celebratory startup-community atmosphere. The main headline on the large stage at upper left reads {argument name="headline text" default="LATAM TECH FEST"}, with a subheading in Spanish reading "Aprender para transformar". On the stage, show a live conference with blue lighting, a presenter, and a seated audience; include 4 vertical icon panels on the stage area labeled "Educación", "Tecnología", "Innovación", and "Futuro", plus 3 glowing topic icons on the back wall labeled "Código", "Comunidad", and "Impacto". Build the plaza as a dense multi-zone event map with exactly 24 clearly labeled signs or booths distributed across the scene: "Keep Coding Keep Growing", "YO APRENDÍ EN LÍNEA", "Remote Work Zone", "ENGLISH UPGRADE YOUR FUTURE", "STARTUPS BUILD THE FUTURE", "DESIGN THINKING", "HACKATHON 24 HORAS DE IDEAS", "Café con código", "AREPAS CON TODO", "Hechas con código y ♥", "Inspiración", "Networking", "Aprendizaje", "Café", "Baños", "SOMOS LATINOAMÉRICA", "AI LAB", "DATA PEOPLE", "DEVS QUE IMPACTAN", "MARKETING GROWTH & COMMUNITY", "PRODUCT BUILD WHAT MATTERS", "FINTECH EL FUTURO DEL DINERO", "FOUNDER MODE", and "DEMO DAY LAUNCH · SCALE". In the center of the plaza, place a circular fountain with a large green geometric logo sculpture as the visual anchor. Surround it with tables, laptops, whiteboards, crowds, planters, and benches. Include a colorful hillside neighborhood in the background with mountains, palm trees, power lines, and exactly 2 red cable cars crossing the sky; also add exactly 1 small drone flying overhead. On the upper right building, place a large brand sign reading {argument name="brand name" default="Platzi"} and a green billboard that says "NUNCA PARES DE APRENDER". Populate the lower and middle foreground with many micro-scenes: a podcast booth labeled "PODCAST ON AIR", a neon "LIVE STREAM" corner, a startup workspace with people using laptops, a hackathon judging table, a founder pitch area, a fintech board with charts, and a coffee stand with espresso equipment and menu boards. Add 6 animal or mascot details across the scene: 1 orange cat lounging near the left worktables, 1 capybara at the lower left, 1 multicolor llama piñata in the lower center-left, 1 yellow rubber duck near the center-bottom, 1 small green robot near the bottom center-right, and 1 tiny turtle near the bottom beside a coin. Also place exactly 4 vehicle elements: 2 green scooters at the lower left, 1 decorated taco truck at the lower right with the sign "TACOS AL PASTOR", and 1 wheelchair user moving through the crowd. Include extra props that reinforce tech culture: whiteboards with sticky notes, a board titled "Traction" with an upward graph and bullet points "Users", "Revenue", "Retention", "Love", a board titled "CAP TABLE" with percentage rows, a Bitcoin-style coin on the ground, microphones, cameras, cables, monitors, smartphones, and branded green merchandise. Clothing should be modern casual startup attire with hoodies, jackets, backpacks, jeans, sneakers, and conference badges, featuring a diverse mix of ages and Latin American identities. Use rich greens, teals, oranges, purples, and warm neutrals, with lush plants and vines integrated into architecture. Make every corner busy and discoverable, like a Where's-Waldo-style tech ecosystem celebration, but keep the composition readable and inviting.
title: Latin American Tech Festival Poster
description: This prompt generates a dense isometric festival-style illustration of a vibrant Latin American tech conference plaza, ideal for event branding, startup community posters, or social media showcase art.

content:
An educational infographic themed "Life of {argument name="food name" default="Garlic"}."

The image must feature "a single complete food item" (such as a potato / a bunch of bananas / a head of garlic), using horizontal slicing to show the changes of the same food at different time stages, rather than a collage of multiple different items.

The main food body maintains structural continuity and consistent shape, presenting different levels of maturity in different slice areas (like time being sliced open).

The image is in vertical 3:4 ratio, with the main subject centered and horizontally expanded, evenly divided into 4-6 segments:

From left to right: Immature → Mature → Overripe → Spoiled

Each segment reflects real changes:

Color changes (green → yellow → black, etc.)
Texture changes (plump → softened → shriveled → decayed)
Feature changes (sprouting, weeping, mold, etc.)

Each stage is accompanied by text descriptions:

Stage name
Appearance characteristics
Internal changes (sugar/starch/moisture changes)
Consumption suggestions (recommended/suitable for cooking/inedible)

Design style:

Minimalist light background (beige)
Highly realistic photography style
Clear dividing lines (sense of time slicing)
Chinese educational layout, Little Red Book style
Appropriate use of icons like ⚠️✔️

Title at the top: "Life of {argument name="food name" default="Garlic"}"

Key requirement: It must be presented as "slices of the same food item changing over time," not a collage of independent individuals.
title: Food Lifecycle Infographic Prompt
description: A detailed scientific infographic prompt designed for Little Red Book style, visualizing the maturation and decay of food items through time-slices.

content: A highly realistic documentary-style close-up photo of a reinforced concrete structural beam with severe {argument name="damage type" default="shear cracking"}. The scene shows the underside of a concrete building structure, with 1 large diagonal crack running from the lower left area upward toward the upper middle-right of the beam face, 1 secondary branching diagonal crack nearby on the left-center, and 3 thinner vertical to slightly irregular hairline cracks on the right half of the beam. The concrete surface is rough, weathered, pale gray, and speckled with small pores and aggregate marks, with darker grime and age staining near the ceiling slab and beam joints. Include a supporting concrete column at the far left, the underside of the beam visible along the bottom edge, and a dim industrial background below with shadowy pipes and structural elements out of focus. Lighting is natural and subdued, like an inspection photograph taken on site under a bridge or inside a parking structure. Composition is a straight-on medium close-up centered on the damaged beam face, emphasizing authentic structural deterioration, realistic texture, engineering-inspection accuracy, and no people, no safety signs, no overlay text.
title: Realistic Cracked Concrete Beam
description: This prompt generates a realistic structural inspection-style image of a damaged concrete beam, suitable for civil engineering, infrastructure diagnostics, or educational materials.

content: A highly realistic documentary-style close-up photo of a weathered reinforced concrete bridge pier or retaining wall outdoors, showing severe alkali-silica reaction damage. The wall fills most of the frame and is viewed from a slight angle so that both the front face and the left edge are visible. The concrete surface is gray, rough, aged, and stained, covered with a dense network of large irregular polygonal map cracks with approximately 18 clearly visible major crack cells across the surface. Many cracks have pale white gel-like seepage and chalky deposits along the edges, with vertical whitish and brownish water streaks running downward from several crack intersections. Include a horizontal construction joint or base line near the bottom of the wall, darker moisture staining along the lower section, and subtle moss or algae discoloration near the edges. The setting is an overcast riverside or drainage channel environment with sparse winter vegetation, rocks at the bottom right, and a narrow strip of still water on the right edge of the image. Natural muted lighting, neutral color palette, engineering inspection photo aesthetic, sharp surface texture, no people, no tools, no text, no annotations.
title: Concrete Wall with ASR Map Cracking
description: This prompt generates a realistic civil-engineering inspection photo of alkali-silica reaction damage on an outdoor concrete structure, useful for training materials, reports, or infrastructure visualizations.

content: A hyperrealistic close-up documentary photograph of severe salt damage on a weathered concrete parapet wall in winter, shot from a low oblique angle so the wall recedes into the distance along the right side of the frame. The top coping is capped with a thin layer of snow and frost, and the lower ground surface beside the wall is dark, wet, and partially covered with slushy snow. The concrete face shows widespread scaling and spalling concentrated across the upper half, with irregular peeling patches exposing coarse aggregate stones of various sizes embedded in the mix. The damaged areas form rough, jagged, map-like shapes with crumbling edges, pitted texture, gray cement paste loss, and black and tan exposed pebbles. Vertical moisture streaks and dirty runoff stains descend toward the base of the wall. The overall palette is cold gray, charcoal, and muted winter white, with soft overcast daylight, shallow atmospheric haze in the distant background, and extremely detailed surface texture. Composition should feel like a civil engineering inspection photo, realistic smartphone or field-camera capture, no people, no text, no labels, no dramatic stylization.
title: Winter Concrete Salt Damage Close-Up
description: A photorealistic inspection-style image of salt-damaged concrete in a snowy outdoor setting, useful for civil engineering, infrastructure, or deterioration reference visuals.

content: A hyper-realistic close-up documentary photograph of severe chloride-induced corrosion damage on a reinforced concrete coastal structure, viewed from slightly below at the corner of a cantilevered beam or pier. The image shows a large spalled area at the outer corner where the concrete cover has broken away, exposing exactly 5 rusted horizontal reinforcing steel bars embedded inside the concrete. The surrounding concrete is rough, cracked, and chipped, with irregular broken edges and visible aggregate. Brown-orange rust staining runs downward from the exposed reinforcement and along the underside of the beam, indicating long-term salt damage. The concrete surface is light gray, weathered, and matte, with subtle pores and construction imperfections. In the background, place a calm blue sea and a pale blue sky with a faint distant shoreline near the horizon, softly out of focus, reinforcing the marine environment. Bright natural daylight, clear weather, realistic smartphone photo composition, no people, no tools, no safety barriers, no text, no labels, no illustration style, only a believable engineering-inspection photo of salt-damaged reinforced concrete at the seaside.
title: Coastal Reinforced Concrete Salt Damage
description: This prompt generates a realistic inspection-style photo of chloride corrosion and concrete spalling on a seaside reinforced concrete structure, useful for civil engineering visuals and infrastructure damage examples.

content: Turn this {argument name="food item" default="ramen"} into a cute recipe page with illustrations in the style of a {argument name="art style" default="vintage cookbook that was hand-drawn"}. A carefully drawn ingredients with labels, measures, and implements like bowls, whisks, or spoons should surround the composition's focal point. To create a {argument name="mood" default="homey, nostalgic"} vibe, use textured shading, warm pastel colors, and fine, ink-like outlines. Add recipe writing in the handwritten manner, including the ingredients and directions organically into the layout. Make sure the page has an artistic and educational tone, combining the beauty of colorful illustrations with a cookbook aesthetic.
title: Vintage Cookbook Illustration

content: A high-angle aerial drone photograph of a modern urban transit hub in a dense mixed-use city district, captured in crisp late-afternoon sunlight with realistic architectural detail. The scene centers on a large multi-track rail station running diagonally through the frame, with 6 visible railway tracks, 2 long passenger trains at platforms, and a glass-covered station canopy near the upper middle. A broad pedestrian bridge crosses above the tracks from left to right, connecting plazas on both sides. content:
Please draw a brightly colored, vertical (9:16) hand-drawn style "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Travel Journal Illustration." The style should look as if it were created with crayons by a curious child. Use a soft and warm light-colored background (such as light yellow), paired with bright tones like red, blue, and green, to create a cozy, child-like, and travel-inspired atmosphere.

I. Main Image: Journal-style Travel Route

Draw a "winding travel route" in the center of the illustration, connecting multiple locations with arrows and dashed lines. Recommended attractions will be automatically generated based on a {argument name="number of days" default="1"}-day itinerary:

Example format (automatically replaced with {argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} related content):

- "Stop 1: {Attraction 1 recommendation + short fun description}"
- "Stop 2: {Attraction 2 recommendation + short fun description}"
- "Stop 3: {Attraction 3 recommendation + short fun description}"
- ...
- "Final Stop: {Local signature food/souvenir + warm closing statement}"

> The number of travel stops is automatically generated based on the number of days. If no days are input, a 1-day/highlights route will be generated by default.

II. Fun Surrounding Elements (Automatically replaced based on the city)

Add plenty of child-like elements around the route, such as:

- Cute travel characters: "A child holding local snacks," "An adventurous kid wearing a backpack," etc.
- Child-like Q-version hand-drawings of local landmarks: such as "{landmark 1}," "{landmark 2}," "{landmark 3}."
- Fun signboards: "Watch out for getting lost!", "Mind the crowds!", "Good food ahead!" (Adjusted according to city context).
- Sticker-style slogans: "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Travel Memories Unlocked!", "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Food Adventure!", "Where to next?"
- Cute small icons of local delicacies: such as "{food 1}," "{food 2}," "{food 3}."
- Exclamations (maintaining a child-like tone): "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} is so much fun!", "I want to go again!"

III. Overall Style Requirements

- Hand-drawn crayon style / children's travel log style
- Bright colors, full but warm composition
- Emphasis on the joy and exploration of travel
- All text uses cute handwritten fonts
- Make the entire image look like a travel journal page full of child-like wonder.
title: Hand-drawn Travel Journal Illustration
description: A detailed prompt for creating a child-like, hand-drawn travel journal illustration with customizable city names, landmarks, and routes.

In the foreground, place 2 countryballs standing shoulder to shoulder on an extremely narrow sandy land bridge with rocks along both sides, making it obvious that only one can pass at a time. On the left is a {argument name="left country" default="United States"} countryball painted with the American flag, wearing black sunglasses and a brown cowboy hat, facing the other ball with a stubborn attitude. On the right is an {argument name="right country" default="Iran"} countryball painted with the Iranian flag, wearing a dark turban-like hat, with angry slanted eyes, also refusing to move. Add 2 large white speech bubbles, one beside each countryball, and put the same bold Korean word in both bubbles: {argument name="speech bubble text" default="길"}. In the midground and background, show a busy blue sea crowded with 9 ships total: 2 gray US warships on the far left, 1 Chinese submarine with a red Chinese flag, 4 oil tankers lined up in the center-left and center carrying different national flags, and 2 gray military ships near the narrow passage with small American flags. At the top right, include a large Iranian flag overlay along the coastline. Draw beige landmasses around the waterway to resemble a simplified map view of the Strait of Hormuz. At the bottom center, add a bold caption in Korean and English on the sand: {argument name="bottom caption" default="호르무즈 해협 (Hormuz Strait)"}. content: A clean fashion comparison studio photo of 4 adult East Asian women standing side by side against a plain light gray seamless background, full body visible from head to shoes, photographed straight-on with soft diffused lighting and a polished commercial look. Above each woman, centered over her head in black serif text, place height labels reading exactly: 145cm, 155cm, 165cm, 175cm. Emphasize realistic proportional differences in height while keeping all four women slim, elegant, and similarly styled, with long dark brown to black softly wavy hair and neutral expressions. Their faces are obscured by smooth rectangular blur blocks. The women stand very close together in a friendly pose, with subtle arm contact and one woman lightly resting an arm around another. Use a coordinated beige, cream, taupe, and soft blush wardrobe palette with smart casual feminine outfits and matching ivory loafers. Woman 1 under the 145cm label wears a short-sleeve cream ribbed knit top tucked into high-waisted light beige shorts with a fabric belt, plus a small quilted shoulder bag with a chain strap. Woman 2 under the 155cm label wears a white long-sleeve blouse with a bow tie at the collar and a taupe mini skirt with a slight flared hem, carrying a small light beige crossbody handbag. Woman 4 under the 175cm label wears a draped white V-neck blouse with sleeves rolled to the forearms, high-waisted taupe belted shorts, and a medium taupe shoulder bag. content: Create a clean premium Japanese tech infographic poster for {argument name="product name" default="Meta Quest 3"}, centered on a vertically stacked exploded view of a white mixed-reality headset floating in space against a soft lavender-to-blue gradient background. At the top, place the Meta logo in blue followed by a large bold black sans-serif headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="Meta Quest 3"}, with a smaller Japanese tagline beneath: 「まったく新しい現実を、まったく新しい構造から。」. The central subject is a highly polished 3D product render shown as an engineering breakdown with exactly 9 numbered layers, each layer separated evenly from top to bottom and labeled with blue circular number markers on the left side from 1 to 9. The 9 visible layers are: 1) the white outer faceplate shell with three front sensor/camera openings, 2) a row of exactly 3 black tracking camera modules, 3) the main logic board with chips and a clearly visible Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 processor graphic at the center, 4) a pair of large pancake lens assemblies with vivid purple-blue glass reflections, 5) the black internal frame chassis with openings for optics, 6) the battery/electronics bar with glowing blue accents, 7) two white articulated side strap arms, 8) a white fabric head strap loop, 9) a black soft facial interface cushion at the bottom. Add rounded rectangular annotation boxes with thin white borders and subtle transparency on both sides, each connected by fine white leader lines to the corresponding layer. There are exactly 7 feature callout boxes total: 3 on the left and 4 on the right. Left side boxes, from top to bottom, read: 「Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2」 with a chip icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「調整可能なIPD機構」 with an optics adjustment icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「精密設計されたヘッドストラップ」 with a headset strap icon and smaller Japanese body text. Right side boxes, from top to bottom, read: 「フェイスプレート」 with a simple faceplate icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「トラッキングカメラ」 with a camera icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「パンケーキレンズ」 with a dual-lens icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「高性能バッテリー」 with a battery icon and smaller Japanese body text, plus a lower-right box reading 「柔らかなフェイスインターフェース」 with a soft cushion icon and smaller Japanese body text; keep the overall visual balance elegant and symmetric. At the bottom, add a wide white rounded banner spanning most of the width. On its left side place a large bold Japanese statement in blue: 「体験は、構造から進化する。」 and below it smaller Japanese explanatory copy in black. On the right side of the banner place the blue Meta logo and the wordmark “Meta”. Use a sleek Apple-like product marketing style, ultra-sharp 3D rendering, soft studio lighting, subtle glow, precise shadows, glossy plastics, realistic materials, minimal clutter, and a high-end corporate presentation aesthetic.
title: Meta Quest 3 Exploded View Poster
description: A polished Japanese product infographic showing a 9-layer exploded view of a VR headset with labeled hardware callouts, ideal for tech marketing or product presentation visuals.

content:
Create a charming hand-drawn vintage travel scrapbook poster about {argument name="city name" default="北京"}, designed as a Chinese-language illustrated tourist guide page on warm aged paper lying on a wooden tabletop. The composition is a single vertical poster with a slightly worn notebook-page look, soft stains, folded corners, tape marks, stamp-like ink smudges, and a casual collage aesthetic. At the top center, place large bold black Chinese calligraphy for {argument name="city name" default="北京"}, with the English word {argument name="english city name" default="Beijing"} underneath in loose blue brush script. Near the title, add a small red seal stamp and a short Chinese text block on the upper right describing the geographic location of the city in dark blue handwritten-style Chinese characters.

Below the title, include 4 taped polaroid-style travel photos arranged in a slightly uneven row, each with a handwritten English caption on the white border. Photo 1: the Forbidden City at sunset with golden reflections and warm orange light, captioned about warm golden tones. Photo 2: the Great Wall winding across green mountains under a bright sky, captioned about Great Wall of China landscape and green mountains. Photo 3: Beihai Park lake with willow branches, boats, and a white stupa in the background, captioned about a serene lake view. Photo 4: a traditional hutong alley with gray brick walls and hanging red lanterns, captioned about red lanterns and a charming narrow street. Use different decorative tape patterns above the photos.

Arrange the lower two-thirds like an illustrated infographic with colorful doodles and handwritten Chinese headings in red and blue. Include 5 main content sections: a geographic description block at the top right; a “best travel season” section on the left with Chinese text recommending spring and autumn, decorated with a leaf doodle and a small sun icon; a “main attractions and features” section on the left-middle listing exactly 3 items in Chinese with bullet points: Forbidden City, Badaling Great Wall, and Shichahai & hutongs, accompanied by line-art sketches of a palace pavilion, the Great Wall, hutong houses, and a small tricycle; a “must-eat foods” section on the lower left listing exactly 3 foods in Chinese with bullet points: Peking duck, zhajiangmian, and douzhi, alongside cute food illustrations of a roast duck platter, a bowl of noodles with chopsticks, and a surprised face doodle; and a “tips” section near the lower middle with exactly 2 advice lines in Chinese, each with a small icon, one about wearing comfortable shoes because attractions are large, and one about booking tickets in advance because holidays are crowded.

Add a small outline map of China near the center-right with Beijing marked by a red star and a curved arrow pointing to it. Place a traditional stone guardian lion illustration on the right side with a comic-style handwritten Chinese callout bubble saying it is super imposing. Add a highlighted recommendation box with a scalloped red outline containing exactly 2 recommended places in Chinese: Temple of Heaven Park with a note about praying for good harvests, and Nanluoguxiang; decorate this box with 2 architectural illustrations, one of the Temple of Heaven and one of a traditional gate building. At the very bottom, include a bold handwritten Chinese quote line in dark blue with red emphasis marks, plus 3 doodles beside it: a retro camera, the Bird’s Nest stadium with a small red heart, and the CCTV Headquarters building.

Overall style: cozy travel journal infographic, hand-drawn pen-and-watercolor look, slightly naive sketch style, scrapbook collage, cream paper texture, muted red and navy blue palette with soft greens and warm browns, playful but informative layout, highly legible mixed typography, clean composition, nostalgic tourism poster feel.
title: Vintage Beijing Travel Scrapbook Poster
description: This prompt generates a warm hand-drawn Beijing travel guide poster in a scrapbook infographic style, ideal for tourism artwork, educational city posters, or social media travel visuals.

content: Create a vintage Korean food poster infographic on aged beige parchment paper with worn texture, darkened edges, subtle stains, and an ornate traditional frame in muted green. The design is a single vertically stacked poster with 4 clearly separated sections and all text rendered sharply in Korean and English calligraphy. At the top, place a large ribbon banner with bold black Korean brush lettering reading "정통 한국 김밥" and a smaller ribbon subtitle reading "Traditional Korean Gimbap". In the upper-left corner, include a small modern badge that says "Pollo AI" and "GPT Image 2". The centerpiece of the top section is a large blue-and-white porcelain platter piled with exactly 12 sliced gimbap pieces, each showing white rice, yellow egg, orange carrot, green spinach, and dark seaweed wrapping, illustrated in a hand-drawn ink-and-watercolor style. To the right of the platter, add a small blue-and-white bowl of kimchi and a handwritten Korean note reading "간단해 보여도 정성이 들어간 한국의 맛!" with a small red heart, plus a small red seal stamp containing Korean characters. Add faint traditional landscape and floral ink painting details in the background, including a flowering branch on the left and misty mountains on the right. The second section is an ingredient row under a ribbon label reading "재료", showing exactly 6 numbered ingredients in separate compartments from left to right: 1. "김 (건김)" as a stack of dark seaweed sheets, 2. "밥 (양념 밥)" as a bowl of white rice, 3. "계란 (지단용)" as yellow egg strips on a plate, 4. "당근 (채썰어볶기)" as orange julienned carrots on a plate, 5. "시금치 (데쳐서 무치기)" as seasoned green spinach in a bowl, 6. "단무지 (김밥용)" as yellow pickled radish strips on a plate. The third section is a 6-panel step-by-step tutorial under a ribbon label reading "만드는 순서", arranged in two rows of three with arrows indicating flow. Panel 1 is labeled "1 밥 간하기" and shows a bowl of rice with a wooden spoon, a bottle of sesame oil, and salt, with caption "밥에 참기름 소금으로 간하기". Panel 2 is labeled "2 속재료 준비하기" and shows a cutting board with yellow egg strips, orange carrots, green spinach, and a knife, with caption "재료 볶아 속재료 준비하기". Panel 3 is labeled "3 김과 밥 펴기" and shows a bamboo mat with a seaweed sheet covered with white rice and a wooden rice paddle, with caption "김에 밥 얇게 펴기". Panel 4 is labeled "4 속재료 얹기" and shows the rice-covered seaweed with neat horizontal rows of yellow egg, orange carrot, and green spinach, with caption "속재료를 차례로 얹기". Panel 5 is labeled "5 단단하게 말기" and shows two hands rolling the bamboo mat tightly, with caption "김밥을 단단하게 말기". Panel 6 is labeled "6 썰어 완성하기" and shows a chef knife slicing a roll into pieces on a cutting board, with caption "먹기 좋게 썰어 완성!". At the bottom, add a wide banner with large expressive Korean brush calligraphy reading "정성 가득한 한 줄의 행복!" and a small red heart, surrounded by floral decorations and a red square seal with the character "福". Overall style: traditional Korean folk poster mixed with cookbook infographic, detailed pen-and-ink outlines, watercolor fills, warm sepia palette, nostalgic handmade print aesthetic, balanced composition, crisp legible typography, highly accurate Korean text rendering.
title: Vintage Korean Gimbap Recipe Poster
description: This prompt generates a detailed retro-style Korean infographic poster for gimbap, suitable for food marketing, menu art, or culturally themed recipe illustrations.

content:
Generate a full color Chinese-text manga about this {argument name="character" default="OpenAI researcher, Chen Boyuan"} (first picture), who works on improving the text rendering capability of ChatGPT Image 2 model for the upcoming release. (in the background there is boba tea and a banana taped to the wall with a single slice of duct tape). The model can render insanely small Chinese text when he tried generating some detailed and beautiful multilingual infographics handdrawn-style poster about his hometown, {argument name="location" default="Wuxi"} on his computer screen. His hard work pays off and the team was impressed by the absurdly good quality of multilingual text performance of his model, seeing all the languages it can write. When he takes a break with one hand holding his phone, he received a translated text message from Sam Altman on his phone (avatar attached as second picture), asking him to take a look at the rendered multilingual text in an image he just generated to congrat the team, since Sam only knows English. However, make it funny by let Boyuan outrage (typical manga style) at the end by seeing Sam's generated image contains a "稳稳地接住你" phrase at the central location in an otherwise perfectly rendered image that's used to congrat the team, because this sentence has been memed as an unnatural but funny Chinese sentence GPT likes to use on Chinese internet. Boyuan should rage "God! It learned to 'catch' again!" (with teammates as tiny heads on the side, sweating and saying in Chinese "we are working hard to fix it!"). At the very bottom of the manga, add a tiny line of footnote (very tiny)in Chinese that "note: the entire manga, including this footnote and picture in picture, are all generated with gpt image 2 at once without editing or multiple steps."

Additional Instructions: Use vertical 1440x2560 image layout, with first row about this researcher working hard, second row about his result on {argument name="location" default="Wuxi"} with multiple languages, third row shows the team excitement, fourth row split into left and right where left shows he takes a break and the phone received a message, right panel shows Sam's text message, and fifth row shows Sam's picture and Chen Boyuan's reaction. No narration except for the first row. Avoid Chinese map. All characters should be in manga style. The banana background should only appear in the first panel and the tape should be a single slice of tape, not a cross tape. The banana and tape decoration should be small as a insignificant easter egg for people to find. OpenAI logo shall only appear on Chen Boyuan's cloth, not elsewhere. No mugs in the scene since we already have the boba. Sam should only appear in the text message panel. The entire manga should be appear as a professional photo of a physical page in a manga book. In the lower right most corner of the poster there is a small "Ultra-small Chinese is also clearly readable:" with a paragraph of much smaller Chinese that begins with "(This is an ultra-small font size test) Wuxi is the author's hometown, so I made this poster, and the Chinese is finally fixed. Haven't been home for many years, really want to eat hairy crabs!" (ultra small).
title: Detailed multilingual Chinese manga prompt
description: A very complex prompt for generating a full-page manga featuring specific characters, vertical layouts, and precise multilingual text rendering in Chinese and English.

content: I am creating a magazine page with the theme of "visual polyglot". The title in the center of the image should be "{argument name="title" default="Create Everything at Once"}". Create a piece of art celebrating visual creations, not limited to beautiful photographs but also across the full breadth of human visual culture and natural visual elements. There should be curated collage representing the diverse distribution: scientific diagrams, the periodic table, the solar system, medieval manuscript pages, botanical illustrations, anatomical drawings, old maps, climate charts, engineering schematics, transit signage, multilingual text, comic panels, UI screenshots, a camera photo, a butterfly specimen, pie charts, architectural blueprints, and façade drawings. The text frames the model as fluent across languages, notation systems, interfaces, cultural forms, and visual conventions—able to move from utility to beauty, from document understanding to artistic generation. Also feature artistic elements like pixel art, styles, history, sculpture, nature, photography, paintings, and all art forms. These are just examples, I need you to actively think about other elements / styles that may fit in a good design that's not limited to these concepts. The overall effect is that of a premium research announcement or museum-style manifesto: elegant, ambitious, and designed to argue that image intelligence should be trained on the whole visual world, not just polished aesthetics. Use an unstructured, creative and artistic layout, such as but not limited to fan out, avoid grid-like layouts. Portrait 4:5 aspect ratio. Don't add any content text beside the "Create Everything at Once" title. Text as part of the art is okay. Avoid a beige tint of the overall style, since we want vibrant elements to be vibrant.
title: Visual Polyglot Magazine Collage
description: A complex collage prompt for a magazine page that blends various scientific, artistic, and technical diagrams to celebrate visual culture.

content:
Create a hand-drawn style infographic card with a 9:16 vertical aspect ratio. The card has a clear theme and the background is beige or off-white with a paper texture. The overall design reflects a simple and friendly hand-drawn aesthetic.

The top of the card features a large brush cursive font in alternating red and black with sharp contrast to highlight the title and attract visual focus. The text content is all in Chinese cursive, and the overall layout is divided into 2 to 4 clear sections, each using short, concise Chinese phrases to express core points. The font maintains the smooth rhythm of cursive, being both legible and artistic.

The card is dotted with simple, fun hand-drawn illustrations or icons, such as characters or symbolic signs, to enhance visual appeal and trigger thought and resonance in the reader. The overall layout pays attention to visual balance, reserving enough white space to ensure the image is concise, clear, and easy to read and understand.

The theme is: "{argument name="theme content" default="Building an IP is long-term compound interest. Keep setting up your stall every day, keep doing it, and there will definitely be results, because 99% of people can't stick to it."}"
title: Hand-drawn Infographic Card Prompt
description: A prompt for creating an artistic infographic card in a 9:16 aspect ratio with a hand-drawn style and paper texture.

content: A realistic smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT web interface in Japanese, shown on a clean white background. Centered in the chat is a single generated image: a top-down photo of 1 Japanese newspaper placed neatly on a medium-dark wooden tabletop with rounded table corners visible. The newspaper dominates the image and looks highly believable, like a fake but convincing breaking-news front page. The masthead area is dense and traditional, with a huge bold black Japanese headline across the top reading 「高市総理辞任」. Beneath it is a large main photo of 1 politician at a press conference podium with multiple microphones, face intentionally blurred or obscured, in front of a dark blue curtain. Along the right side is 1 vertical blue newspaper nameplate area with white Japanese text resembling a major national daily. A tall vertical subheadline column in Japanese runs beside the main image, suggesting discussion of a successor candidate. The front page includes exactly 4 visible advertisement blocks near the bottom and lower side areas, 1 small portrait photo of a suited man in a left-side article, 1 sports photo block in the lower middle, 1 weather or data box on the right, and many tightly packed columns of Japanese body text throughout. The newspaper should feel authentic, serious, and editorial, with realistic print texture, slight page curl, subtle shadows, and credible Japanese typography. Around the image, include the visible ChatGPT UI chrome: top-left “ChatGPT”, top-right Japanese sharing controls, a small circular overlay button labeled 「編集」 at the lower-left corner of the image, a small share-style overlay icon at the lower-right corner of the image, reaction/action icons beneath the image, and a bottom input bar with Japanese placeholder text 「質問してみましょう」 plus microphone and voice buttons. Overall style: photorealistic screenshot, modern web app interface, fake-news newspaper front page, crisp legible layout, natural lighting, minimal perspective distortion.
title: Fake Japanese Newspaper in ChatGPT UI
description: This generates a photorealistic screenshot of the ChatGPT interface displaying a fabricated but convincing Japanese newspaper front page, useful for mockups about AI-generated fake news.

content: A realistic documentary-style photo of an elementary school classroom during a math activity, with about 10 children seated around grouped wooden desks, wearing green and blue school uniforms, actively playing a colorful multiplication domino game. The camera is at child eye level, slightly angled downward toward the main table in the foreground. Center the scene on one square educational board game labeled in Portuguese, with the title "DOMINÓ DA MULTIPLICAÇÃO" on the lower edge and "TREINANDO AS TABUADAS" in the center, surrounded by a border of brightly colored domino-style multiplication tiles. Show 4 children clearly engaged around this main board: one child placing a yellow tile onto the board, one child holding a stack of multicolored tiles, one child watching from the left, and one child in a blue sleeve at the bottom edge arranging pieces. Include 2 shallow wooden boxes labeled "JOGO DE DOMINÓ," one near the center-left and one at the bottom-right, each containing colorful rectangular domino pieces. Scatter school materials naturally on the desks: 3 pencils, 2 worksheets, 1 water bottle, pencil cases, notebooks, and extra game tiles. On the right side of the same box, add the title "EXEMPLO DE INÍCIO:" in purple uppercase and show 4 small domino tiles in sequence plus ellipsis: "INÍCIO | 1 × 1", then "1 | 1 × 2", then "2 | 1 × 3", then "3 | 1 × 4", followed by "...". content:
Create a square infographic-style illustration showing a {argument name="grid size" default="15×15"} invention timeline grid rendered as a collection of miniature isometric dioramas on aged parchment tiles. The image should look like a curated historical poster that spans from {argument name="starting year" default="1000 BC"} to {argument name="ending year" default="2026"}, with one invention per tile and no repeats. Show the visible portion as a 5 by 5 section of the larger grid, for a total of 25 labeled tiles, arranged in neat rows and columns with thin dark borders. Every tile contains a unique world-changing invention depicted as a small handcrafted diorama with era-appropriate materials, colors, and background details. Use a warm antiquarian palette for ancient and medieval inventions, sepia technical-document tones for early modern inventions, and cooler neon-blue futuristic lighting for modern digital and biotech inventions. Surround the grid with an old-map border and subtle historical cartography textures, blending into faint modern network graphics near the bottom right.

Label each visible tile with a small beige caption tag in bold black text. Include exactly these 25 visible inventions in reading order from top left to bottom right: 1) {argument name="first tile label" default="1000 BC"} tile showing an iron plow and simple hand tools in a farm field, captioned "Iron Plow & Tools"; 2) "Concept of Zero" shown as a parchment-like tile with a carved zero symbol and a blue hourglass; 3) "Water Clock" shown as a wooden water-timing device; 4) "Catapult" shown as a wooden siege engine; 5) "Antikythera Mechanism" shown as an intricate bronze gear device in a stone niche; 6) "Concrete" shown as a wheelbarrow filled with wet cement or mortar; 7) "Wheelbarrow" shown as a simple wooden one-wheel cart; 8) "Windmill" shown as a traditional mill on grassy ground; 9) "Gunpowder" shown as a barrel and a mound of black powder with smoke; 10) "Printing Press" shown as a wooden press framed by classical columns; 11) "Mechanical Clock" shown as an ornate standing clock; 12) "Telescope" shown as an early brass telescope on a tripod with sketch-like scientific notes; 13) "Steam Engine" shown on a blue blueprint-style tile with an early locomotive engine; 14) "Electric Battery" shown on a blueprint-like tile with two cylindrical battery cells and wiring; 15) "Telegraph" shown as a Morse telegraph key on technical paper; 16) "Light Bulb" shown glowing warmly on a neutral pedestal; 17) "Automobile" shown as an early red motorcar on a workshop-plan background; 18) "Airplane" shown as a commercial jet aircraft in miniature; 19) "Transistor" shown as a black microchip on a luminous circuit-board tile; 20) "Personal Computer" shown as a beige desktop computer with CRT monitor and keyboard; 21) "World Wide Web" shown as a glowing blue globe over digital circuitry; 22) "Smartphone" shown as a sleek modern phone on a neon-tech background; 23) "CRISPR-Cas9" shown as a DNA double helix in a biotech-blue display tile; 24) "Reusable Rocket" shown as several upright rockets launching with exhaust clouds; 25) "AI (LLMs)" shown as glowing large letters AI in a holographic tech cube; 26) "Brain-Computer Interface" shown as a glowing brain hologram on a blue platform; 27) "Advanced Neural Interface (Implant)" shown as a transparent human head profile with a glowing brain implant, with a small top label reading "2026".

Keep the composition highly organized, poster-like, and visually dense, with each tile readable at a glance. Use slight isometric perspective, crisp linework, painterly shading, and polished editorial illustration quality. The overall feeling should combine museum poster, educational timeline, and imaginative historical-tech diorama art.
title: Historical Invention Timeline Grid
description: This prompt generates a parchment-styled educational poster showing a grid of labeled invention dioramas across history, ideal for timeline infographics and world-changing technology comparisons.

content: A photorealistic humorous academic presentation in a conference room: an anthropomorphic otter scientist stands at the left side of the frame wearing a crisp white lab coat and holding a thin pointing stick toward a large presentation board on an easel. The otter is upright like a human, with realistic brown fur, dark paws, and a professional posture. The lab coat has a stitched name tag reading "Dr. Otter" and a smaller line reading "Aquatic Systems Lab," plus two pens in the chest pocket. The otter’s face is partially censored by a square blur block. Behind the otter is a whiteboard with faint handwritten notes and doodles, including "WiFi > Fish," "H2O," "Hydration," a fish sketch, and a wifi symbol. The main focus is a large clean presentation slide with sharp readable text and polished corporate-academic layout. At the top, a bold title reads "{argument name="headline text" default="Ethan Mollick’s Otter Test"}" and beneath it a subtitle reads "Prompt: \"{argument name="prompt text" default="An otter sitting on an airplane seat using in-flight wifi on a laptop"}\"". Below that is a boxed section titled "Sample AI-Generated Images" containing exactly 4 side-by-side sample images of a realistic otter seated in an airplane seat using a laptop or tablet, each framed like model outputs, with one showing a large wifi symbol above the seat. Beneath the images is a section labeled "Performance Results (Pass = otter, airplane seat, in-flight wifi, laptop/tablet)" with exactly 5 score boxes: "DALL·E 3" with no visible numeric score, "GPT-4o" with "4/4" and "100%", "Midjourney v6" with "3/4" and "75%", "Stable Diffusion XL" with "2/4" and "50%", and "SD 1.5" with "0/4" and "0%". On the right side is a large highlighted box reading "Average Score" and "{argument name="average score" default="70%"}" in large blue type. At the bottom of the slide is a "Key Findings" box with exactly 3 bullet points: "Modern models understand complex, specific prompts surprisingly well.", "Otters + airplanes + wifi = a reliable benchmark.", and "Further research is otter-ly necessary." A small simple cartoon otter doodle appears in the lower-right corner of the slide. The room is warmly lit with wood-paneled walls, shallow depth of field, and a few blurred audience members in the foreground, including a laptop at the bottom edge showing an otter image on its screen and a glass pitcher on a table. Style: ultra-realistic editorial photography, deadpan scientific satire, believable conference presentation, high detail, natural indoor lighting, professional lens compression, readable slide typography, polished yet absurd.

content: A smartphone screenshot of an AI chat app interface in portrait orientation, showing a clean white iOS-style screen with a top bar containing a hamburger menu on the left, the blue title “Thinking” with a small chevron, and two icons on the right for compose and more options. Near the top is a rounded light-gray user message bubble in Japanese reading “Attention機構を人体に喩えて細かくラベルを付けて。医学書の精緻な挿絵風に。” Below it, faint gray system text reads “Thought for 5s” and “画像が作成されました”. The lower half of the screen displays the generated image as a detailed medical textbook-style anatomical poster. The poster shows a realistic three-quarter back view of an adult woman from head to upper thighs, with her head turned slightly left and her dark brown hair tied into a messy bun. Her skin and outer tissues are removed across most of the body to reveal musculature, nerves, blood vessels, and fibrous structures, rendered in extremely detailed vintage medical illustration style on a warm cream paper background. A rectangular cutout obscures the center of the face from forehead to jaw, creating a censored blank block over the facial area. Fine glowing network lines and nodes are overlaid through the exposed brain and body to visualize the attention mechanism as if it were an anatomical system. Surrounding the figure are 6 numbered explanatory panels and 2 additional text blocks, all densely filled with Japanese and English bilingual labels, formulas, arrows, and diagrams. The main poster title at upper left is “アテンション機構の解剖学的構造” with the English subtitle “The Anatomy of the Attention Mechanism”. At the top right is a flowchart labeled “Overall Flow of Attention” containing 5 connected boxes describing the process from input to output. Down the left side are 3 stacked explanatory sections with equations and mapping tables. Down the right side are 3 more numbered sections, each with technical notes and a small chart or matrix; the visible mini-diagrams include 1 purple heatmap matrix, 1 blue bar chart, and 1 multicolored cube graphic. Along the bottom edge are 5 small brain inset illustrations with captions showing stages of information flow. The overall aesthetic should feel like a highly polished AI-generated screenshot documenting a surreal scientific illustration request, with crisp UI, lots of tiny readable labels, and a convincing fusion of transformer attention diagrams and classical anatomical plate design.

content: A smartphone app screenshot in portrait orientation showing an AI chat interface in Japanese, with a clean white background and iOS-style top bar. At the very top, display a left hamburger menu icon, blue text reading “Thinking” with a right chevron, an edit compose icon, and a three-dot menu. Below it, show a large rounded light-gray chat bubble containing 6 lines of Japanese text, exactly: 「モーフ感浮遊感のある感じ＋かつ反射するダストのレイヤーを加えて。テキスト多め、重要ーアーキテクチャは可読性高め、精細で細かいコードや数式の可読性は二の次のデザインアクセント＆アートエレメンツで。」 Under the bubble, place small light-gray system text reading “Thought for a couple of seconds”, then a larger gray Japanese line reading “画像が作成されました”. In the lower half, show 1 generated image thumbnail with rounded corners: a dense futuristic infographic poster about the Transformer neural network architecture, rendered as glowing neon sci-fi holographic UI art. The poster should have a cosmic deep-space background with stars, purple, magenta, blue, and cyan light trails, reflective particles, volumetric glow, and floating geometric crystals. Large title at top left of the poster: “TRANSFORMER”, with subtitle “THE ARCHITECTURE”. Include 2 large central glowing boxes labeled “ENCODER LAYER” and “DECODER LAYER”, linked by arrows and smaller blocks for “ENCODER STACK (N×)” and “DECODER STACK (N×)”. Add many surrounding labeled panels and formulas, including sections for “KEY INNOVATIONS”, “WHY TRANSFORMERS?”, “POSITIONAL ENCODING”, “FEED FORWARD NETWORK”, “COMPUTATIONAL COMPLEXITY”, “OVERALL FLOW”, “SELF-ATTENTION MECHANISM”, “MULTI-HEAD ATTENTION”, “APPLICATIONS”, and “MODEL SCALING”. Show token rows at the bottom, including an English input sequence like “[CLS] the cat sat on the mat [SEP]” and an output sequence in French-like tokens ending with “[EOS]”. Add tiny charts, equations, attention diagrams, and wiring lines throughout, but keep the overall impression artistic and luminous rather than strictly readable. At the bottom center of the poster thumbnail, overlay a white circular download button with a black downward arrow. The overall screenshot should feel like a real mobile ChatGPT-style interface displaying an AI-generated image result, crisp and modern.

content: A sleek Chinese social-media style screenshot on a dark charcoal black interface, minimalist and premium, with a large rounded rectangular image card placed in the lower left-center and a small rounded chat bubble in the upper right. The overall canvas is mostly empty dark space, giving a clean tech presentation feel. At the top left of the main area, show one line of bold white Chinese text reading: “换成小米汽车，我做一张更像发布会级别的整车爆炸分解图。” In the upper right, include a single gray rounded speech bubble with white Chinese text: “小米汽车的产品拆解图”. Below, display one featured poster-like infographic card with rounded corners and a glossy black background. Inside that card, create a highly polished exploded-view automotive product presentation for a turquoise {argument name="car model" default="Xiaomi SU7"} electric sedan, shown in dramatic three-quarter front view, with the car body separated into many components suspended around the chassis. The hood is open, trunk lid lifted, four side doors detached and floating outward, front bumper and fascia separated, headlights isolated, interior exposed, and major mechanical and structural modules arranged neatly in layers beneath and around the body. The visual style should resemble a premium launch-event keynote slide: cinematic studio lighting, realistic reflections, sharp detail, dark background, subtle blue highlights, and precise technical composition. In the upper left of the infographic card, place large white Chinese title text in three lines: “小米汽车 SU7”, “产品拆解图”, “科技跨越，人车合一”. Add an orange square Xiaomi-style logo in the upper right corner of the card. Surround the car with 14 Chinese callout labels connected by thin white leader lines, identifying visible parts and systems. On the left side, include 6 labels for features such as integrated closed front fascia, LED headlights, front trunk design, high-voltage battery, front motor assembly, front double-wishbone suspension, and Brembo four-piston brake caliper. On the right side, include 8 labels for features such as electric tailgate, through-type taillight, frameless doors, hidden door handles, rear motor assembly, rear motor specs, all-aluminum alloy chassis, five-link rear suspension, and Michelin performance tires. Beneath the exploded car body, clearly show the battery pack, front and rear drive units, suspension subframes, wheel assemblies, braking components, front and rear seats, center console parts, underbody panels, and structural floor elements, all separated and floating in a carefully organized exploded arrangement. At the bottom of the infographic card, add a horizontal information strip divided into 5 columns of small Chinese specification text with headings for vehicle dimensions, power performance, range, intelligent driving, and safety structure. In the lower left of the card, place a bold white Chinese label “编辑”. In the lower center, include a circular down-arrow icon, and in the lower right, a share/export icon. The composition should look like a real screenshot from a Chinese AI chat app showcasing an automatically generated high-end car teardown infographic, with modern UI spacing, crisp typography, and a luxurious black-and-cyan color palette.

content: A humorous, highly detailed composite image showing a modern smartphone displaying a Chinese social-media Moments post about the Xuanwu Gate Incident, placed on the left side of the frame, with the posted battle image expanded into a large cinematic historical scene filling the right side. The phone should look like a black iPhone with thin bezels and a top notch, shown front-facing. On the phone screen, the app header bar is dark gray-black and reads “朋友圈” in white, with a back arrow on the left and a camera icon on the right. Below it is a social post from {argument name="poster name" default="唐王世民"}, with a small square profile avatar of an ancient Chinese warrior in armor and helmet. Under the name is a location pin and the text “长安·玄武门”, and a timestamp line “唐武德九年六月初四 巳时”. The main post text in Chinese says: “吾为国家除逆贼，请社稷。今日玄武门，功在千秋！⚔️💪”. Beneath the text is a square battle image preview matching the large scene on the right. Below the image is a metadata row showing exactly three items: “3.8万次浏览”, “赞 (666)”, and “(128)” beside a comment icon. Under that is a comments box with exactly 5 visible commenters, each with a tiny avatar and Chinese text styled like supportive social-media replies from historical figures. The comments should include these names in Chinese: “尉迟恭”, “房玄龄”, “李渊”, “杜如晦”, and “长孙无忌”, with the tone praising the success of the action; one comment line should suggest the emperor is shocked and the state is secured. The right side is a dramatic Tang-dynasty battle painting at sunset outside {argument name="gate name" default="玄武门"}, with a massive gray stone gate tower and the gate plaque reading “玄武门”. In the center foreground, a mounted armored archer in red-plumed helmet draws a bow while riding a brown horse; around him are exactly 7 clearly visible mounted or standing soldiers in Tang armor, plus 1 fallen armored figure on the ground pointing upward. Multiple yellow battle flags with the large black character “唐” wave through the dust; show at least 4 visible flags. Arrows fly through the sky, horses rear and turn, and the air is filled with dust, warm sunset light, and battlefield motion. The visual style is realistic historical epic key art with painterly detail, but the overall concept is comedic and anachronistic because it presents an ancient coup as a social-media朋友圈 post. Keep all visible interface text in Chinese, maintain believable mobile UI spacing, and blend the phone mockup with the expanded battle artwork in one widescreen composition.
title: Xuanwu Gate Incident Moments Post
description: This prompt generates a satirical image of the Xuanwu Gate Incident presented as a Chinese social-media Moments post alongside a cinematic Tang-dynasty battle scene.

content:
A high-resolution museum-style photograph of a traditional Chinese calligraphy handscroll on aged beige xuan paper, shown flat and filling the frame with no mounting border visible. The composition is a single elegant work of running-script brush calligraphy in deep black ink, arranged in 11 vertical columns read right to left. The main text is the poem title and verse of {argument name="poem text" default="定風波
莫聽穿林打葉聲
何妨吟嘯且徐行
竹杖芒鞋輕勝馬
誰怕
一蓑煙雨任平生
料峭春風吹酒醒
微冷
山頭斜照卻相迎
回首向來蕭瑟處
歸去
也無風雨也無晴"}, written with expressive literati brushwork, varied pressure, dry-brush texture, natural ink spread, and lively stroke rhythm reminiscent of a Song-dynasty masterpiece interpreted by a Jin-style calligrapher. Add a smaller left-side inscription in 3 vertical columns containing {argument name="inscription text" default="蘇軾詞定風波
癸卯春
奚義之書"}, with the inscription thinner and more restrained than the main text. Include exactly 5 red cinnabar seals with carved seal-script impressions: 1 small square seal near the upper right margin, 3 vertically stacked rectangular seals along the mid-to-lower right edge, and 1 square seal near the lower left beside the inscription. The paper should show subtle fibers, warm foxing, soft tonal unevenness, and gentle age wear, while the lighting remains even, diffuse, and archival, emphasizing authentic texture and the contrast between black ink and tan paper. Keep the background entirely occupied by the scroll surface, with a calm scholarly antique aesthetic and no modern objects.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Scroll on Aged Paper
description: This prompt generates a realistic classical Chinese ink calligraphy scroll with authentic paper texture and seals, ideal for historical art imagery or typography demonstrations.

The overall style is high-quality Guofeng gongbi illustration: fine line work + elegant coloring, light beige / rice paper texture background; annotations in clear Chinese calligraphy font; horizontal 4K long scroll poster, balanced composition, distinct characters, and an atmosphere that fits the theme (e.g., ethereal, heroic, gentle, etc.). content: A traditional Chinese ink wash hanging-scroll painting on warm aged rice paper, vertical composition, with six large vertical columns of bold black brush-calligraphy occupying the upper and right half of the image. The calligraphy should be highly legible expressive Chinese cursive-regular script with varied ink density and natural brush taper, reading from right to left in 6 columns: "金樽清酒斗十千 玉盘珍羞直万钱", "停杯投箸不能食 拔剑四顾心茫然", "欲渡黄河冰塞川 将登太行雪满山", "闲来垂钓碧溪上 忽复乘舟梦日边", "行路难 行路难 多歧路 今安在", "长风破浪会有时 直挂云帆济沧海". Add one smaller vertical inscription on the left side reading "李白行路难" with a small red seal stamp beneath it. In the lower left foreground, depict an ancient Chinese scholar-poet in flowing white and pale gray robes with a blue sash, long black hair in a traditional topknot with loose strands and ribbon, standing on the edge of a dark rocky cliff, body angled right and head lifted upward in a contemplative, heroic pose. Below and across the lower half, paint a turbulent river or sea with white crashing waves in monochrome ink and soft gray washes; in the distance, faint misty mountains and fog dissolve into the paper. Classical literati painting style, dynamic calligraphy as the main focus, poetic and majestic mood, restrained palette of black ink, gray wash, off-white paper, and a small touch of muted blue on the robe, ample negative space, museum-quality Chinese shanshui and calligraphy fusion.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Poem Scroll
description: A vertical ink-wash artwork combining a famous Chinese poem in six calligraphy columns with a lone scholar on a cliff, ideal for classical art, cultural posters, or elegant wall-scroll imagery.

content: A traditional Chinese ink wash hanging-scroll style painting on warm off-white rice paper, vertically composed with large black brush-calligraphy occupying the upper and right-central area and a poetic landscape illustration in the lower left and bottom. The calligraphy must be crisp, fully legible, and written in expressive semi-cursive brush script, arranged in 6 vertical columns read right to left. The exact text of the 6 columns is: “金樽清酒斗十千 玉盘珍羞直万钱”, “停杯投箸不能食 拔剑四顾心茫然”, “欲渡黄河冰塞川 将登太行雪满山”, “闲来垂钓碧溪上 忽复乘舟梦日边”, “行路难 行路难 多歧路 今安在”, “长风破浪会有时 直挂云帆济沧海”. Add a smaller vertical signature inscription to the left of the main poem reading “李白行路难”, plus 1 small red square seal beneath the inscription. In the painted scene, show 1 ancient Chinese scholar-poet in flowing pale robes with a dark topknot and trailing ribbons, standing on the edge of a rugged cliff at lower left, gazing upward and outward in contemplation. Below and across the lower half, depict a turbulent river or sea with whitecaps and foam, misty ink-wash mountains receding in the distance, sparse grasses and dark brush vegetation near the cliff edge, and soft atmospheric fog. Use monochrome black and gray ink with very restrained muted blue-gray washes in the water and robe shadows. The mood is heroic, melancholic, and literary, evoking classical Chinese shanshui painting and museum-quality calligraphy, with empty negative space preserved around the text and landscape.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Poem Landscape
description: This prompt generates a classical Chinese ink painting with flawless poem calligraphy and a scholar in a dramatic shanshui landscape, ideal for cultural posters, scroll art, or literary-themed visuals.

content: Create a dramatic vertical food advertisement on a pure black background, styled like a premium ingredient breakdown poster for a hearty Chinese chicken mushroom vermicelli stew. Use a clean top-to-bottom exploded composition with floating ingredients suspended in midair above the finished dish, each group clearly separated and lit with glossy commercial food-photography lighting. At the top, show a cluster of mixed brown shiitake and other savory mushrooms. Below that, show 2 grouped aromatics: a pile of red goji berries and a small bundle of green scallions with 2 thick ginger slices. Below that, show 2 grouped main items: several raw chopped bone-in chicken pieces with skin on, and 1 bundled nest of dry vermicelli noodles. Below that, show 2 grouped vegetables: peeled potato cubes and thick carrot slices. Beneath them, place 1 transparent glass bowl filled with rich golden chicken broth, with 4 shiitake mushrooms visible on the surface, tiny herb bits, a few floating oil droplets, and faint steam. At the bottom, place 1 dark brown ceramic casserole pot with side handles containing the finished stew: chicken pieces, shiitake mushrooms, translucent vermicelli, potato chunks, carrot slices, scattered goji berries, chopped green onion garnish, and glossy golden broth. Add drifting droplets, crumbs, and tiny garnish particles between layers to emphasize motion and richness. Include subtle steam rising from the final stew and 1 bright star-like sparkle highlight on the right rim of the casserole. Surround the ingredient groups with 7 bilingual callouts in Chinese and English, each with a thin curved arrow pointing to the relevant item. The 7 labels are: "榛蘑&香菇 / Hazel Mushrooms & Shiitake", "鲜美菌菇 / Savory Mushrooms", "枸杞&葱姜 / Goji Berries & Aromatics", "鸡肉&粉条 / Chicken & Vermicelli", "土豆&胡萝卜 / Potatoes & Carrots", "浓郁鸡汤 / Rich Chicken Broth", and "成品 / Finished Stew". Add 1 extra bilingual text note near the vegetables or middle area reading "丰富食材 / Rich Ingredients". Make the image hyper-realistic, appetizing, high contrast, razor sharp, with cinematic highlights, deep shadows, premium packaging-ad aesthetics, and a balanced centered layout optimized for a poster or social media ad.
title: Exploded Chicken Mushroom Stew Ad
description: A high-contrast vertical food poster showing an exploded ingredient layout and bilingual labels for a rich chicken, mushroom, potato, carrot, and vermicelli stew.
